```{r}
#   
#   lines(x = c(1:years), y = plot_dt$orch_fun_mn, col = prop_cols[j], lwd = 2)
#   polygon(x = c(c(1:years), rev(c(1:years))), y = c(plot_dt$orch_fun_low, rev(plot_dt$orch_fun_up)), col = adjustcolor(prop_cols[j], alpha.f = 0.2), border = NA)


# plot_list <- orch_D5
# 
# xlab1 <- NA
# ylab1 <- NA
# #plotlab <- "c) Reef ROI"
# plot(x = c(1:years), y = rep(0, years), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, 120), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA, xaxt = "n")
# axis(side = 1, at = seq(0, 50, 10), labels = seq(0, 50, 10) + 2025)
# mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, outer = T, cex = lab_cx)
# mtext(side = 2, ylab1, line = 3.5, cex = lab_cx)
# mtext(side = 3, "b) Disturbance every 5 years", adj = 0.025, line = -1.5)
# j <- p_choice
#   plot_dt <- ts_fun(sim_list = plot_list, n_pars = n_sample1, max_yr = years, prop_choice = j, par2_choice = 2)
#   
#   lines(x = c(1:years), y = plot_dt$reef_cover_mn, col = prop_cols[j], lwd = 2)
#   polygon(x = c(c(1:years), rev(c(1:years))), y = c(plot_dt$reef_cover_low, rev(plot_dt$reef_cover_up)), col = adjustcolor(prop_cols[j], alpha.f = 0.2), border = NA)
#   

  
plot_list <- orch_D3

xlab1 <- NA
ylab1 <- NA
#plotlab <- "c) Reef ROI"
plot(x = c(1:years), y = rep(0, years), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, 5000), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA, xaxt = "n")
axis(side = 1, at = seq(0, 50, 10), labels = seq(0, 50, 10) + 2025)
mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, outer = T, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 2, ylab1, line = 3.5, cex = lab_cx)
#mtext(side = 3, "c) Disturbance every 3 years", adj = 0.025, line = -1.5)
mtext(side = 3, "b) Severe disturbance", adj = 0.025, line = -1.5)
j <- p_choice
  plot_dt <- ts_fun(sim_list = plot_list, n_pars = n_sample1, max_yr = years, prop_choice = j, par2_choice = 2)
  
  lines(x = c(1:years), y = plot_dt$reef_cover_mn, col = prop_cols[j], lwd = 2)
  polygon(x = c(c(1:years), rev(c(1:years))), y = c(plot_dt$reef_cover_low, rev(plot_dt$reef_cover_up)), col = adjustcolor(prop_cols[j], alpha.f = 0.2), border = NA)
  

# xlab1 <- "Proportion substrates initially outplanted to reef"
# ylab1 <- expression("Orchard function ("*m^2~"adults)")
# plot(x = c(1:years), y = rep(0, years), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, 5000), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
# mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, outer = T, cex = lab_cx)
# mtext(side = 2, ylab1, line = 3.5, cex = lab_cx)
# #mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)
# j <- p_choice
#   plot_dt <- ts_fun(sim_list = plot_list, n_pars = n_sample1, max_yr = years, prop_choice = j, par2_choice = 2)
#   
#   lines(x = c(1:years), y = plot_dt$orch_fun_mn, col = prop_cols[j], lwd = 2)
#   polygon(x = c(c(1:years), rev(c(1:years))), y = c(plot_dt$orch_fun_low, rev(plot_dt$orch_fun_up)), col = adjustcolor(prop_cols[j], alpha.f = 0.2), border = NA)

  dev.off()

```

-- full disturbance regimes

```{r}

# x-axis = disturbance severity on reef, y-axis = average cover over 50 years

# different panels for different frequencies

# main text: only 100% investment in reef

# SM: different investments in orchard, with and without protection in orchard

# so need to make a function that loops over the disturbance severities and returns vector of mean and quantiles of reef cover

dist_plot_fun <- function(dist_dt, prop_out1){
  
dt1 <- dist_dt %>% group_by(prop_out, dist_sev_r) %>% summarize(mn = mean(reef_cover_mean), q05 = quantile(reef_cover_mean, 0.05), q95 = quantile(reef_cover_mean, 0.95)) %>% ungroup() %>% filter(prop_out == prop_out1)

return(dt1)
  
}




pdf("TempFigs/dist_sev_main.pdf", height = 3, width = 8)


par(mfrow = c(1, 3))
layout(matrix(c(1, 2, 3), nrow = 1, ncol = 3, byrow = T), widths = rep(1, 3), heights = rep(1, 1))
#layout.show(2)
par(mar=c(0, 1, 3.5, 1), oma = c(4.5, 4.5, 0.1, 0))


j <- 3
dt_plot <- dist_plot_fun(dist_dt = orch_D7s_dt, prop_out1 = prop_main[j])
ymax <- 2500

plot(x = rev(dt_plot$dist_sev_r), y = dt_plot$mn, col = NA, type = "l", ylim = c(0, ymax), xaxt = "n", xlab = NA, ylab = NA, las = 1)
mtext(side = 1, "Severity (prop. reduction in baseline survival)", outer = T, line = 2.5)
mtext(side = 2, expression("Mean coral cover over 50 yrs ("*m^2*")"), line = 2.5)
mtext(side = 3, "a) Disturbance every 7 years", adj = 0)
axis(side = 1, at = seq(0, 1, 0.2), labels = seq(0, 1, 0.2))
lines(x = rev(dt_plot$dist_sev_r), y = dt_plot$mn, col = prop_cols[j])
polygon(x = c(rev(dt_plot$dist_sev_r), dt_plot$dist_sev_r), y = c(dt_plot$q05, rev(dt_plot$q95)), col = adjustcolor(prop_cols[j], alpha.f = 0.2), border = NA)

dt_plot <- dist_plot_fun(dist_dt = orch_D5s_dt, prop_out1 = prop_main[j])

plot(x = rev(dt_plot$dist_sev_r), y = dt_plot$mn, col = NA, type = "l", ylim = c(0, ymax), xaxt = "n", xlab = NA, ylab = NA, yaxt = "n")
axis(side = 2, at = seq(0, ymax, 500), labels = NA)
mtext(side = 3, "b) Disturbance every 5 years", adj = 0)
#mtext(side = 1, "Severity (prop. reduction in baseline survival)")
#mtext(side = 2, expression("Mean coral cover over 50 yrs ("*m^2*")"))
axis(side = 1, at = seq(0, 1, 0.2), labels = seq(0, 1, 0.2))
lines(x = rev(dt_plot$dist_sev_r), y = dt_plot$mn, col = prop_cols[j])
polygon(x = c(rev(dt_plot$dist_sev_r), dt_plot$dist_sev_r), y = c(dt_plot$q05, rev(dt_plot$q95)), col = adjustcolor(prop_cols[j], alpha.f = 0.2), border = NA)

dt_plot <- dist_plot_fun(dist_dt = orch_D3s_dt, prop_out1 = prop_main[j])

plot(x = rev(dt_plot$dist_sev_r), y = dt_plot$mn, col = NA, type = "l", ylim = c(0, ymax), xaxt = "n", xlab = NA, ylab = NA, yaxt = "n")
axis(side = 2, at = seq(0, ymax, 500), labels = NA)
mtext(side = 3, "c) Disturbance every 3 years", adj = 0)
#mtext(side = 1, "Severity (prop. reduction in baseline survival)")
#mtext(side = 2, expression("Mean coral cover over 50 yrs ("*m^2*")"))
axis(side = 1, at = seq(0, 1, 0.2), labels = seq(0, 1, 0.2))
lines(x = rev(dt_plot$dist_sev_r), y = dt_plot$mn, col = prop_cols[j])
polygon(x = c(rev(dt_plot$dist_sev_r), dt_plot$dist_sev_r), y = c(dt_plot$q05, rev(dt_plot$q95)), col = adjustcolor(prop_cols[j], alpha.f = 0.2), border = NA)
  
# severity = reduction in survival relative to baseline

dev.off()

```


-- full disturbance regimes with orchard

```{r}
# 3 x 3 plot, where each row is different orchard investment, and rows two and three have dashed and solid lines for cases where orchard is vs. isn't impacted the same as the reef


pdf("TempFigs/dist_sev_full.pdf", height = 8, width = 8)


par(mfrow = c(3, 3))
layout(matrix(c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9), nrow = 3, ncol = 3, byrow = T), widths = rep(1, 3), heights = rep(1, 3))

# next orchard investment level
```

-- trade-off plots (coral cover vs. total ROI) for 5 and 50 yrs and different disturbance regimes AND with/without reference reef supply

```{r, warning=FALSE}

# 4 panels: 5 and 50 years crossed with reference reef supply
# each panel: 3 disturbance scenarios (shape), 3 outplanting proportions (color)

# plot mean reef cover across all the parameter treatments vs. mean orchard function, with error bars (confidence intervals)

prop_cols <- c("#FEC44F", "#CC4C02", "#662506")
d_shapes <- c(16, 2, 5) # none, every 5 years, every 3 years


#colnames(dt_plot)

pdf("TempFigs/orch_tradeoffs.pdf", height = 6, width = 7)


par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
layout(matrix(c(1, 2, 3, 4), nrow = 2, ncol = 2, byrow = T), widths = rep(1, 2), heights = rep(1, 2))
#layout.show(2)
par(mar=c(0, 1, 3.5, 1), oma = c(4.5, 4.5, 0.1, 0))


# 5 years, with reference reef supply
plot(x = 1, y = 1, col = NA, xlim = c(0, 100), ylim = c(0, 0.005), las = 1)
mtext(side = 3, "a) 5 years, with reference reef")
mtext(side = 1, expression("Coral cover on reef ("*m^2*")"), outer = T, line = 2.75, cex = 1.1)
mtext(side = 2, expression("Total ROI ("*m^2~"reef and orchard coral/$)"), outer = T, line = 2.75, cex = 1.1)
for(i in 1:3){ # for each disturbance type

  if(i == 1){
    dt_plot <- orch_D0_dt5 %>% filter(par2 == lambda_R)
  } else if(i == 2){
    dt_plot <- orch_D5_dt5 %>% filter(par2 == lambda_R)
  } else{
    dt_plot <- orch_D3_dt5 %>% filter(par2 == lambda_R)
  }

for(j in 1:length(prop_main)){
  
  dt_pt1 <- dt_plot %>% filter(prop_out == prop_main[j]) %>% summarize(mn = mean(reef_cover_mean), q05 = quantile(reef_cover_mean, 0.05), q95 = quantile(reef_cover_mean, 0.95))

dt_pt2 <- dt_plot %>% filter(prop_out == prop_main[j]) %>% summarize(mn = mean(tot_ROI_mean), q05 = quantile(tot_ROI_mean, 0.05), q95 = quantile(tot_ROI_mean, 0.95))
  
points(x = dt_pt1$mn, y = dt_pt2$mn, pch = d_shapes[i], col = prop_cols[j])
arrows(x0 = dt_pt1$mn, y0 = dt_pt2$q05, y1 = dt_pt2$q95, code = 3, angle = 90, length = 0.025, col = prop_cols[j])
arrows(x0 = dt_pt1$q05, y0 = dt_pt2$mn, x1 = dt_pt1$q95, code = 3, angle = 90, length = 0.025, col = prop_cols[j])
}
}


# 5 years, no reference reef supply
plot(x = 1, y = 1, col = NA, xlim = c(0, 100), ylim = c(0, 0.005), las = 1, yaxt = "n")
axis(side = 2, at = seq(0, 0.005, 0.001), labels = NA)
mtext(side = 3, "b) 5 years, no reference reef")
for(i in 1:3){ # for each disturbance type

  if(i == 1){
    dt_plot <- orch_D0_dt5 %>% filter(par2 == 0)
  } else if(i == 2){
    dt_plot <- orch_D5_dt5 %>% filter(par2 == 0)
  } else{
    dt_plot <- orch_D3_dt5 %>% filter(par2 == 0)
  }

for(j in 1:length(prop_main)){
  
  dt_pt1 <- dt_plot %>% filter(prop_out == prop_main[j]) %>% summarize(mn = mean(reef_cover_mean), q05 = quantile(reef_cover_mean, 0.05), q95 = quantile(reef_cover_mean, 0.95))

dt_pt2 <- dt_plot %>% filter(prop_out == prop_main[j]) %>% summarize(mn = mean(tot_ROI_mean), q05 = quantile(tot_ROI_mean, 0.05), q95 = quantile(tot_ROI_mean, 0.95))
  
points(x = dt_pt1$mn, y = dt_pt2$mn, pch = d_shapes[i], col = prop_cols[j])
arrows(x0 = dt_pt1$mn, y0 = dt_pt2$q05, y1 = dt_pt2$q95, code = 3, angle = 90, length = 0.025, col = prop_cols[j])
arrows(x0 = dt_pt1$q05, y0 = dt_pt2$mn, x1 = dt_pt1$q95, code = 3, angle = 90, length = 0.025, col = prop_cols[j])
}
}
legend("topright", legend = c("0.5", "0.9", "1"), col = prop_cols, pch = 16, title = "Reef investment", bty = "n")
legend("bottomright", legend = c("none", "every 3 yrs", "every 5 yrs"), pch = d_shapes, title = "Disturbance", bty = "n", inset = c(0, 0.2))


# 50 years, with reference reef supply
plot(x = 1, y = 1, col = NA, xlim = c(0, 2500), ylim = c(0, 0.001), las = 1)
mtext(side = 3, "c) 50 years, with reference reef")
for(i in 1:3){ # for each disturbance type

  if(i == 1){
    dt_plot <- orch_D0_dt50 %>% filter(par2 == lambda_R)
  } else if(i == 2){
    dt_plot <- orch_D5_dt50 %>% filter(par2 == lambda_R)
  } else{
    dt_plot <- orch_D3_dt50 %>% filter(par2 == lambda_R)
  }

for(j in 1:length(prop_main)){
  
  dt_pt1 <- dt_plot %>% filter(prop_out == prop_main[j]) %>% summarize(mn = mean(reef_cover_mean), q05 = quantile(reef_cover_mean, 0.05), q95 = quantile(reef_cover_mean, 0.95))

dt_pt2 <- dt_plot %>% filter(prop_out == prop_main[j]) %>% summarize(mn = mean(tot_ROI_mean), q05 = quantile(tot_ROI_mean, 0.05), q95 = quantile(tot_ROI_mean, 0.95))
  
points(x = dt_pt1$mn, y = dt_pt2$mn, pch = d_shapes[i], col = prop_cols[j])
arrows(x0 = dt_pt1$mn, y0 = dt_pt2$q05, y1 = dt_pt2$q95, code = 3, angle = 90, length = 0.025, col = prop_cols[j])
arrows(x0 = dt_pt1$q05, y0 = dt_pt2$mn, x1 = dt_pt1$q95, code = 3, angle = 90, length = 0.025, col = prop_cols[j])
}
}


# 5 years, no reference reef supply
plot(x = 1, y = 1, col = NA, xlim = c(0, 2500), ylim = c(0, 0.001), las = 1, yaxt = "n")
axis(side = 2, at = seq(0, 0.001, 0.0002), labels = NA)
mtext(side = 3, "d) 50 years, no reference reef")
for(i in 1:3){ # for each disturbance type

  if(i == 1){
    dt_plot <- orch_D0_dt50 %>% filter(par2 == 0)
  } else if(i == 2){
    dt_plot <- orch_D5_dt50 %>% filter(par2 == 0)
  } else{
    dt_plot <- orch_D3_dt50 %>% filter(par2 == 0)
  }

for(j in 1:length(prop_main)){
  
  dt_pt1 <- dt_plot %>% filter(prop_out == prop_main[j]) %>% summarize(mn = mean(reef_cover_mean), q05 = quantile(reef_cover_mean, 0.05), q95 = quantile(reef_cover_mean, 0.95))

dt_pt2 <- dt_plot %>% filter(prop_out == prop_main[j]) %>% summarize(mn = mean(tot_ROI_mean), q05 = quantile(tot_ROI_mean, 0.05), q95 = quantile(tot_ROI_mean, 0.95))
  
points(x = dt_pt1$mn, y = dt_pt2$mn, pch = d_shapes[i], col = prop_cols[j])
arrows(x0 = dt_pt1$mn, y0 = dt_pt2$q05, y1 = dt_pt2$q95, code = 3, angle = 90, length = 0.025, col = prop_cols[j])
arrows(x0 = dt_pt1$q05, y0 = dt_pt2$mn, x1 = dt_pt1$q95, code = 3, angle = 90, length = 0.025, col = prop_cols[j])
}
}

dev.off()
```

```{r, warning=FALSE}
prop_cols <- c("#FEC44F", "#CC4C02", "#662506")
d_shapes <- c(16, 2, 5) # none, every 5 years, every 3 years

pdf("TempFigs/orch_tradeoffs_main.pdf", height = 6, width = 7)


par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
layout(matrix(c(1, 2, 3, 4), nrow = 2, ncol = 2, byrow = T), widths = rep(1, 2), heights = rep(1, 2))
#layout.show(2)
par(mar=c(0, 1, 3.5, 1), oma = c(4.5, 4.5, 0.1, 0))


# 5 years, with reference reef supply
plot(x = 1, y = 1, col = NA, xlim = c(0, 100), ylim = c(0, 0.005), las = 1)
mtext(side = 3, "a) 5 years, with reference reef")
mtext(side = 1, expression("Coral cover on reef ("*m^2*")"), outer = T, line = 2.75, cex = 1.1)
mtext(side = 2, expression("Total ROI ("*m^2~"reef and orchard coral/$)"), outer = T, line = 2.75, cex = 1.1)
for(i in c(1,3)){ # for each disturbance type

  if(i == 1){
    dt_plot <- orch_D0_dt5 %>% filter(par2 == lambda_R)
  } else if(i == 2){
    dt_plot <- orch_D5_dt5 %>% filter(par2 == lambda_R)
  } else{
    dt_plot <- orch_D3_dt5 %>% filter(par2 == lambda_R)
  }

for(j in 1:length(prop_main)){
  
  dt_pt1 <- dt_plot %>% filter(prop_out == prop_main[j]) %>% summarize(mn = mean(reef_cover_mean), q05 = quantile(reef_cover_mean, 0.05), q95 = quantile(reef_cover_mean, 0.95))

dt_pt2 <- dt_plot %>% filter(prop_out == prop_main[j]) %>% summarize(mn = mean(tot_ROI_mean), q05 = quantile(tot_ROI_mean, 0.05), q95 = quantile(tot_ROI_mean, 0.95))
  
points(x = dt_pt1$mn, y = dt_pt2$mn, pch = d_shapes[i], col = prop_cols[j])
arrows(x0 = dt_pt1$mn, y0 = dt_pt2$q05, y1 = dt_pt2$q95, code = 3, angle = 90, length = 0.025, col = prop_cols[j])
arrows(x0 = dt_pt1$q05, y0 = dt_pt2$mn, x1 = dt_pt1$q95, code = 3, angle = 90, length = 0.025, col = prop_cols[j])
}
}
```

```{r, warning=FALSE}

prop_cols <- c("#FEC44F", "#CC4C02", "#662506")
d_shapes <- c(16, 2, 5) # none, every 5 years, every 3 years

pdf("TempFigs/orch_tradeoffs_ROI_ind.pdf", height = 6, width = 7)


par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
layout(matrix(c(1, 2, 3, 4), nrow = 2, ncol = 2, byrow = T), widths = rep(1, 2), heights = rep(1, 2))
#layout.show(2)
par(mar=c(0, 1, 3.5, 1), oma = c(4.5, 4.5, 0.1, 0))


# 5 years, with reference reef supply
plot(x = 1, y = 1, col = NA, xlim = c(0, 100), ylim = c(0, 0.25), las = 1)
mtext(side = 3, "a) 5 years, with reference reef")
mtext(side = 1, expression("Coral cover on reef ("*m^2*")"), outer = T, line = 2.75, cex = 1.1)
mtext(side = 2, "Total ROI (reef and orchard corals/$)", outer = T, line = 2.75, cex = 1.1)
for(i in c(1,3)){ # for each disturbance type

  if(i == 1){
    dt_plot <- orch_D0_dt5 %>% filter(par2 == lambda_R)
  } else if(i == 2){
    dt_plot <- orch_D5_dt5 %>% filter(par2 == lambda_R)
  } else{
    dt_plot <- orch_D3_dt5 %>% filter(par2 == lambda_R)
  }

for(j in 1:length(prop_main)){
  
  dt_pt1 <- dt_plot %>% filter(prop_out == prop_main[j]) %>% summarize(mn = mean(reef_cover_mean), q05 = quantile(reef_cover_mean, 0.05), q95 = quantile(reef_cover_mean, 0.95))

dt_pt2 <- dt_plot %>% filter(prop_out == prop_main[j]) %>% summarize(mn = mean(totI_ROI_mean), q05 = quantile(totI_ROI_mean, 0.05), q95 = quantile(totI_ROI_mean, 0.95))
  
points(x = dt_pt1$mn, y = dt_pt2$mn, pch = d_shapes[i], col = prop_cols[j])
arrows(x0 = dt_pt1$mn, y0 = dt_pt2$q05, y1 = dt_pt2$q95, code = 3, angle = 90, length = 0.025, col = prop_cols[j])
arrows(x0 = dt_pt1$q05, y0 = dt_pt2$mn, x1 = dt_pt1$q95, code = 3, angle = 90, length = 0.025, col = prop_cols[j])
}
}

for(i in c(1,3)){ # for each disturbance type

  if(i == 1){

  } else if(i == 2){
```

petal plots

```{r}
# make a function for making the OHI-type plots

#' OHI-style radar plot
#' Creates a radar (spider) plot showing normalized performance metrics for
#' each orchard-to-reef allocation proportion. Highlights the optimal proportion.
petal_fun <- function(dt_plot, prop_choice){
  
metric_cols <- c("#4477AA", "#AA3377", "#66CCEE", "#CCBB44","#EE6677", "#228833") # coral cover on reef, orchard function, reef ROI, total ROI, total costs, recruits outplanted to reef

Lcol <- "gray"
lab_cex <- 0.9

#ref_vals <- dt_plot %>% filter(prop_out == 0.9) %>% rename(prop_out_ref = prop_out, reef_cover_ref = reef_cover_mean, orch_function_ref = orch_function_mean, reef_ROI_ref = reef_ROI_mean, tot_ROI_ref = tot_ROI_mean, tot_costs_ref = tot_costs, recruits_out_ref = reef_recruits_out_tot) %>% select(prop_out_ref, reef_cover_ref, orch_function_ref, reef_ROI_ref, tot_ROI_ref, tot_costs_ref, recruits_out_ref, par_rep, par2)

#View(dt_plot)
  
#dt_plot2 <- dt_plot %>% filter(prop_out == prop_choice) %>% left_join(ref_vals, by = c("par_rep", "par2"))

dt_plot2 <- dt_plot %>% filter(prop_out == prop_choice)

  
par(pty = "s")
r_in <- 0.5
r_out0 <- r_in + 1
test_x <- seq(from = -r_in, to = r_in, length.out = 100)
plot(x = 1, y = 1, col = NA, xlim = c(-5, 5), ylim = c(-5, 5), asp = 1, las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA, xaxt = "n", yaxt = "n", bty = "n") # , xaxs = "i", yaxs = "i"
polygon(x = c(test_x, rev(test_x)), y = c(sqrt((r_in)^2 - test_x^2), rev(-1*sqrt(r_in^2 - test_x^2))), border = Lcol) # , col = "gray"
test_x <- seq(from = -r_out0, to = r_out0, length.out = 100)
polygon(x = c(test_x, rev(test_x)), y = c(sqrt((r_out0)^2 - test_x^2), rev(-1*sqrt(r_out0^2 - test_x^2))), border = Lcol)
#text(x = 0, y = 0, paste(as.character(round(opt_prop1*100,0)), "%", sep = ""))
#text(x = 0, y = 0, paste(as.character(prop_choice), as.character(0.9), sep = "/")) 
text(x = 0, y = 0, as.character(prop_choice)) 

# add background lines
th1_set <- seq(from = 0, to = 300, by = 60)
th2_set <- seq(from = 60, to = 360, by = 60)
for(i in 1:6){
  r_in_x <- seq(from = r_in*cos(th1_set[i]*pi/180), to = r_in*cos(th2_set[i]*pi/180), length.out = 100)
r_out_x <- seq(from = r_out0*cos(th1_set[i]*pi/180), to = r_out0*cos(th2_set[i]*pi/180), length.out = 100)

if(i < 4){
  polygon(x = c(r_in_x, rev(r_out_x)), y = c(sqrt(r_in^2 - r_in_x^2), rev(sqrt(r_out0^2 - r_out_x^2))), border = Lcol)
} else{
  polygon(x = c(r_in_x, rev(r_out_x)), y = c(-sqrt(r_in^2 - r_in_x^2), rev(-sqrt(r_out0^2 - r_out_x^2))), border = Lcol)
}

}

# value to plot: on average, how far was each metric from it's max possible value for that parameter set? (outer ring is one); actual value to show in text is the average of the raw values at the proportion outplanted?

# coral cover
r_out <- mean(dt_plot2$reef_cover_mean/max(dt_plot$reef_cover_mean)) + r_in
th1 <- 0 # starting angle (in degrees)
th2 <- 60 # ending angle (in degrees)
r_in_x <- seq(from = r_in*cos(th1*pi/180), to = r_in*cos(th2*pi/180), length.out = 100)
r_out_x <- seq(from = r_out*cos(th1*pi/180), to = r_out*cos(th2*pi/180), length.out = 100)
polygon(x = c(r_in_x, rev(r_out_x)), y = c(sqrt(r_in^2 - r_in_x^2), rev(sqrt(r_out^2 - r_out_x^2))), col = metric_cols[1], border = NA)
# if(r_out == r_in){ # if r_out is equal to r_in (metric was zero), add a line with the color of this performance metric at zero
#   lines(x = r_in_x, y = sqrt(r_in^2 - r_in_x^2), col = metric_cols[1])
# }
#labs1 <- as.character(round(mean(dt_plot2$reef_cover_mean), 0))
#labs1 <- ifelse(labs1 == "0", as.character(round(mean(dt_plot2$reef_cover_mean), 3)), labs1)
#text(x = 1.3*r_out0*cos((th1 + th2)/2*pi/180), y =1.3*r_out0*sin((th1 + th2)/2*pi/180), bquote(.(labs1)~m^2), cex = lab_cex)


# orchard function
r_out <- mean(dt_plot2$orch_function_mean/max(dt_plot$orch_function_mean)) + r_in
th1 <- 60 # starting angle (in degrees)
th2 <- 120 # ending angle (in degrees)
r_in_x <- seq(from = r_in*cos(th1*pi/180), to = r_in*cos(th2*pi/180), length.out = 100)
r_out_x <- seq(from = r_out*cos(th1*pi/180), to = r_out*cos(th2*pi/180), length.out = 100)
polygon(x = c(r_in_x, rev(r_out_x)), y = c(sqrt(r_in^2 - r_in_x^2), rev(sqrt(r_out^2 - r_out_x^2))), col = metric_cols[2], border = NA)
# if(r_out == r_in){ # if r_out is equal to r_in (metric was zero), add a line with the color of this performance metric at zero
#   lines(x = r_in_x, y = sqrt(r_in^2 - r_in_x^2), col = metric_cols[2])
# }
#labs1 <- as.character(round(mean(dt_plot2$orch_function_mean), 0))
#text(x = 0, y =1.15*r_out0*sin((th1 + th2)/2*pi/180), bquote(.(labs1)~m^2), cex = lab_cex)

# reef ROI
r_out <- mean(dt_plot2$reef_ROI_mean/max(dt_plot$reef_ROI_mean)) + r_in
th1 <- 120 # starting angle (in degrees)
th2 <- 180 # ending angle (in degrees)
r_in_x <- seq(from = r_in*cos(th1*pi/180), to = r_in*cos(th2*pi/180), length.out = 100)
r_out_x <- seq(from = r_out*cos(th1*pi/180), to = r_out*cos(th2*pi/180), length.out = 100)
polygon(x = c(r_in_x, rev(r_out_x)), y = c(sqrt(r_in^2 - r_in_x^2), rev(sqrt(r_out^2 - r_out_x^2))), col = metric_cols[3], border = NA)
# if(r_out == r_in){ # if r_out is equal to r_in (metric was zero), add a line with the color of this performance metric at zero
#   lines(x = r_in_x, y = sqrt(r_in^2 - r_in_x^2), col = metric_cols[3])
# }
#labs1 <- as.character(round(mean(dt_plot2$reef_ROI_mean), 5))
#labs1 <- ifelse(labs1 == "0", as.character(round(mean(dt_plot2$reef_ROI_mean), 7)), labs1)
#text(x = 1.5*r_out0*cos((th1 + th2)/2*pi/180), y =1.5*r_out0*sin((th1 + th2)/2*pi/180), bquote(.(labs1)~m^2*"/$"), cex = lab_cex)

# past 180: need to switch to negative square root
# tot ROI
r_out <- mean(dt_plot2$tot_ROI_mean/max(dt_plot$tot_ROI_mean)) + r_in
th1 <- 180 # starting angle (in degrees)
th2 <- 240 # ending angle (in degrees)
r_in_x <- seq(from = r_in*cos(th1*pi/180), to = r_in*cos(th2*pi/180), length.out = 100)
r_out_x <- seq(from = r_out*cos(th1*pi/180), to = r_out*cos(th2*pi/180), length.out = 100)
polygon(x = c(r_in_x, rev(r_out_x)), y = c(-sqrt(r_in^2 - r_in_x^2), rev(-sqrt(r_out^2 - r_out_x^2))), col = metric_cols[4], border = NA)
# if(r_out == r_in){ # if r_out is equal to r_in (metric was zero), add a line with the color of this performance metric at zero
#   lines(x = r_in_x, y = -sqrt(r_in^2 - r_in_x^2), col = metric_cols[4])
# }
#labs1 <- as.character(round(mean(dt_plot2$tot_ROI_mean), 4))
#text(x = 1.5*r_out0*cos((th1 + th2)/2*pi/180), y =1.5*r_out0*sin((th1 + th2)/2*pi/180), bquote(.(labs1)~m^2*"/$"), cex = lab_cex)


# tot costs saved
# r_out <- 1- (mean(dt_plot2$tot_costs/dt_plot2$tot_costs_min))^(-1) + r_in
r_out <- mean(dt_plot2$tot_costs/max(dt_plot$tot_costs)) + r_in
th1 <- 240 # starting angle (in degrees)
th2 <- 300 # ending angle (in degrees)
r_in_x <- seq(from = r_in*cos(th1*pi/180), to = r_in*cos(th2*pi/180), length.out = 100)
r_out_x <- seq(from = r_out*cos(th1*pi/180), to = r_out*cos(th2*pi/180), length.out = 100)
polygon(x = c(r_in_x, rev(r_out_x)), y = c(-sqrt(r_in^2 - r_in_x^2), rev(-sqrt(r_out^2 - r_out_x^2))), col = metric_cols[5], border = NA)
# if(r_out == r_in){ # if r_out is equal to r_in (metric was zero), add a line with the color of this performance metric at zero
#   lines(x = r_in_x, y = -sqrt(r_in^2 - r_in_x^2), col = metric_cols[5])
# }
#labs1 <- as.character(round(mean(dt_plot2$tot_costs), 0))
#text(x = 0, y =1.15*r_out0*sin((th1 + th2)/2*pi/180), bquote("$"*.(labs1)), cex = lab_cex)


# recruits outplanted to reef
r_out <- mean(dt_plot2$reef_recruits_out_tot/max(dt_plot$reef_recruits_out_tot)) + r_in
th1 <- 300 # starting angle (in degrees)
th2 <- 360 # ending angle (in degrees)
r_in_x <- seq(from = r_in*cos(th1*pi/180), to = r_in*cos(th2*pi/180), length.out = 100)
r_out_x <- seq(from = r_out*cos(th1*pi/180), to = r_out*cos(th2*pi/180), length.out = 100)
polygon(x = c(r_in_x, rev(r_out_x)), y = c(-sqrt(r_in^2 - r_in_x^2), rev(-sqrt(r_out^2 - r_out_x^2))), col = metric_cols[6], border = NA)
# if(r_out == r_in){ # if r_out is equal to r_in (metric was zero), add a line with the color of this performance metric at zero
#   lines(x = r_in_x, y = -sqrt(r_in^2 - r_in_x^2), col = metric_cols[6])
# }
#labs1 <- as.character(round(mean(dt_plot2$reef_recruits_out_tot), 0))
#text(x = 1.4*r_out0*cos((th1 + th2)/2*pi/180), y =1.4*r_out0*sin((th1 + th2)/2*pi/180), bquote(.(labs1)), cex = lab_cex)

}

```

```{r}
# make a legend
metric_cols <- c("#4477AA", "#AA3377", "#66CCEE", "#CCBB44","#EE6677", "#228833") # coral cover on reef, orchard function, reef ROI, total ROI, total costs, recruits outplanted to reef

pdf("TempFigs/petal_legend.pdf", height = 7, width = 7)
plot(x = 1, y = 1, col = NA, xlab = NA, ylab = NA, xaxt = "n", yaxt = "n", bty = "n")#, bty = "n"
legend("topleft", legend = c(expression("Reef coral cover ("*m^2*")"), expression("Orchard function ("*m^2*" adults)"), expression("Reef ROI ("*m^2~"reef coral/$)"), "Total ROI ("*m^2~"coral/$)", "Total costs ($)", "Reef recruits outplanted"), fill = metric_cols, bty = "n")
dev.off()

```


## SM simulations

# lab and transplanting


need to make another function that includes iterations over lab survival, lab growth, or transplant survival



## main simulations


```{r, warning = F}

# parameter sets
L_HM <- 15 # number of parameter values for each axis of heatmaps

# for lab grow out:
# post-outplanting survival of recruits kept in lab for a year
LS_set <- seq(from = 0, to = 1, length.out = L_HM) 
# growth of recruits kept in lab for a year
LG_set <- seq(from = 0, to = 1, length.out = L_HM) 

# for orchard transplanting:
# post-transplanting survival of orchard colonies moved to reef
TS_set <- seq(from = 0, to = 1, length.out = L_HM) 
# growth of size class 1 colonies in orchard
TG_set <- seq(from = 0, to = 1, length.out = L_HM) 

# lab simulations: update lab_retain_max
rest_pars$lab_retain_max <- 0.5*lab_max

# just use mean parameters for heatmaps
labG_hm_D0 <- lab_trans_fun1(dem_pars = all_pars, growth_set = LG_set, surv_set = LS_set, out_par_type = "lab_growth", par_set2 = NULL, par2_name = "none", dist = F, dist_yrs = NULL, dist_pars_list = NULL)

labG_hm_D3 <- lab_trans_fun1(dem_pars = all_pars, growth_set = LG_set, surv_set = LS_set, out_par_type = "lab_growth", par_set2 = NULL, par2_name = "none", dist = T, dist_yrs = dist_yrs3, dist_pars_list = dist_pars_list3)

# labG_D0 <- lab_trans_fun2(dem_pars_all = all_pars_R, n_pars = n_sample1, growth_set = LG_set, surv_set = LS_set, out_par_type = "lab_growth", par_set2 = NULL, par2_name = "none", dist = F, dist_yrs = NULL, dist_pars_list = NULL)

rest_pars$lab_retain_max <- 0 # reset lab_retain_max


# transplanting simulations: update the transplanting parameters
rest_pars$transplant <- rep(1, years) # years in which corals get transplanted from the orchard

trans_hm_D0 <- lab_trans_fun1(dem_pars = all_pars, growth_set = TG_set, surv_set = TS_set, out_par_type = "orch_trans", par_set2 = NULL, par2_name = "none", dist = F, dist_yrs = NULL, dist_pars_list = NULL)

trans_hm_D3 <- lab_trans_fun1(dem_pars = all_pars, growth_set = TG_set, surv_set = TS_set, out_par_type = "orch_trans", par_set2 = NULL, par2_name = "none", dist = T, dist_yrs = dist_yrs3, dist_pars_list = dist_pars_list3)

#trans_D0 <- lab_trans_fun2(dem_pars_all = all_pars_R, n_pars = n_sample1, growth_set = TG_set, surv_set = TS_set, out_par_type = "orch_trans", par_set2 = NULL, par2_name = "none", dist = F, dist_yrs = NULL, dist_pars_list = NULL)

# reset transplanting parameters
rest_pars$transplant <- rep(0, years)


# get the reference values
orch_D0_ref5 <- orch_D0_mn_dt5 %>% filter(prop_out == 0.9, par2 == lambda_Rs[2]) %>% select(par_rep, reef_cover_mean, tot_ROI_mean,totI_ROI_mean) %>% rename(reef_cover_ref = reef_cover_mean, tot_ROI_ref = tot_ROI_mean, totI_ROI_ref = totI_ROI_mean)

orch_D0_ref50 <- orch_D0_mn_dt50 %>% filter(prop_out == 0.9, par2 == lambda_Rs[2]) %>% select(par_rep, reef_cover_mean, tot_ROI_mean,totI_ROI_mean) %>% rename(reef_cover_ref = reef_cover_mean, tot_ROI_ref = tot_ROI_mean, totI_ROI_ref = totI_ROI_mean)

orch_D3_ref5 <- orch_D3_mn_dt5 %>% filter(prop_out == 0.9, par2 == lambda_Rs[2]) %>% select(par_rep, reef_cover_mean, tot_ROI_mean,totI_ROI_mean) %>% rename(reef_cover_ref = reef_cover_mean, tot_ROI_ref = tot_ROI_mean, totI_ROI_ref = totI_ROI_mean)

orch_D3_ref50 <- orch_D3_mn_dt50 %>% filter(prop_out == 0.9, par2 == lambda_Rs[2]) %>% select(par_rep, reef_cover_mean, tot_ROI_mean,totI_ROI_mean) %>% rename(reef_cover_ref = reef_cover_mean, tot_ROI_ref = tot_ROI_mean, totI_ROI_ref = totI_ROI_mean)

#View(orch_D0_mn_dt5)

#orch_D0_ref5 <- orch_D0_dt5 %>% filter(prop_out == 0.9, par2 == lambda_Rs[2]) %>% select(par_rep, reef_cover_mean, tot_ROI_mean) %>% rename(reef_cover_ref = reef_cover_mean, tot_ROI_ref = tot_ROI_mean)

#orch_D0_ref50 <- orch_D0_dt50 %>% filter(prop_out == 0.9, par2 == lambda_Rs[2]) %>% select(par_rep, reef_cover_mean, tot_ROI_mean) %>% rename(reef_cover_ref = reef_cover_mean, tot_ROI_ref = tot_ROI_mean)

# make the data frames

labG_D0_dt5 <- full_dt_fun2(sim_list = labG_hm_D0, max_yr = 6, n_pars = 1, growth_set = LG_set, surv_set = LS_set, out_par_type = "lab_growth", par_set2 = NA, par2_name = "none") %>% left_join(orch_D0_ref5)

labG_D0_dt50 <- full_dt_fun2(sim_list = labG_hm_D0, max_yr = 51, n_pars = 1, growth_set = LG_set, surv_set = LS_set, out_par_type = "lab_growth", par_set2 = NA, par2_name = "none")  %>% left_join(orch_D0_ref50)

labG_D3_dt5 <- full_dt_fun2(sim_list = labG_hm_D3, max_yr = 6, n_pars = 1, growth_set = LG_set, surv_set = LS_set, out_par_type = "lab_growth", par_set2 = NA, par2_name = "none") %>% left_join(orch_D3_ref5)

labG_D3_dt50 <- full_dt_fun2(sim_list = labG_hm_D3, max_yr = 51, n_pars = 1, growth_set = LG_set, surv_set = LS_set, out_par_type = "lab_growth", par_set2 = NA, par2_name = "none")  %>% left_join(orch_D3_ref50)

# repeat for transplanting
trans_D0_dt5 <- full_dt_fun2(sim_list = trans_hm_D0, max_yr = 6, n_pars = 1, growth_set = TG_set, surv_set = TS_set, out_par_type = "orch_trans", par_set2 = NA, par2_name = "none") %>% left_join(orch_D0_ref5)

trans_D0_dt50 <- full_dt_fun2(sim_list = trans_hm_D0, max_yr = 51, n_pars = 1, growth_set = TG_set, surv_set = TS_set, out_par_type = "orch_trans", par_set2 = NA, par2_name = "none")  %>% left_join(orch_D0_ref50)

trans_D3_dt5 <- full_dt_fun2(sim_list = trans_hm_D3, max_yr = 6, n_pars = 1, growth_set = TG_set, surv_set = TS_set, out_par_type = "orch_trans", par_set2 = NA, par2_name = "none") %>% left_join(orch_D3_ref5)

trans_D3_dt50 <- full_dt_fun2(sim_list = trans_hm_D3, max_yr = 51, n_pars = 1, growth_set = TG_set, surv_set = TS_set, out_par_type = "orch_trans", par_set2 = NA, par2_name = "none")  %>% left_join(orch_D3_ref50)


#labG_D0_dt5 <- full_dt_fun2(sim_list = labG_hm_D0, max_yr = 6, n_pars = 1, growth_set = LG_set, surv_set = LS_set, out_par_type = "lab_growth", par_set2 = NA, par2_name = "none") %>% left_join(orch_D0_ref5, by = c("par_rep"))

#trans_D0_dt5 <- full_dt_fun2(sim_list = trans_D0, max_yr = 6, n_pars = n_sample1, out_set = TS_set, out_par_type = "trans_surv", par_set2 = NA, par2_name = "none") %>% left_join(orch_D0_ref5, by = c("par_rep"))


```


plot heatmaps

```{r}
#View(trans_D0_dt50)

#View(labG_D0_dt50)



# reef_cover_ref = reef_cover_mean, tot_ROI_ref = tot_ROI_mean, totI_ROI_ref = totI_ROI_mean

#View(dt_plot)

xset <- LG_set
yset <- LS_set

hm_fun <- function(dt_plot, xset, yset, max_val){
  
  # color palette
  nHalf <- 100
rc1 <- colorRampPalette(colors = c("#2166AC","#F7F7F7", "#B2182B"), space = "Lab")(nHalf)
rampcols1 <- c(rc1) # all the colors

rampcolsL <- rampcols1[1:(nHalf/2)]
rampcolsU <- rampcols1[(nHalf/2):nHalf]

#col_vals <- seq(from = 0, to = 20, length.out = nHalf)

col_valsL <- seq(from = 0, to = 1, length.out = nHalf/2)
col_valsU <- seq(from = 1, to = max_val, length.out = nHalf/2)

  
  L_HM <- length(LG_set)
  
  par(pty = "s")
plot(x = xset*L_HM, y = yset*L_HM, col = NA, xlim = c(0, L_HM), ylim = c(0, L_HM), asp = 1, las = 1, xaxs = "i", yaxs = "i", xlab = NA, ylab = NA, xaxt = "n", yaxt = "n") # xaxs = "i" removes white space around the plot
#axis(side = 1, at = seq(0.5, L_HM - 0.5, 1), tick = F, line = -0.5, labels = seq(0.5, L_HM - 0.5, 1)/L_HM, cex.axis = 0.8)
axis(side = 1, at = seq(0, L_HM, 3), tick = F, line = -0.5, labels = round(seq(0, L_HM, 3)/L_HM, 2), cex.axis = 0.8, padj = -1)
axis(side = 2, at = seq(0, L_HM, 3), tick = F, line = -0.5, labels = round(seq(0, L_HM, 3)/L_HM, 2), cex.axis = 0.8, las = 1)
mtext(side = 1, "Growth to size class 2", line = 1)
mtext(side = 2, "Survival rate of \nsize class 2 outplants", line = 1.5)
for(i in 1:L_HM){ # x value
  for(j in 1:L_HM){ # y value
    
    # get point to plot
    plot_pt <- dt_plot$reef_cover_prop[which(dt_plot$growth_par==xset[i] & dt_plot$surv_par == yset[j])]
    
    # get closest color
    if(plot_pt < 1){
      index_ij <- which(abs(plot_pt-col_valsL) == min(abs(plot_pt-col_valsL)))
      
      polygon(x = c(i-1, i, i, i-1), y = c(j-1, j-1, j, j), col = rampcolsL[index_ij], border = NA) 
    
    } else{
      index_ij <- which(abs(plot_pt-col_valsU) == min(abs(plot_pt-col_valsU)))
      
      polygon(x = c(i-1, i, i, i-1), y = c(j-1, j-1, j, j), col = rampcolsU[index_ij], border = NA) 
    }
    
  }
}

}




```


```{r}
# heatmaps: no disturbance

dt_plot <- labG_D0_dt5 %>% mutate(reef_cover_prop = reef_cover_mean/reef_cover_ref, tot_ROI_prop = tot_ROI_mean/tot_ROI_ref, totI_ROI_prop = totI_ROI_mean/totI_ROI_ref) %>% select(growth_par, surv_par, reef_cover_prop, tot_ROI_prop, totI_ROI_prop)

hm_fun(dt_plot, xset = LG_set, yset = LS_set, max_val = ceiling(max(dt_plot$reef_cover_prop)))

dt_plot <- trans_D0_dt5 %>% mutate(reef_cover_prop = reef_cover_mean/reef_cover_ref, tot_ROI_prop = tot_ROI_mean/tot_ROI_ref, totI_ROI_prop = totI_ROI_mean/totI_ROI_ref) %>% select(growth_par, surv_par, reef_cover_prop, tot_ROI_prop, totI_ROI_prop)

#max(dt_plot$reef_cover_prop)

hm_fun(dt_plot, xset = TG_set, yset = TS_set, max_val = ceiling(max(dt_plot$reef_cover_prop)))


dt_plot <- labG_D0_dt50 %>% mutate(reef_cover_prop = reef_cover_mean/reef_cover_ref, tot_ROI_prop = tot_ROI_mean/tot_ROI_ref, totI_ROI_prop = totI_ROI_mean/totI_ROI_ref) %>% select(growth_par, surv_par, reef_cover_prop, tot_ROI_prop, totI_ROI_prop)

#max(dt_plot$reef_cover_prop)

hm_fun(dt_plot, xset = LG_set, yset = LS_set, max_val = ceiling(max(dt_plot$reef_cover_prop)))

dt_plot <- trans_D0_dt50 %>% mutate(reef_cover_prop = reef_cover_mean/reef_cover_ref, tot_ROI_prop = tot_ROI_mean/tot_ROI_ref, totI_ROI_prop = totI_ROI_mean/totI_ROI_ref) %>% select(growth_par, surv_par, reef_cover_prop, tot_ROI_prop, totI_ROI_prop)

#max(dt_plot$reef_cover_prop)

hm_fun(dt_plot, xset = TG_set, yset = TS_set, max_val = ceiling(max(dt_plot$reef_cover_prop)))

```


```{r}
# heatmaps: with disturbance

dt_plot <- labG_D3_dt5 %>% mutate(reef_cover_prop = reef_cover_mean/reef_cover_ref, tot_ROI_prop = tot_ROI_mean/tot_ROI_ref, totI_ROI_prop = totI_ROI_mean/totI_ROI_ref) %>% select(growth_par, surv_par, reef_cover_prop, tot_ROI_prop, totI_ROI_prop)

hm_fun(dt_plot, xset = LG_set, yset = LS_set, max_val = ceiling(max(dt_plot$reef_cover_prop)))

# make the legend
xl <- 1
yb <- 1
xr <- 1.25
yt <- 2

plot(NA, type = "n", ann = F, xlim = c(1, 2), ylim = c(1, 2), xaxt = "n", yaxt = "n", bty = "n")
text(x = 1.27, y = 1, "0")
text(x = 1.27, y = 1.5, "1")
text(x = 1.27, y = 2, as.character(ceiling(max(dt_plot$reef_cover_prop))))
rect(
  xl,
  head(seq(yb, yt, (yt-yb)/nHalf), -1), # the denominator needs to match the length of the color vector
  xr,
  tail(seq(yb, yt, (yt - yb)/nHalf), -1),
  col = rampcols1,
  border = NA
)


dt_plot <- trans_D3_dt5 %>% mutate(reef_cover_prop = reef_cover_mean/reef_cover_ref, tot_ROI_prop = tot_ROI_mean/tot_ROI_ref, totI_ROI_prop = totI_ROI_mean/totI_ROI_ref) %>% select(growth_par, surv_par, reef_cover_prop, tot_ROI_prop, totI_ROI_prop)

#max(dt_plot$reef_cover_prop)

hm_fun(dt_plot, xset = TG_set, yset = TS_set, max_val = ceiling(max(dt_plot$reef_cover_prop)))


dt_plot <- labG_D3_dt50 %>% mutate(reef_cover_prop = reef_cover_mean/reef_cover_ref, tot_ROI_prop = tot_ROI_mean/tot_ROI_ref, totI_ROI_prop = totI_ROI_mean/totI_ROI_ref) %>% select(growth_par, surv_par, reef_cover_prop, tot_ROI_prop, totI_ROI_prop)

#max(dt_plot$reef_cover_prop)

hm_fun(dt_plot, xset = LG_set, yset = LS_set, max_val = ceiling(max(dt_plot$reef_cover_prop)))

dt_plot <- trans_D3_dt50 %>% mutate(reef_cover_prop = reef_cover_mean/reef_cover_ref, tot_ROI_prop = tot_ROI_mean/tot_ROI_ref, totI_ROI_prop = totI_ROI_mean/totI_ROI_ref) %>% select(growth_par, surv_par, reef_cover_prop, tot_ROI_prop, totI_ROI_prop)

#max(dt_plot$reef_cover_prop)

hm_fun(dt_plot, xset = TG_set, yset = TS_set, max_val = ceiling(max(dt_plot$reef_cover_prop)))

```


Fixed annual budget, three types of simulations:
1) default size class 1 outplanting
2) size class 2 outplanting with same lab size as 1)
3) size class 1 outplanting with same budget as 2)


Simulation steps (focus on 5 years for now):
-- run the size class 1 outplanting simulations with default lab parameters (already have these from orchard investment simulations; just use 0.9 outplanting)
-- decide on default size class 2 outplanting parameters (growth/survival rates -- for now just use same as field/orchard values)
-- run the size class 2 outplanting simulations with default lab capacity
-- for each parameter set: go through and calculate the difference in total costs between the size class 1 and size class 2 scenarios, and then based on those total costs determine the increase in lab capacity (lab substrates) needed to get approximately the same annual budget

NOTE: will need to calculate costs each year... but that would mean max number of substrates would potentially vary each year, so maybe it's easiest to just use average costs (and divide by number of years to get annual budgets) and check final budgets for consistency?

UPDATE: changed functions to output costs per year so can use that to estimate max number of additional substrates possible

```{r}

#orch_D0 <- orch_exp_fun2(dem_pars_all = all_pars_R, n_pars = n_sample1, prop_set = prop_main, par_set2 = lambda_Rs, par2_name = "lambda_R", dist = F, dist_yrs = NULL, dist_pars_list = NULL)


lab_trans_fun2(dem_pars_all, n_pars = n_sample1, growth_set, surv_set, out_par_type, par_set2 = NULL, par2_name = "none", dist = F, dist_yrs = NULL, dist_pars_list = NULL)
```

```{r}
# plot change from default (90% orchard investment with external recruitment) for each parameter combination


# need to get average differences across parameter values

#View(labS_D0_dt5)

kcols <- c("#77AADD", "#AAAA00", "#EE8866")

pdf("TempFigs/lab_trans_0.pdf", height = 6, width = 5)


par(mfrow = c(2, 1))
layout(matrix(c(1, 2), nrow = 2, ncol = 1, byrow = T), widths = rep(1, 2), heights = rep(1, 2))
#layout.show(2)
par(mar=c(0, 2.5, 1.5, 1), oma = c(4.5, 2.5, 0.1, 0))


dt_plot <- labS_D0_dt5
pars_plot <- LS_set

plot(x = pars_plot, y = rep(1, length(pars_plot)), col = NA, ylim = c(-20, 500), las = 1, xaxt = "n")
axis(side = 1, at = seq(0, 1, 0.2), labels = NA)
mtext(side = 3, "a) 5 years", adj = 0.025, line = -1)
mtext(side = 1, "Survival or growth", line = 2.25, outer = T)
mtext(side = 2, expression("Change in reef cover ("*m^2*")"), line = 1, outer = T)
abline(h = 0, col = "gray")
legend("topleft", legend = c("Lab outplant survival", "Lab growth", "Transplant survival"), pch = 16, col = kcols, inset = c(0, 0.2), cex = 0.9, bty = "n")
for(j in 1:length(pars_plot)){
  
  dt_pt1 <- dt_plot %>% filter(out_par == pars_plot[j]) %>% summarize(mn = mean(reef_cover_mean - reef_cover_ref), q05 = quantile(reef_cover_mean - reef_cover_ref, 0.05), q95 = quantile(reef_cover_mean - reef_cover_ref, 0.95))
  
points(x = pars_plot[j], y = dt_pt1$mn, pch = 16, col = kcols[1])
arrows(x0 = pars_plot[j], y0 = dt_pt1$q05, y1 = dt_pt1$q95, code = 3, angle = 90, length = 0.025, col = kcols[1]) # , col = prop_cols[j]
}

dt_plot <- labG_D0_dt5
pars_plot <- LG_set
for(j in 1:length(pars_plot)){
dt_pt1 <- dt_plot %>% filter(out_par == pars_plot[j]) %>% summarize(mn = mean(reef_cover_mean - reef_cover_ref), q05 = quantile(reef_cover_mean - reef_cover_ref, 0.05), q95 = quantile(reef_cover_mean - reef_cover_ref, 0.95))
  
points(x = pars_plot[j], y = dt_pt1$mn, pch = 16, col = kcols[2])
arrows(x0 = pars_plot[j], y0 = dt_pt1$q05, y1 = dt_pt1$q95, code = 3, angle = 90, length = 0.025, col = kcols[2]) 
}

dt_plot <- trans_D0_dt5
pars_plot <- TS_set

arrows(x0 = pars_plot[j], y0 = dt_pt1$q05, y1 = dt_pt1$q95, code = 3, angle = 90, length = 0.025, col = kcols[3]) 

}
```

```{r}
pars_plot <- LS_set

plot(x = 1, y = 1, col = NA, xlim = c(-20, 400), ylim = c(-0.0001, 0.0015), las = 1)
mtext(side = 3, "a) 5 yrs, lab outplant survival")
mtext(side = 1, expression("Change in reef cover ("*m^2*")"), line = 3, outer = T)
mtext(side = 2, expression("Change total ROI ("*m^2~"reef and orchard coral/$)"), line = 2.5, outer = T)
abline(h = 0, col = "gray")
abline(v = 0, col = "gray")
legend("top", legend = as.character(round(LS_set, 2)), fill = rampcols1, cex = 0.6, title = "Survival", bty = "n")
legend("topright", legend = as.character(round(LG_set, 2)), fill = rampcols2, cex = 0.6, title = "Growth", bty = "n", inset = c(0.1, 0))
for(j in 1:length(pars_plot)){
  
  dt_pt1 <- dt_plot %>% filter(out_par == pars_plot[j]) %>% summarize(mn = mean(reef_cover_mean - reef_cover_ref), q05 = quantile(reef_cover_mean - reef_cover_ref, 0.05), q95 = quantile(reef_cover_mean - reef_cover_ref, 0.95))
  
  dt_pt2 <- dt_plot %>% filter(out_par == pars_plot[j]) %>% summarize(mn = mean(tot_ROI_mean - tot_ROI_ref), q05 = quantile(tot_ROI_mean - tot_ROI_ref, 0.05), q95 = quantile(tot_ROI_mean - tot_ROI_ref, 0.95))
  
points(x = dt_pt1$mn, y = dt_pt2$mn, pch = 16, col = rampcols1[j])
arrows(x0 = dt_pt1$mn, y0 = dt_pt2$q05, y1 = dt_pt2$q95, code = 3, angle = 90, length = 0.025, col = rampcols1[j])
arrows(x0 = dt_pt1$q05, y0 = dt_pt2$mn, x1 = dt_pt1$q95, code = 3, angle = 90, length = 0.025, col = rampcols1[j])
}


dt_plot <- labG_D0_dt5
pars_plot <- LG_set
plot(x = 1, y = 1, col = NA, xlim = c(-20, 400), ylim = c(-0.0001, 0.0015), las = 1, yaxt = "n")
```

# orchard expansion

What proportion of substrates should be outplanted to the orchard vs. reef?
-- How long does it take for initial investment in orchard to pay off for reef restoration outcomes?
-- What is the cost of investing in the orchard to short-term restoration goals on the reef?


## set up defaults

```{r}

years <- 51 # number of years in simulation
n <- 5 # number of size classes

# define size class boundaries
# SIZE CLASS BOUNDARIES (cm^2 planar colony area)
# These follow Vardi (2011/2012), with Vardi's original SC1 (0-100) split into
# SC1 (0-10, recruits/settlers) and SC2 (10-100, small juveniles) to separately
# track post-settlement dynamics.
# NOTE: The companion Detmer-2025-coral-parameters repo uses different data-driven
# boundaries (0, 25, 100, 500, 2000 cm^2) for parameter estimation. Verify that
# parameter files align with these boundaries before running new analyses.
SC1 <- 0
SC2 <- 10
SC3 <- 100
SC4 <- 900
SC5 <- 4000

A_mids <- c((SC1 + SC2)/2, (SC2 + SC3)/2, (SC3 + SC4)/2, (SC4 + SC5)/2, 9325) # midpoint areas of each size class (cm^2); last value is the 50% quantile of observations greater than SC5 in the standardized data from the literature

A_reef <- mean(c(4492.011, 10076.67, 8943.55)) # area of the reef (very rough estimates from kml file of Fundemar's sites)

# set upt the orchard, reef, and lab treatments
orchard_treatments <- c("orchard1") # orchards (could have multiple orchards and/or orchards with different post-outplanting treatments)
reef_treatments <- c("reef1") # reef treatments/subpopulations (e.g., could have "urchin outplanting" or "algal removal" or other postoutplanting treatments)
#lab_treatments <- c("0_T1", "1_T1") # lab treatments (cement = T1, ceramic = T2). "TX" is tile type, "X_" indicates whether recruits are outplanted immediately (0_) or the next year (0_1)
lab_treatments <- c("0_T1") # lab treatments "TX" is tile type (e.g., cement = T1, ceramic = T2), "X_" indicates whether recruits are outplanted immediately (0_) or the next year (1_)


# demographic parameters for each orchard and reef
field_surv1 <- field_surv
field_growth1 <- field_growth
nurs_surv1 <- nurs_surv
nurs_growth1 <- nurs_growth

# nursery data only available for size classes 1-2, so use the field data for the larger size classes
nurs_surv1$SC_surv_summ_df <- nurs_surv1$SC_surv_summ_df %>% filter(size_class < 3) %>% rbind(field_surv1$SC_surv_summ_df[field_surv1$SC_surv_summ_df$size_class > 2,])

nurs_growth1$summ_list[[3]] <- field_growth1$summ_list[[3]]
nurs_growth1$summ_list[[4]] <- field_growth1$summ_list[[4]]
nurs_growth1$summ_list[[5]] <- field_growth1$summ_list[[5]]

# calculate mean parameter values (survival, growth, shrinkage, fragmentation) for each 
all_pars <- default_pars_fun(n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments), summ_metric_list = list(field_surv = "mean", field_growth = "mean", field_shrink = "mean", field_frag = "mean", nurs_surv = "mean", nurs_growth = "mean", nurs_shrink = "mean"), field_surv1, field_growth1, nurs_surv1, nurs_growth1, apal_frag_summ)

# reef parameters: survival
surv_pars.r <- all_pars$surv_pars.r

# reef parameters: growth
growth_pars.r <- all_pars$growth_pars.r

# reef parameters: shrinkage
shrink_pars.r <- all_pars$shrink_pars.r

# reef parameters: fragmentation
frag_pars.r <- all_pars$frag_pars.r

# density dependent survival (smallest size class only for now)
dens_pars.r <- list()
dens_pars.r[[1]] <- list() # first reef treatment/subpop
dens_pars.r[[1]][[1]] <- 0.02 # first source to first reef (external recruits)
dens_pars.r[[1]][[2]] <- dens_pars.r[[1]][[1]] # second source to first reef (first lab treatment)

# reef parameters: fecundity (for tracking reef reproductive output)
# estimates of number of eggs from spawning colonies in Fundemar's data (but don't know colony sizes): min = ~5200, 25% quantile = ~30000, 50% = ~93000, 75% = ~100000, max = ~140000, mean = ~72000

# update: use Fundemar's 2025 data (table 1 of their annual report) and assume no size-dependent reproduction because 1) lack of data and 2) Fundemar said they sometimes see smaller colonies spawning the most
# from Table 1: collected 1255111 embryos (100% fertilization) from 26 colonies (26 out of 31 of their monitored colonies spawned over a period of 2 days)

fec_pars.r <- list()
fec_pars.r[[1]] <- list()
fec_pars.r[[1]][[1]] <- c(0, 0, rep(1255111/26, 3)) #c(0, 0, 5000, 50000, 100000)
fec_pars.r[[1]][[2]] <- fec_pars.r[[1]][[1]]

# orchard parameters: survival
surv_pars.o <-all_pars$surv_pars.o #  list(list(c(0.8888889, 0.9314815, 0.95, 0.98, 1)))

# orchard parameters: growth
growth_pars.o <- all_pars$growth_pars.o

# orchard parameters: shrinkage
shrink_pars.o <- all_pars$shrink_pars.o

# orchard parameters: fragmentation
frag_pars.o <- all_pars$frag_pars.o

# density dependent survival (smallest size class only for now)
dens_pars.o <- list()
dens_pars.o[[1]] <- list() # first orchard
dens_pars.o[[1]][[1]] <- 0.02

# orchard parameters: fecundity
fec_pars.o <- list()
fec_pars.o[[1]] <- list() # first treatment
fec_pars.o[[1]][[1]] <- c(0, 0, rep(1255111/26, 3)) # first source

lambda <- 0 # external recruitment to reef

#lambda_R <- 10000 # mean number of larvae produced by reference reefs each year
lambda_R <- 1255111 # from Table 1 of Fundemar's report (total embryos collected in 2025)

# stochasticity parameters
sigma_s <- 0
sigma_f <- 0
ext_rand <- c(FALSE, FALSE) # whether 1) external recruitment and 2) reference reef reproduction is stochastic 
seeds <- c(1000, 5000, 10000, 40000)

# initial conditions in each reef subpopulation
N0.r <- list()
N0.r[[1]] <- list() # second reef subpop
N0.r[[1]][[1]] <- rep(0, n) # first source (external recruits)
N0.r[[1]][[2]] <- rep(0, n) # second source

# initial conditions in each orchard subpopulation
N0.o <- list()
N0.o[[1]] <- list() # first orchard treatment
N0.o[[1]][[1]] <- rep(0, n) # first source

N0.l <- list()
N0.l[[1]] <- 0
N0.l[[2]] <- 0


# disturbance parameters
dist_yrs <- c(years + 10) # years when disturbance occurs, can set to > years for none
#dist_yrs <- c(10)


# effects of disturbance on each reef subpop
dist_effects.r <- list()
dist_effects.r[[1]] <- list() # list where each element is the effects of disturbance on corals from each source in the 1st reef subpop (either "survival" for survival, "Tmat" for growth/survival, "Fmat" for fragmentation, or "fecundity" for reproduction)
dist_effects.r[[1]][[1]] <- list() # effects of disturbances on corals from first source in first reef subpop
dist_effects.r[[1]][[1]][[1]] <- c("survival") # effects of 1st disturbance on corals from first source in first reef subpop ([[1]][[1]][[2]] would be second disturbance, etc.)
dist_effects.r[[1]][[2]] <- list() # second source
dist_effects.r[[1]][[2]][[1]] <- c("survival")


# disturbance parameters for each reef subpop (what happens to the population parameters at each disturbance eve)
dist_pars.r <- list()

# first reef population
dist_pars.r[[1]] <- list() 
# first source to first reef subpop
dist_pars.r[[1]][[1]] <- dist_pars_fun(dist_yrs = dist_yrs, dist_effects.r[[1]][[1]], dist_surv0 = list(surv_pars.r[[1]][[1]]*0.1), dist_Tmat0 = NULL, dist_Fmat0 = NULL, dist_fec0 = NULL) # list of disturbance parameters for the first source to the first reef population (defaults for each parameter type are NULL unless the disturbance affects them, as specified in dist_effects)
# second source to first reef subpop (lab tiles)
dist_pars.r[[1]][[2]] <- dist_pars_fun(dist_yrs = dist_yrs, dist_effects.r[[1]][[2]], dist_surv0 = list(surv_pars.r[[1]][[2]]*0.1), dist_Tmat0 = NULL, dist_Fmat0 = NULL, dist_fec0 = NULL)


# disturbance effects for each orchard subpop
dist_effects.o <- list()

dist_effects.o[[1]] <- list() 
dist_effects.o[[1]][[1]] <- list() # effects of disturbances on corals from first source in first orchard treatment
dist_effects.o[[1]][[1]][[1]] <- c("survival") # effects of 1st disturbance on corals from first source in first reef subpop ([[1]][[1]][[2]] would be second disturbance, etc.)

# disturbance parameters for each orchard subpop
dist_pars.o <- list()

# first orchard treatment
dist_pars.o[[1]] <- list() 
# first source in first orchard treatment
dist_pars.o[[1]][[1]] <- dist_pars_fun(dist_yrs = dist_yrs, dist_effects.o[[1]][[1]], dist_surv0 = list(surv_pars.o[[1]][[1]]*0.1), dist_Tmat0 = NULL, dist_Fmat0 = NULL, dist_fec0 = NULL) 

# lab parameters
# fractions of settled larvae in each lab treatment that survive to immediate outplanting each year
s0 <- matrix(NA, nrow = years, ncol = 2)
s0[,1] <- rep(0.95, years)
s0[,2] <- rep(0.95, years)

#s0[10,1] <- 0.05
#s0[10,2] <- 0.05

# fractions of settled larvae in each lab treatment that survive to 1 yr outplanting
s1 <- matrix(NA, nrow = years, ncol = 2)
s1[,1] <- rep(0.7, years)
s1[,2] <- rep(0.7, years)

m0 <- c(0.02, 0.02) # density dependent mortality rate of larvae in each lab treatment that get outplanted immediately
m1 <- c(0.02, 0.02) # density dependent mortality rate of larvae in each lab treatment that get outplanted after 1 year
#sett_props <- list(T1 = 0.15, T2 = 0.15) # proportion of larvae that settle on each tile type
sett_props <- list(T1 = 0.15) # proportion of larvae that settle on each tile type
size_props <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(lab_treatments), ncol = n) # matrix for fractions of recruits in each size class at time of outplanting
size_props[1, ] <- c(1, 0, 0, 0, 0) # first lab treatment (0_T1)
#size_props[2, ] <- c(1, 0, 0, 0, 0) # second lab treatment (0_T2)
size_props1 <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(lab_treatments), ncol = n) # matrix for fractions of retained recruits in each size class at time of outplanting
size_props1[1, ] <- c(1, 0, 0, 0, 0) # first lab treatment (0_T1)
lab_pars <- list(s0 = s0, s1 = s1, m0 = m0, m1 = m1, sett_props = sett_props, size_props = size_props, size_props1 = size_props1)

# restoration strategy parameters
tile_props <- list(T1 = 1) # proportion of tiles that are each type
orchard_yield <- 1 # percent of new orchard babies successfully collected
reef_yield <- 1 # percent of new reef babies successfully collected and fertilized
spawn_target <- 2000000 # target number of embryos to collect from orchard each year (note: if this is set to zero, there won't be any settlers)
reef_prop <- c(0.5) # proportion of lab recruits from each lab treatment outplanted to reef (1-proportion outplanted to orchard)
reef_out_props <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(lab_treatments), ncol = length(reef_treatments)) # proportion recruits going from each lab treatment to each reef treatment (row = origin lab treatment, column = destination reef treatment)
reef_out_props[1,] <- c(1) # from first lab treatment to each reef treatment (here there's just on intervention reef so they all go there)

orchard_out_props <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(lab_treatments), ncol = length(orchard_treatments)) # proportion recruits going from each lab treatment to each orchard treatment
orchard_out_props[1,] <- c(1) # from first lab treatment to each orchard 

# sizes allocated to each treatment
reef_areas <- c(A_reef)*10000 # m^2 given to each post-outplanting reef treatment/subpopulation, convert to cm^2 by multiplying by 10,000
lab_max <- 3100 # total number of tiles that the lab can accommodate 
lab_retain_max <- 0 # total number of tiles that the lab can keep for a year (must be less than or equal to lab_max; if > 0 then must have at least one "1_" lab treatment, if equal to lab max then must have all treatments be "1_")
tank_min <- 14600 # min number of embryos to put in a tank (reduce number of tanks used if less than this to avoid unrealistically small densities on the tiles)
tank_max <- 33333 # max number of embryos to put in a tank (impose a max because in reality if you had unlimited embryos you wouldn't put all of them in tanks because the density would be too high and presumably lead to high dens dep mortality). Chose max to correspond to number that would result in 50 embryos per tile, assuming 15% settlement and 100 tiles per tank

# 100*50/0.15

orchard_size <- c(30*500) # number of tiles each orchard has space for (500 stars x 30 tiles per star)


# coral transplanting
transplant <- rep(0, years) # years in which corals get transplanted from the orchard
#transplant[10] <- 1 # in 10th year, move corals from orchard to reef

null_mat <- matrix(0, nrow = years, ncol = n)
#rest_pars$trans_mats[[1]][[1]][which(transplant!=0)[1],] <- c(0, 0, 0, 2,0)# max number of colonies of each size class to move to reef in first transplant event
trans_mats <- list()
trans_mats[[1]] <- list() # first orchard 
trans_mats[[1]][[1]] <- null_mat # number of corals in each size class that originated from the first source of colonies for this orchard to transplant at each timepoint

# where on the reef to put the transplants
#rest_pars$trans_reef[[1]][[1]][which(transplant!=0)[1],] <- c(1, 1)# reef and source subpop to transport the corals to
trans_reef <- list()
trans_reef[[1]] <- list() # first orchard
trans_reef[[1]][[1]] <- matrix(c(1, 2), nrow = years, ncol = 2, byrow = T) # first source corals in this orchard get transplanted to the second source of corals in the first reef

rest_pars <- list(tile_props = tile_props, orchard_yield = orchard_yield, reef_yield = reef_yield, spawn_target = spawn_target, reef_prop = reef_prop, reef_out_props = reef_out_props, orchard_out_props = orchard_out_props, reef_areas = reef_areas, lab_max = lab_max, lab_retain_max = lab_retain_max, tank_min = tank_min, tank_max = tank_max, orchard_size = orchard_size, transplant = transplant, trans_mats = trans_mats, trans_reef = trans_reef, trans_surv = trans_surv)


sim1 <- rse_mod1(years, n, A_mids, surv_pars.r, dens_pars.r, growth_pars.r, shrink_pars.r, frag_pars.r, fec_pars.r, surv_pars.o, dens_pars.o, growth_pars.o, shrink_pars.o, frag_pars.o, fec_pars.o, lambda, lambda_R, sigma_s, sigma_f, ext_rand, seeds, dist_yrs, dist_pars.r, dist_effects.r, dist_pars.o, dist_effects.o, orchard_treatments, reef_treatments, lab_treatments, lab_pars, rest_pars, N0.r, N0.o, N0.l)

```



check numbers (note: getting the numbers to match perfectly for the reported embryos collected and recruits outplanted is a matter of picking the in-lab density dependent and independent mortality rates)

```{r}


#sim1$reef_out[[1]][[2]]

#(sim1$reef_out[[1]][[2]])/sim1$tiles_out_tot


#sim1$tiles_out_tot

reef1_tot <- model_summ(model_sim = sim1, location = "reef", metric = "area_m2", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments))

orch1_tot <- model_summ(model_sim = sim1, location = "orchard", metric = "area_m2", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments))


plot(x = c(1:years), y = reef1_tot, type = "l", las = 1, ylim = c(0, max(max(reef1_tot), max(orch1_tot))), xlab = "year", ylab = "Area covered", lwd = 2)
lines(x = c(1:years), y = orch1_tot, type = "l", col = "dodgerblue", lwd = 2, lty = 2)
legend("topleft", legend = c("reef", "orchard"), col = c("black", "dodgerblue"), lwd = 2, lty = c(1, 2))


reef1_tot <- model_summ(model_sim = sim1, location = "reef", metric = "ind", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments))

orch1_tot <- model_summ(model_sim = sim1, location = "orchard", metric = "ind", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments))


plot(x = c(1:years), y = reef1_tot, type = "l", las = 1, ylim = c(0, max(max(reef1_tot), max(orch1_tot))), xlab = "year", ylab = "Population size", lwd = 2)
lines(x = c(1:years), y = orch1_tot, type = "l", col = "dodgerblue", lwd = 2, lty = 2)
legend("topleft", legend = c("reef", "orchard"), col = c("black", "dodgerblue"), lwd = 2, lty = c(1, 2))


plot(x = c(1:years), y = reef1_tot, type = "l", las = 1, ylim = c(0, max(reef1_tot)), xlab = "year", ylab = "Area covered", lwd = 2)

plot(x = c(1:years), y = sim1$reef_out[[1]][[2]], type = "l", ylim = c(0, max(max(sim1$reef_out[[1]][[2]], na.rm = T), max(sim1$orchard_out[[1]][[1]], na.rm = T))))
lines(x = c(1:years), y = sim1$orchard_out[[1]][[1]], col = "dodgerblue")

sim1$reef_out


sim1$reef_babies_used
sim1$orchard_babies_used

sim1$reef_tiles_out + sim1$orchard_tiles_out

```




reef_out and orchard_out are inversely related because tiles that don't go to the orchard go to the reef

Old problem (fixed now):
why does the orchard population decline over time? 1) density dependent mortality (as the orchard grows, there are more larvae produced, so the densities on the settlement tiles get super high) and 2) orchard gets full in terms of tiles so no new tiles are outplanted, but there are still tiles with multiple corals per tile, so the number of corals decreases but no new tiles are outplanted still (the reef stars are still full)

Fixes: 1) put a max number of larvae per tile in the lab (so you don't get crazy high densities that cause them all to die)...OR just make an upstream max total number of embryos that can be handled in the lab and 2) need to figure out density dependence in the orchard and number of corals per tile... because eventually there's only room for one per tile

```{r}

# plot(x = c(1:years), y = sim1$orchard_pops[[1]][[1]][1,], type = "l")
# plot(x = c(1:years), y = sim1$orchard_pops[[1]][[1]][2,], type = "l")
# plot(x = c(1:years), y = sim1$orchard_pops[[1]][[1]][3,], type = "l")
# plot(x = c(1:years), y = sim1$orchard_pops[[1]][[1]][4,], type = "l")
# plot(x = c(1:years), y = sim1$orchard_pops[[1]][[1]][5,], type = "l")
# 
# sim1$orchard_out[[1]][[1]]

# It looks like the problem is maybe just that some of the orchard corals are dying but there are still at least one per tile so nothing new is being outplanted but the total number in the orchard is decreasing

```

## parameter sets

NOTE: this is where you can decide whether to include only local data from the Demographic Republic or regional data from the Caribbean

```{r}
# get the random parameter sets

# number of iterations
n_sample1 <- 100

# full parameter sets
field_surv1 <- field_surv
field_growth1 <- field_growth
nurs_surv1 <- nurs_surv
nurs_growth1 <- nurs_growth

# nursery data only available for size classes 1-2, so use the field data for larger size classes
nurs_surv1$SC_surv_df <- nurs_surv1$SC_surv_df %>% filter(size_class < 3) %>% rbind(field_surv1$SC_surv_df[field_surv1$SC_surv_df$size_class > 2,])

nurs_growth1$mat_list[[3]] <- field_growth1$mat_list[[3]]
nurs_growth1$mat_list[[4]] <- field_growth1$mat_list[[4]]
nurs_growth1$mat_list[[5]] <- field_growth1$mat_list[[5]]


set.seed(500)
all_pars_R <- rand_pars_fun(n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments), n_sample = n_sample1, field_surv = field_surv1, field_growth = field_growth1, nurs_surv = nurs_surv1, nurs_growth = nurs_growth1, apal_frag)

```


## no disturbance

```{r}

# run for 100 years because interested in both short-term (5 years) and long-term (100 years) but it's more efficient to just run everything once for 100 years

L1 <- 50
prop_set <- seq(from = 0, to = 1, length.out = L1) # proportion tiles outplanted to reef (can be higher than this if orchard gets full though)

orch_exp_list <- list()


# outer loop = demographic parameter values
# inner loop = proportion to outplant to the reef

tic()

for(i in 1:n_sample1){ # for each parameter set
  
  # set up the parameters
  
  surv_pars.r <- all_pars_R$surv_pars_L.r[[i]] 
  growth_pars.r <- all_pars_R$growth_pars_L.r[[i]]
  shrink_pars.r <- all_pars_R$shrink_pars_L.r[[i]] 
  frag_pars.r <- all_pars_R$frag_pars_L.r[[i]]
  surv_pars.o <- all_pars_R$surv_pars_L.o[[i]] 
  growth_pars.o <- all_pars_R$growth_pars_L.o[[i]]
  shrink_pars.o <- all_pars_R$shrink_pars_L.o[[i]]
  frag_pars.o <- all_pars_R$frag_pars_L.o[[i]]
  
  # holding list for model simulations with this parameter set
  mod_list <- list()
  
  for(j in 1:length(prop_set)){ # for each proportion outplanted to reef
    
    rest_pars_ij <- rest_pars
    
    rest_pars_ij$reef_prop <- prop_set[j] # proportion of tiles outplanted to reef
    
    # run the model
    sim_ij <- rse_mod1(years, n, A_mids, surv_pars.r, dens_pars.r, growth_pars.r, shrink_pars.r, frag_pars.r, fec_pars.r, surv_pars.o, dens_pars.o, growth_pars.o, shrink_pars.o, frag_pars.o, fec_pars.o, lambda, lambda_R, sigma_s, sigma_f, ext_rand, seeds, dist_yrs, dist_pars.r, dist_effects.r, dist_pars.o, dist_effects.o, orchard_treatments, reef_treatments, lab_treatments, lab_pars, rest_pars_ij, N0.r, N0.o, N0.l)
    
    
    # save the output
    mod_list[[j]] <- sim_ij
    
  } # end of iterations over outplanting proportions
  
  
  orch_exp_list[[i]] <- mod_list
  
} # end of iterations over parameter sets

toc()

# record each performance metrics at each time point (can later look at which proportion resulted in the max value of each metric at each time point)




```

process results


```{r}
# performance metrics: 1) coral cover on reef, 2) orchard function (loosely defined to include ecological function and reproduction since these are highly correlated in the model, calculate as sum or area covered of all reproductively mature size classes in the orchard), 3) reef ROI (m2 coral on reef per dollar spent), 4) total ROI (m2 coral on reef and orchard per dollar spent), 5) total costs, and 6) number of recruits outplanted to reef?

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# INLINE ANALYSIS FUNCTIONS
# These functions are defined here (not in rse_funs.R) because they depend on
# variables from this analysis environment (rest_pars, A_mids, years, etc.).
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

#' Orchard expansion performance metrics
#' Extracts 6 performance metrics from a set of orchard expansion simulations:
#' 1) reef coral cover, 2) orchard function (reproductive adult area),
#' 3) reef ROI (m^2 coral per dollar), 4) total ROI, 5) total costs,
#' 6) recruits outplanted to reef. Normalizes each metric 0-1 and computes
#' a weighted composite score.
#' NOTE: Uses rest_pars, A_mids, years, reef/orchard/lab_treatments from the
#' calling environment.
orch_exp_metric_fun <- function(sim_list, n_sample1, L1, max_yr, weights = list(reef_cover = 1, orch_fun = 1, reef_ROI = 1, tot_ROI = 1, tot_costs = 1, recruits_out = 1), dt_D0 = data.frame(NA)){
  
      r_inf <- 0.056 # inflation rate
      # fixed costs
      c_RS <- 84.6*rest_pars$orchard_size/30 + 1200 # reef stars (cost of reef stars plus cost of boat rental for installation); no inflation because assume this is only an initial cost
      
      # fixed costs that are per year (need to account for inflation)
      # c_perm <- 400*length(2:max_yr)
      c_perm <- sum(400*(1 + r_inf)^(2:max_yr)) # permits for collecting babies (400 per year)
      c_boat <- sum(1200*4*(1 + r_inf)^(2:max_yr)) # boat maintenance (1200 every 3 months/4x per year)
      c_log <- sum(500*12*(1 + r_inf)^(2:max_yr)) # logistics/personnel (500 per month/12x per year)
      
      c_fixed <- c_RS + c_perm + c_boat + c_log
  
  
  # calculate the performance metrics for each parameter combination
  for(i in 1:n_sample1){ # for each parameter combination
    
    # make the holding data frame
    dt_i <- data.frame(
  par_rep = rep(i, L1), # random parameter replicate
  prop_out = rep(NA, L1), # proportion outplanted to reef
  reef_cover_mean = rep(NA, L1), # m2 of coral cover on reef (mean over years 1 to max_yr)
  reef_function_mean = rep(NA, L1), # avg area covered by large/reproductive (size classes 3-5) corals on reef
  reef_tiles_out_tot = rep(NA, L1), # total number of tiles outplanted to reef
  reef_area_out_tot = rep(NA, L1), # total area of reef over which tiles were outplanted 
  reef_recruits_out_tot = rep(NA, L1), # total recruits outplanted to reef
  reef_ROI_mean = rep(NA, L1), # average coral cover on reef per dollar spent, averaged over max_yr years
  tot_ROI_mean = rep(NA, L1), # average total ROI (total area covered by corals on reef and orchard per dollar spent)
  orch_function_mean = rep(NA, L1), # avg area covered by large/reproductive (size classes 3-5) corals in orchard
  orch_full = rep(NA, L1), # first time point when the orchard is full
 tot_costs = rep(NA, L1), # total amount spent over length of simulation
 costs_saved = rep(NA, L1), # amount saved relative to most expensive strategy
 c_fixed = rep(NA, L1), # fixed costs
 c_subs = rep(NA, L1), # costs of substrates
 c_out = rep(NA, L1), # outplanting costs
 c_maint = rep(NA, L1), # orchard maintenance costs
 c_lab = rep(NA, L1), # lab costs
 c_spawn = rep(NA, L1), # costs of collecting spawn
strategy_score = rep(NA, L1), # weighted sum of top metrics relative to their max possible value
  reef_cover_cost = rep(NA, L1)#, # avg coral cover on reef over max_yr years compared to if all corals were put on the reef
  #orch_rep_cost = rep(NA, L1) # avg orchard reproduction over max_yr years compared to if all corals were put in the orchard
  
)
    
    
    # NOTE: could calculate coral cover as coral cover per m2, where the m2 is the total area outplanted up to that time point, but then you might get numbers that look high if very few tiles were outplanted so that might be confusing...
    
   # orch_rep_0 <- model_summ(model_sim = sim_list[[i]][[1]], location = "orchard", metric = "production", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments))
    
   # orch_rep_max <- mean(orch_rep_0[2:max_yr], na.rm = T)
    
    
    # get reef cover if nothing was outplanted to orchard to estimate "cost" of investing in orchard in terms of reef coral cover lost
    reef_cover_1 <- model_summ(model_sim = sim_list[[i]][[L1]], location = "reef", metric = "area_m2", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments))
    
    reef_cover_max <- mean(reef_cover_1[2:max_yr], na.rm = T)
    
    
    for(j in 1:L1){ # for each proportion outplanted to reef
      
      sim_ij <- sim_list[[i]][[j]]
      
      # reef cover
      reef_cover_ij <- model_summ(model_sim = sim_ij, location = "reef", metric = "area_m2", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments))
      
      # reef function
      reef_fun_ij <- model_summ(model_sim = sim_ij, location = "reef", metric = "area_m2", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments), size_classes = c(3, 4, 5))

      # orchard rep
#orch_rep_ij <- model_summ(model_sim = sim_ij, location = "orchard", metric = "production", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments))
      
      # orchard cover
      orch_cover_ij <- model_summ(model_sim = sim_ij, location = "orchard", metric = "area_m2", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments))

      # orchard function
orch_fun_ij <- model_summ(model_sim = sim_ij, location = "orchard", metric = "area_m2", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments), size_classes = c(3, 4, 5))

 # orchard adults (for recording time to full orchard)
orch_ad_ij <- model_summ(model_sim = sim_ij, location = "orchard", metric = "ind", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments), size_classes = c(3, 4, 5))

      dt_i$prop_out[j] <- prop_set[j]
      dt_i$reef_cover_mean[j] <- mean(reef_cover_ij[2:max_yr], na.rm = T)
      dt_i$reef_function_mean[j] <- mean(reef_fun_ij[2:max_yr], na.rm = T)
      dt_i$reef_tiles_out_tot[j] <- sum(sim_ij$reef_tiles_out[2:max_yr], na.rm = T)
      dt_i$reef_area_out_tot[j] <- dt_i$reef_tiles_out_tot[j]*5
      dt_i$reef_recruits_out_tot[j] <- sum(sim_ij$reef_out[[1]][[2]][2:max_yr], na.rm = T)
      dt_i$reef_cover_cost[j] <- dt_i$reef_cover_mean[j]/reef_cover_max
      #dt_i$orch_rep_cost[j] <- mean(orch_rep_ij[2:max_yr], na.rm = T)/orch_rep_max
      dt_i$orch_function_mean[j] <- mean(orch_fun_ij[2:max_yr], na.rm = T)
      
      # threshold value for full orchard
      orch_thresh <- rest_pars$orchard_size*0.75
      
      dt_i$orch_full[j] <- ifelse(max(orch_ad_ij) >= orch_thresh, min(which(orch_ad_ij >= orch_thresh)), NA)
    
      
      # variable costs
      # substrate costs
      c_subs <- sum((sim_ij$reef_tiles_out[2:max_yr] + sim_ij$orchard_tiles_out[2:max_yr]) *(0.5*1 + 0.5*7)*(1 + r_inf)^(2:max_yr))
      
      
    # outplanting and orchard maintenance costs
      c_reef <- rep(NA, length(2:max_yr)) # reef
      c_orch <- rep(NA, length(2:max_yr)) # orchard
      c_maint <- rep(NA, length(2:max_yr)) # orchard maintenance
      
      for(ii in 2:max_yr){
        #print(ii)
        
 # outplanting costs (assuming you can outplant ~1,250 substrates per day to the reef and 800 per day to the orchard)
        c_reef[ii-1] <- 300*ceiling(sim_ij$reef_tiles_out[ii]/1250) + 200*sim_ij$reef_tiles_out[ii]/1250 + 380/2000*sim_ij$reef_tiles_out[ii]
        
        c_reef[ii-1] <- c_reef[ii-1]*(1 + r_inf)^(ii)
        
       c_orch[ii-1] <- 300*ceiling(sim_ij$orchard_tiles_out[ii]/800) + 200*sim_ij$orchard_tiles_out[ii]/800 + 250/2000 * sim_ij$orchard_tiles_out[ii]
       
       c_orch[ii-1] <- c_orch[ii-1]*(1 + r_inf)^(ii)
        
        # currently occupied reef stars in the orchard:
        RS_ii <- rep(NA, length(orchard_treatments))
        for(kk in 1:length(orchard_treatments)){ # in case there's more than one orchard
          RS_ii[kk] <- sim_ij$orchard_tiles[[kk]][ii]/30 # 30 tiles per reef star
        }
        
        RS_ii <- sum(RS_ii) # filled reef stars in orchard this year
        
        c_maint[ii-1] <- ifelse(RS_ii == 0, 0, (1.5*530-530)/(2*123-123)*RS_ii + 265) 
        c_maint[ii-1] <- c_maint[ii-1]*2*(1 + r_inf)^(ii) # assume maintenance is performed 2x per year, also add inflation
        
      } # end of loop over 2:max_yr
      
      c_out <- sum(c_reef) + sum(c_orch)
      c_maint <- sum(c_maint)
 
      # lab costs
     # c_lab <- (432*7 + 200*7)*length(2:max_yr) # assume all tiles are only kept in the lab for two weeks
      c_lab <- sum((432*7 + 200*7)*(1 + r_inf)^(2:max_yr))
    
      
  
      # spawning costs    
      c_spawn <- rep(NA, length(2:max_yr))
      for(ii in 2:max_yr){
        c_spawn[ii-1] <- ifelse(sim_ij$reef_babies_used[ii] > 0, 6500, 0) + ifelse(sim_ij$orchard_babies_used[ii] > 0, 3250, 0)
        c_spawn[ii-1] <- c_spawn[ii-1]*(1 + r_inf)^(ii)
        
      }
    
      c_spawn <- sum(c_spawn)
      
      
     tot_costs <- c_fixed + c_subs + c_out + c_maint + c_lab + c_spawn
     
     dt_i$c_fixed[j] <- c_fixed
     dt_i$c_subs[j] <- c_subs
     dt_i$c_out[j] <- c_out
     dt_i$c_maint[j] <- c_maint
     dt_i$c_lab[j] <- c_lab
     dt_i$c_spawn[j] <- c_spawn
     dt_i$tot_costs[j] <- tot_costs
      
      #dt_i$tot_dollar_costs[j]
      dt_i$reef_ROI_mean[j] <- mean(reef_cover_ij[2:max_yr]/tot_costs)
      
      dt_i$tot_ROI_mean[j] <- mean((reef_cover_ij[2:max_yr] + orch_cover_ij[2:max_yr])/tot_costs)
      
    } # end of iteration over strategy parameter values
    
    # get max values of top metrics for ith parameter combination for calculating weighted scores
    # metrics considered: 1) coral cover on reef, 2) orchard function, 3) reef ROI, 4) total ROI, 5) total costs, and 6) number of recruits outplanted to reef
    
    # update: replace zeros with 1 (if max was zero, e.g., if outplant survival on the reef was zero, that means all values were zero so this will result in dividing 0 by 1 = 0 instead of 0/0 = NA)
    
    # if there is disturbance, use the no disturbance case as the max
    if(is.na(as.vector(dt_D0)[1]) == T){
      dt_iM <- dt_i
    } else{
      dt_iM <- dt_D0[which(dt_D0$par_rep == i),]
    }
  
    reef_cover_max_i <- max(dt_iM$reef_cover_mean)
   # reef_cover_max_i <- ifelse(reef_cover_max_i == 0, 1, reef_cover_max_i)
    orch_fun_max_i <- max(dt_iM$orch_function_mean)
   # orch_fun_max_i <- ifelse(orch_fun_max_i == 0, 1, orch_fun_max_i)
    reef_ROI_max_i <- max(dt_iM$reef_ROI_mean)
   # reef_ROI_max_i <- ifelse(reef_ROI_max_i == 0, 1, reef_ROI_max_i)
    tot_ROI_max_i <- max(dt_iM$tot_ROI_mean)
   # tot_ROI_max_i <- ifelse(tot_ROI_max_i == 0, 1, tot_ROI_max_i)
   # tot_costs_min_i <- min(dt_iM$tot_costs) # want to minimize total costs
    tot_costs_max_i <- max(dt_iM$tot_costs)
    tot_saved_max_i <- tot_costs_max_i - min(dt_iM$tot_costs)
    reef_recruits_out_tot_max_i <- max(dt_iM$reef_recruits_out_tot)
   # reef_recruits_out_tot_max_i <- ifelse(reef_recruits_out_tot_max_i == 0, 1, reef_recruits_out_tot_max_i)
    
  
    
    # now add the scores for each 
    for(j in 1:L1){
    
      
      w_sum <- sum(unlist(weights))
      
      dt_i$strategy_score[j] <- weights$reef_cover/w_sum*dt_i$reef_cover_mean[j]/reef_cover_max_i + weights$orch_fun/w_sum*dt_i$orch_function_mean[j]/orch_fun_max_i + weights$reef_ROI/w_sum*dt_i$reef_ROI_mean[j]/reef_ROI_max_i + weights$tot_ROI/w_sum*dt_i$tot_ROI_mean[j]/tot_ROI_max_i + #weights$tot_costs/w_sum*(dt_i$tot_costs[j]/tot_costs_min_i)^(-1) +
weights$tot_costs/w_sum*(tot_costs_max_i- dt_i$tot_costs[j])/tot_saved_max_i + weights$recruits_out/w_sum*dt_i$reef_recruits_out_tot[j]/reef_recruits_out_tot_max_i
    
      # calculate costs saved
    dt_i$costs_saved[j] <- tot_costs_max_i- dt_i$tot_costs[j]
  
      
    }
    
    
  if(i == 1){
    dt <- dt_i
  } else{
    dt <- rbind(dt, dt_i)
  }
    
  }
  
  return(dt) # return the data frame
  
}





```



```{r}
weights1 <- list(reef_cover = 1, orch_fun = 1, reef_ROI = 1, tot_ROI = 1, tot_costs = 0, recruits_out = 0)

# data frame for all the performance metrics at year 5 (use data from time points 2 through 6)
# D0 for no disturbance simulations
orch_exp_5_D0 <- orch_exp_metric_fun(sim_list = orch_exp_list, n_sample1, L1, max_yr = 6, weights = weights1)

#View(orch_exp_5_D0)
# make this a function of the list, n_sample1, L1, and the time point of interest

# data frame for all the performance metrics at year 50 (use data from time points 2 through 51)
orch_exp_50_D0 <- orch_exp_metric_fun(sim_list = orch_exp_list, n_sample1, L1, max_yr = 51, weights = weights1)


#View(orch_exp_5_D0)

#orch_exp_5_D0$strategy_score

#hist(orch_exp_5_D0$tot_costs)
```

```{r}

# NOTE: for the strategy score, values are NA for the cases where there are no babies that survival on the reef
lab_cx <- 0.85

dt_plot <- orch_exp_5_D0

plot(x = prop_set, y = rep(0, length(prop_set)), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, 1), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
mtext(side = 1, "Proportion initially outplanted to reef", line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 2, "Strategy score", line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
#mtext(side = 3, "5 year simulation, no disturbance", outer = T, line = -1)
for(i in 1:n_sample1){
  dt_sub <- dt_plot[which(dt_plot$par_rep==i),]
  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$strategy_score, col = adjustcolor(col = "black", alpha.f = 0.2))
}
# add the mean in blue
mean_score <- dt_plot %>% group_by(prop_out) %>% summarize(strategy_score = mean(strategy_score, na.rm = T))
lines(x = mean_score$prop_out, y = mean_score$strategy_score, col = "blue", lwd = 2)
abline(v = prop_set[which(mean_score$strategy_score == max(mean_score$strategy_score))], col = "blue", lty = 2)

#View(mean_score)
orch_exp_5_D0_pmax <- mean_score$prop_out[which(mean_score$strategy_score == max(mean_score$strategy_score))]

dt_plot <- orch_exp_50_D0

plot(x = prop_set, y = rep(0, length(prop_set)), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, 1), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
mtext(side = 1, "Proportion initially outplanted to reef", line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 2, "Strategy score", line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
#mtext(side = 3, "5 year simulation, no disturbance", outer = T, line = -1)
for(i in 1:n_sample1){
  dt_sub <- dt_plot[which(dt_plot$par_rep==i),]
  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$strategy_score, col = adjustcolor(col = "black", alpha.f = 0.2))
}
# add the mean in blue
mean_score <- dt_plot %>% group_by(prop_out) %>% summarize(strategy_score = mean(strategy_score, na.rm = T))
lines(x = mean_score$prop_out, y = mean_score$strategy_score, col = "blue", lwd = 2)
abline(v = prop_set[which(mean_score$strategy_score == max(mean_score$strategy_score))], col = "blue", lty = 2)

orch_exp_50_D0_pmax <- mean_score$prop_out[which(mean_score$strategy_score == max(mean_score$strategy_score))]
```
