

```{r}
# make a function for making the OHI-type plots

#' OHI-style radar plot
#' Creates a radar (spider) plot showing normalized performance metrics for
#' each orchard-to-reef allocation proportion. Highlights the optimal proportion.
ohi_fun <- function(dt_plot, opt_prop1){
  
metric_cols <- c("#4477AA", "#AA3377", "#66CCEE", "#CCBB44","#EE6677", "#228833") # coral cover on reef, orchard function, reef ROI, total ROI, total costs, recruits outplanted to reef

Lcol <- "gray"
lab_cex <- 0.9
  
max_vals <- dt_plot %>% group_by(par_rep) %>% summarize(reef_cover_max = max(reef_cover_mean, na.rm = T), orch_function_max = max(orch_function_mean, na.rm = T), reef_ROI_max = max(reef_ROI_mean, na.rm = T), tot_ROI_max = max(tot_ROI_mean, na.rm = T), costs_saved_max = max(costs_saved, na.rm = T), recruits_out_max = max(reef_recruits_out_tot, na.rm = T), score_max = max(strategy_score)) %>% filter(is.na(score_max)==F)

# if the maxes are zero, make them one to avoid dividing by zero to make the values zero instead of NA
for(cc in 1:ncol(max_vals)){
  max_vals[which(max_vals[,cc] == 0),cc] <- 1
}

dt_plot2 <- dt_plot %>% left_join(max_vals, by = c("par_rep")) %>% filter(is.na(reef_cover_max)==F) %>% filter(prop_out == opt_prop1) # filter out results for the proportion with the highest score

  
par(pty = "s")
r_in <- 0.5
r_out0 <- r_in + 1
test_x <- seq(from = -r_in, to = r_in, length.out = 100)
plot(x = 1, y = 1, col = NA, xlim = c(-5, 5), ylim = c(-5, 5), asp = 1, las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA, xaxt = "n", yaxt = "n", bty = "n")
polygon(x = c(test_x, rev(test_x)), y = c(sqrt((r_in)^2 - test_x^2), rev(-1*sqrt(r_in^2 - test_x^2))), border = Lcol) # , col = "gray"
test_x <- seq(from = -r_out0, to = r_out0, length.out = 100)
polygon(x = c(test_x, rev(test_x)), y = c(sqrt((r_out0)^2 - test_x^2), rev(-1*sqrt(r_out0^2 - test_x^2))), border = Lcol)
#text(x = 0, y = 0, paste(as.character(round(opt_prop1*100,0)), "%", sep = ""))
text(x = 0, y = 0, as.character(round(opt_prop1,2)))

# add background lines
th1_set <- seq(from = 0, to = 300, by = 60)
th2_set <- seq(from = 60, to = 360, by = 60)
for(i in 1:6){
  r_in_x <- seq(from = r_in*cos(th1_set[i]*pi/180), to = r_in*cos(th2_set[i]*pi/180), length.out = 100)
r_out_x <- seq(from = r_out0*cos(th1_set[i]*pi/180), to = r_out0*cos(th2_set[i]*pi/180), length.out = 100)

if(i < 4){
  polygon(x = c(r_in_x, rev(r_out_x)), y = c(sqrt(r_in^2 - r_in_x^2), rev(sqrt(r_out0^2 - r_out_x^2))), border = Lcol)
} else{
  polygon(x = c(r_in_x, rev(r_out_x)), y = c(-sqrt(r_in^2 - r_in_x^2), rev(-sqrt(r_out0^2 - r_out_x^2))), border = Lcol)
}

}

# value to plot: on average, how far was each metric from it's max possible value for that parameter set? (outer ring is one); actual value to show in text is the average of the raw values at the proportion outplanted?

# coral cover
r_out <- mean(dt_plot2$reef_cover_mean/dt_plot2$reef_cover_max) + r_in
th1 <- 0 # starting angle (in degrees)
th2 <- 60 # ending angle (in degrees)
r_in_x <- seq(from = r_in*cos(th1*pi/180), to = r_in*cos(th2*pi/180), length.out = 100)
r_out_x <- seq(from = r_out*cos(th1*pi/180), to = r_out*cos(th2*pi/180), length.out = 100)
polygon(x = c(r_in_x, rev(r_out_x)), y = c(sqrt(r_in^2 - r_in_x^2), rev(sqrt(r_out^2 - r_out_x^2))), col = metric_cols[1], border = NA)
if(r_out == r_in){ # if r_out is equal to r_in (metric was zero), add a line with the color of this performance metric at zero
  lines(x = r_in_x, y = sqrt(r_in^2 - r_in_x^2), col = metric_cols[1])
}
labs1 <- as.character(round(mean(dt_plot2$reef_cover_mean), 0))
labs1 <- ifelse(labs1 == "0", as.character(round(mean(dt_plot2$reef_cover_mean), 3)), labs1)
text(x = 1.3*r_out0*cos((th1 + th2)/2*pi/180), y =1.3*r_out0*sin((th1 + th2)/2*pi/180), bquote(.(labs1)~m^2), cex = lab_cex)

#text(x = r_out0, y =1.5*r_out0*sin((th1 + th2)/2*pi/180), as.character(round(mean(dt_plot2$reef_cover_mean), 0)))
#text(x = r_out, y =2*r_out*sin((th1 + th2)/2*pi/180), expression(m^2))

# orchard function
r_out <- mean(dt_plot2$orch_function_mean/dt_plot2$orch_function_max) + r_in
th1 <- 60 # starting angle (in degrees)
th2 <- 120 # ending angle (in degrees)
r_in_x <- seq(from = r_in*cos(th1*pi/180), to = r_in*cos(th2*pi/180), length.out = 100)
r_out_x <- seq(from = r_out*cos(th1*pi/180), to = r_out*cos(th2*pi/180), length.out = 100)
polygon(x = c(r_in_x, rev(r_out_x)), y = c(sqrt(r_in^2 - r_in_x^2), rev(sqrt(r_out^2 - r_out_x^2))), col = metric_cols[2], border = NA)
if(r_out == r_in){ # if r_out is equal to r_in (metric was zero), add a line with the color of this performance metric at zero
  lines(x = r_in_x, y = sqrt(r_in^2 - r_in_x^2), col = metric_cols[2])
}
labs1 <- as.character(round(mean(dt_plot2$orch_function_mean), 0))
text(x = 0, y =1.15*r_out0*sin((th1 + th2)/2*pi/180), bquote(.(labs1)~m^2), cex = lab_cex)
#text(x = 0, y =1.2*r_out0*sin((th1 + th2)/2*pi/180), as.character(round(mean(dt_plot2$orch_function_mean), 0)))

# reef ROI
r_out <- mean(dt_plot2$reef_ROI_mean/dt_plot2$reef_ROI_max) + r_in
th1 <- 120 # starting angle (in degrees)
th2 <- 180 # ending angle (in degrees)
r_in_x <- seq(from = r_in*cos(th1*pi/180), to = r_in*cos(th2*pi/180), length.out = 100)
r_out_x <- seq(from = r_out*cos(th1*pi/180), to = r_out*cos(th2*pi/180), length.out = 100)
polygon(x = c(r_in_x, rev(r_out_x)), y = c(sqrt(r_in^2 - r_in_x^2), rev(sqrt(r_out^2 - r_out_x^2))), col = metric_cols[3], border = NA)
if(r_out == r_in){ # if r_out is equal to r_in (metric was zero), add a line with the color of this performance metric at zero
  lines(x = r_in_x, y = sqrt(r_in^2 - r_in_x^2), col = metric_cols[3])
}
labs1 <- as.character(round(mean(dt_plot2$reef_ROI_mean), 5))
labs1 <- ifelse(labs1 == "0", as.character(round(mean(dt_plot2$reef_ROI_mean), 7)), labs1)
text(x = 1.5*r_out0*cos((th1 + th2)/2*pi/180), y =1.5*r_out0*sin((th1 + th2)/2*pi/180), bquote(.(labs1)~m^2*"/$"), cex = lab_cex)

# past 180: need to switch to negative square root
# tot ROI
r_out <- mean(dt_plot2$tot_ROI_mean/dt_plot2$tot_ROI_max) + r_in
th1 <- 180 # starting angle (in degrees)
th2 <- 240 # ending angle (in degrees)
r_in_x <- seq(from = r_in*cos(th1*pi/180), to = r_in*cos(th2*pi/180), length.out = 100)
r_out_x <- seq(from = r_out*cos(th1*pi/180), to = r_out*cos(th2*pi/180), length.out = 100)
polygon(x = c(r_in_x, rev(r_out_x)), y = c(-sqrt(r_in^2 - r_in_x^2), rev(-sqrt(r_out^2 - r_out_x^2))), col = metric_cols[4], border = NA)
if(r_out == r_in){ # if r_out is equal to r_in (metric was zero), add a line with the color of this performance metric at zero
  lines(x = r_in_x, y = -sqrt(r_in^2 - r_in_x^2), col = metric_cols[4])
}
labs1 <- as.character(round(mean(dt_plot2$tot_ROI_mean), 4))
text(x = 1.5*r_out0*cos((th1 + th2)/2*pi/180), y =1.5*r_out0*sin((th1 + th2)/2*pi/180), bquote(.(labs1)~m^2*"/$"), cex = lab_cex)

#text(x = -r_out0, y =1.5*r_out0*sin((th1 + th2)/2*pi/180), as.character(round(mean(dt_plot2$tot_ROI_mean), 4)))

# tot costs saved
# r_out <- 1- (mean(dt_plot2$tot_costs/dt_plot2$tot_costs_min))^(-1) + r_in
r_out <- mean(dt_plot2$costs_saved/dt_plot2$costs_saved_max) + r_in
th1 <- 240 # starting angle (in degrees)
th2 <- 300 # ending angle (in degrees)
r_in_x <- seq(from = r_in*cos(th1*pi/180), to = r_in*cos(th2*pi/180), length.out = 100)
r_out_x <- seq(from = r_out*cos(th1*pi/180), to = r_out*cos(th2*pi/180), length.out = 100)
polygon(x = c(r_in_x, rev(r_out_x)), y = c(-sqrt(r_in^2 - r_in_x^2), rev(-sqrt(r_out^2 - r_out_x^2))), col = metric_cols[5], border = NA)
if(r_out == r_in){ # if r_out is equal to r_in (metric was zero), add a line with the color of this performance metric at zero
  lines(x = r_in_x, y = -sqrt(r_in^2 - r_in_x^2), col = metric_cols[5])
}
labs1 <- as.character(round(mean(dt_plot2$costs_saved), 0))
text(x = 0, y =1.15*r_out0*sin((th1 + th2)/2*pi/180), bquote("$"*.(labs1)), cex = lab_cex)
#text(x = 0, y =1.1*r_out0*sin((th1 + th2)/2*pi/180), as.character(round(mean(dt_plot2$tot_costs), 0)))


# recruits outplanted to reef
r_out <- mean(dt_plot2$reef_recruits_out_tot/dt_plot2$recruits_out_max) + r_in
th1 <- 300 # starting angle (in degrees)
th2 <- 360 # ending angle (in degrees)
r_in_x <- seq(from = r_in*cos(th1*pi/180), to = r_in*cos(th2*pi/180), length.out = 100)
r_out_x <- seq(from = r_out*cos(th1*pi/180), to = r_out*cos(th2*pi/180), length.out = 100)
polygon(x = c(r_in_x, rev(r_out_x)), y = c(-sqrt(r_in^2 - r_in_x^2), rev(-sqrt(r_out^2 - r_out_x^2))), col = metric_cols[6], border = NA)
if(r_out == r_in){ # if r_out is equal to r_in (metric was zero), add a line with the color of this performance metric at zero
  lines(x = r_in_x, y = -sqrt(r_in^2 - r_in_x^2), col = metric_cols[6])
}
labs1 <- as.character(round(mean(dt_plot2$reef_recruits_out_tot), 0))
text(x = 1.4*r_out0*cos((th1 + th2)/2*pi/180), y =1.4*r_out0*sin((th1 + th2)/2*pi/180), bquote(.(labs1)), cex = lab_cex)
#text(x = r_out0, y =1.5*r_out0*sin((th1 + th2)/2*pi/180), as.character(round(mean(dt_plot2$reef_recruits_out_tot), 0)))
  
}

```


NOTE: right now, the cases with zero reef cover are included but it's shown as being 0% of the max possible, even though the max possible is 0 (because the alternative is to have 0/0 which is NA so they aren't shown at all in the plot... not sure which is better). So reef cover looks far from the outer ring of the OHI plot because of all the parameter sets where reef cover = 0 so prop of max is 0. Some options could be to artifically increase the 0's to 0.0001 or something?


```{r}

# make the OHI plot for 5 years, no disturbance
pdf("TempFigs/OHI_5_D0.pdf", height = 7, width = 7)

ohi_fun(dt_plot = orch_exp_5_D0, opt_prop1 = orch_exp_5_D0_pmax)

dev.off()
```


```{r}
# repeat for 50 years no disturbance

pdf("TempFigs/OHI_50_D0.pdf", height = 7, width = 7)

ohi_fun(dt_plot = orch_exp_50_D0, opt_prop1 = orch_exp_50_D0_pmax)

dev.off()

```



```{r}

metric_cols <- c("#4477AA", "#AA3377", "#66CCEE", "#CCBB44","#EE6677", "#228833") # coral cover on reef, orchard function, reef ROI, total ROI, total costs, recruits outplanted to reef

# make a legend
pdf("TempFigs/OHI_legend.pdf", height = 7, width = 7)
plot(x = 1, y = 1, col = NA, xlab = NA, ylab = NA, xaxt = "n", yaxt = "n", bty = "n")#, bty = "n"
legend("topleft", legend = c(expression("Reef coral cover ("*m^2*")"), expression("Orchard function ("*m^2*" adults)"), expression("Reef ROI ("*m^2~"coral/$)"), "Total ROI ("*m^2~"coral/$)", "Costs saved ($)", "Reef recruits outplanted"), fill = metric_cols, bty = "n")
dev.off()
```



```{r}
 # try plotting the performance metrics on the x and y axes
# x = reef function, y = orchard function

dt_plot <- orch_exp_50_D0

plot(x = 0, y =0, type = "l", col = NA, xlim = c(0, max(dt_plot$reef_function_mean)), ylim = c(0, max(dt_plot$orch_function_mean)), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
mtext(side = 1, "Reef function", line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 2, "Orchard function", line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
for(i in 1:n_sample1){
  dt_sub <- dt_plot[which(dt_plot$par_rep==i),]
  for(j in 1:L1){
    points(x = dt_sub$reef_function_mean[which(dt_sub$prop_out==prop_set[j])], y = dt_sub$orch_function_mean[which(dt_sub$prop_out==prop_set[j])], col = adjustcolor(col = "black", alpha.f = 0.2))
  }

}



```




```{r}

# plot individual performance metrics

# metrics considered: 1) coral cover on reef, 2) orchard function, 3) reef ROI, 4) total ROI, 5) total costs, and 6) number of recruits outplanted to reef

dt_plot <- orch_exp_5_D0

lab_cx <- 0.85

pdf("TempFigs/metrics_5_D0.pdf", height = 7)

par(mfrow = c(3, 2))
layout(matrix(c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6), nrow = 3, ncol = 2, byrow = F), widths = rep(1, 2), heights = rep(1, 3))
#layout.show(2)
par(mar=c(0, 2, 3, 3), oma = c(4.5, 4.5, 2, 0))


# mean reef cover
xlab1 <- NA
ylab1 <- expression("Mean coral cover ("*m^2*")")
plotlab <- "a) Coral cover on reef"
plot(x = prop_set, y = rep(0, length(prop_set)), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, max(dt_plot$reef_cover_mean, na.rm = T)), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 2, ylab1, line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)
mtext(side = 3, "5 year simulation, no disturbance", outer = T, line = -1)
for(i in 1:n_sample1){
  dt_sub <- dt_plot[which(dt_plot$par_rep==i),]
  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$reef_cover_mean, col = adjustcolor(col = "black", alpha.f = 0.2))
}

# recruits outplanted to reef
xlab1 <- NA
ylab1 <- "Number of recruits"
plotlab <- "b) Recruits outplanted to reef"
plot(x = prop_set, y = rep(0, length(prop_set)), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, max(dt_plot$reef_recruits_out_tot, na.rm = T)), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 2, ylab1, line = 3.75, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)
for(i in 1:n_sample1){
  dt_sub <- dt_plot[which(dt_plot$par_rep==i),]
  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$reef_recruits_out_tot, col = adjustcolor(col = "black", alpha.f = 0.2))
}

# reef ROI
xlab1 <- "Proportion substrates initially outplanted to reef"
ylab1 <- expression("Reef ROI ("*m^2~"coral/$)")
plotlab <- "c) Reef ROI"
plot(x = prop_set, y = rep(0, length(prop_set)), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, max(dt_plot$reef_ROI_mean, na.rm = T)), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, outer = T, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 2, ylab1, line = 3.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)
for(i in 1:n_sample1){
  dt_sub <- dt_plot[which(dt_plot$par_rep==i),]
  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$reef_ROI_mean, col = adjustcolor(col = "black", alpha.f = 0.2))
}


# orchard function
xlab1 <- NA
ylab1 <- "Mean cover of \nlarge orchard corals"
plotlab <- "d) Orchard ecological function"
plot(x = prop_set, y = rep(0, length(prop_set)), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, max(dt_plot$orch_function_mean, na.rm = T)), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 2, ylab1, line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)
for(i in 1:n_sample1){
  dt_sub <- dt_plot[which(dt_plot$par_rep==i),]
  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$orch_function_mean, col = adjustcolor(col = "black", alpha.f = 0.2))
}


# total costs
xlab1 <- NA
ylab1 <- "$ saved"
plotlab <- "e) Costs saved"
plot(x = prop_set, y = rep(0, length(prop_set)), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, max(dt_plot$costs_saved, na.rm = T)), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 2, ylab1, line = 3.25, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)
for(i in 1:n_sample1){
  dt_sub <- dt_plot[which(dt_plot$par_rep==i),]
  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$costs_saved, col = adjustcolor(col = "black", alpha.f = 0.2))
}

# total ROI
xlab1 <- NA
ylab1 <- expression("Total ROI ("*m^2~"coral/$)")
plotlab <- "f) Total ROI (reef + orchard)"
plot(x = prop_set, y = rep(0, length(prop_set)), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, max(dt_plot$tot_ROI_mean, na.rm = T)), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 2, ylab1, line = 2.75, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)
for(i in 1:n_sample1){
  dt_sub <- dt_plot[which(dt_plot$par_rep==i),]
  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$tot_ROI_mean, col = adjustcolor(col = "black", alpha.f = 0.2))
}



# # cost to orchard reproduction (proportion of orchard reproductive potential achieved)
# xlab1 <- NA
# ylab1 <- "Prop. reproductive \npotential achieved"
# plotlab <- "e) Orchard reproduction"
# plot(x = prop_set, y = rep(0, length(prop_set)), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, max(dt_plot$orch_rep_cost, na.rm = T)), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
# mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
# mtext(side = 2, ylab1, line = 2.25, cex = lab_cx)
# mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)
# for(i in 1:n_sample1){
#   dt_sub <- dt_plot[which(dt_plot$par_rep==i),]
#   lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$orch_rep_cost, col = adjustcolor(col = "black", alpha.f = 0.2))
# }




dev.off()

```

costs: I think the little bump up at the end is when you have to collect from the reference reef bc there's not enough in the orchard, and then it goes down again when you get to 1 because then you aren't spending anything on orchard maintenance

over 50 years: orchard has time to fill up, so see high coral cover on reef even if nothing is initially outplanted to the reef. But still see highest when you put everything on the reef because you can collect from the reference reefs

also sometimes orchard rep can go over one because of the timeing in when the orchard fills up which depends on proportion being outplanted to the orchard

```{r}


# repeat for 50 year time scale

dt_plot <- orch_exp_50_D0

lab_cx <- 0.85

pdf("TempFigs/metrics_50_D0.pdf", height = 7)

par(mfrow = c(3, 2))
layout(matrix(c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6), nrow = 3, ncol = 2, byrow = F), widths = rep(1, 2), heights = rep(1, 3))
#layout.show(2)
par(mar=c(0, 2, 3, 3), oma = c(4.5, 4.5, 2, 0))


par(mfrow = c(3, 2))
layout(matrix(c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6), nrow = 3, ncol = 2, byrow = F), widths = rep(1, 2), heights = rep(1, 3))
#layout.show(2)
par(mar=c(0, 2, 3, 3), oma = c(4.5, 4.5, 2, 0))


# mean reef cover
xlab1 <- NA
ylab1 <- expression("Mean coral cover ("*m^2*")")
plotlab <- "a) Coral cover on reef"
plot(x = prop_set, y = rep(0, length(prop_set)), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, max(dt_plot$reef_cover_mean, na.rm = T)), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 2, ylab1, line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)
mtext(side = 3, "50 year simulation, no disturbance", outer = T, line = -1)
for(i in 1:n_sample1){
  dt_sub <- dt_plot[which(dt_plot$par_rep==i),]
  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$reef_cover_mean, col = adjustcolor(col = "black", alpha.f = 0.2))
}

# recruits outplanted to reef
xlab1 <- NA
ylab1 <- "Number of recruits"
plotlab <- "b) Recruits outplanted to reef"
plot(x = prop_set, y = rep(0, length(prop_set)), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, max(dt_plot$reef_recruits_out_tot, na.rm = T)), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 2, ylab1, line = 3.75, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)
for(i in 1:n_sample1){
  dt_sub <- dt_plot[which(dt_plot$par_rep==i),]
  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$reef_recruits_out_tot, col = adjustcolor(col = "black", alpha.f = 0.2))
}

# reef ROI
xlab1 <- "Proportion substrates initially outplanted to reef"
ylab1 <- expression("Reef ROI ("*m^2~"coral/$)")
plotlab <- "c) Reef ROI"
plot(x = prop_set, y = rep(0, length(prop_set)), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, max(dt_plot$reef_ROI_mean, na.rm = T)), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, outer = T, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 2, ylab1, line = 3.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)
for(i in 1:n_sample1){
  dt_sub <- dt_plot[which(dt_plot$par_rep==i),]
  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$reef_ROI_mean, col = adjustcolor(col = "black", alpha.f = 0.2))
}


# orchard function
xlab1 <- NA
ylab1 <- "Mean cover of \nlarge orchard corals"
plotlab <- "d) Orchard ecological function"
plot(x = prop_set, y = rep(0, length(prop_set)), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, max(dt_plot$orch_function_mean, na.rm = T)), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 2, ylab1, line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)

  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$orch_function_mean, col = adjustcolor(col = "black", alpha.f = 0.2))
}


# total costs saved
xlab1 <- NA
ylab1 <- "$ saved"
plotlab <- "e) Costs saved"
plot(x = prop_set, y = rep(0, length(prop_set)), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, max(dt_plot$costs_saved, na.rm = T)), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 2, ylab1, line = 3.25, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)

  dt_sub <- dt_plot[which(dt_plot$par_rep==i),]
  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$costs_saved, col = adjustcolor(col = "black", alpha.f = 0.2))
}

# total ROI
xlab1 <- NA
ylab1 <- expression("Total ROI ("*m^2~"coral/$)")
plotlab <- "f) Total ROI (reef + orchard)"
plot(x = prop_set, y = rep(0, length(prop_set)), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, max(dt_plot$tot_ROI_mean, na.rm = T)), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 2, ylab1, line = 2.75, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)
for(i in 1:n_sample1){
  dt_sub <- dt_plot[which(dt_plot$par_rep==i),]
  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$tot_ROI_mean, col = adjustcolor(col = "black", alpha.f = 0.2))
}


dev.off()

```




testing the ocean health index plots

```{r}
# polygon(x = c(r_in_x, rev(r_out_x)), y = c(-sqrt(r_in^2 - r_in_x^2), rev(-sqrt(r_out^2 - r_out_x^2))), col = "dodgerblue")
# 
# # cos(90*pi/180)
# # sin(90*pi/180)
# # cos(0)
# # sin(0)
# # 180* = pi radians --> x* = pi/180 radians


```

## with disturbance



```{r}

# run for 100 years because interested in both short-term (5 years) and long-term (100 years) but it's more efficient to just run everything once for 100 years

L1 <- 50
prop_set <- seq(from = 0, to = 1, length.out = L1) # proportion tiles outplanted to reef (can be higher than this if orchard gets full though)

orch_exp_list_D1 <- list()


# outer loop = demographic parameter values
# inner loop = proportion to outplant to the reef

tic()

for(i in 1:n_sample1){ # for each parameter set
  
  # set up the parameters
  
  surv_pars.r <- all_pars_R$surv_pars_L.r[[i]] 
  growth_pars.r <- all_pars_R$growth_pars_L.r[[i]]
  shrink_pars.r <- all_pars_R$shrink_pars_L.r[[i]] 
  frag_pars.r <- all_pars_R$frag_pars_L.r[[i]]
  surv_pars.o <- all_pars_R$surv_pars_L.o[[i]] 
  growth_pars.o <- all_pars_R$growth_pars_L.o[[i]]
  shrink_pars.o <- all_pars_R$shrink_pars_L.o[[i]]
  frag_pars.o <- all_pars_R$frag_pars_L.o[[i]]
  
  
  # update with disturbance effects
  # disturbance parameters
dist_yrs <- c(1:max(years))[c(F, F,T)] # years when disturbance occurs: once every 3 years

# effects of disturbance on each reef subpop
dist_effects.r <- list()
dist_effects.r[[1]] <- list() # list where each element is the effects of disturbance on corals from each source in the 1st reef subpop (either "survival" for survival, "Tmat" for growth/survival, "Fmat" for fragmentation, or "fecundity" for reproduction)
dist_effects.r[[1]][[1]] <- list() # effects of disturbances on corals from first source in first reef subpop
dist_effects.r[[1]][[1]] <- as.list(rep("survival", length(dist_yrs))) # effects of each disturbance on corals from first source in first reef subpop 
dist_effects.r[[1]][[2]] <- list() # second source
dist_effects.r[[1]][[2]] <- as.list(rep("survival", length(dist_yrs)))


surv_pars.r1 <- list() # first source (external recruits)
surv_pars.o1 <- list()

for(j in 1:length(dist_yrs)){ # for each year with a disturbance
  # update the survival parameters
  surv_pars.r1[[j]] <- surv_pars.r[[1]][[1]]*0.25 # note this is the same as the proportional reduction in reference reef production
  surv_pars.o1[[j]] <- surv_pars.o[[1]][[1]]*0.4

}


# disturbance parameters for each reef subpop (what happens to the population parameters at each disturbance eve)
dist_pars.r <- list()

# first reef population
dist_pars.r[[1]] <- list() 
# first source to second reef subpop
dist_pars.r[[1]][[1]] <- dist_pars_fun(dist_yrs = dist_yrs, dist_effects.r[[1]][[1]], dist_surv0 = surv_pars.r1, dist_Tmat0 = NULL, dist_Fmat0 = NULL, dist_fec0 = NULL) 
dist_pars.r[[1]][[2]] <- dist_pars_fun(dist_yrs = dist_yrs, dist_effects.r[[1]][[2]], dist_surv0 = surv_pars.r1, dist_Tmat0 = NULL, dist_Fmat0 = NULL, dist_fec0 = NULL)

# disturbance effects for each orchard subpop
dist_effects.o <- list()

dist_effects.o[[1]] <- list() 
dist_effects.o[[1]][[1]] <- list() # effects of disturbances on corals from first source in first orchard treatment
dist_effects.o[[1]][[1]] <- as.list(rep("survival", length(dist_yrs))) # effects of 1st disturbance on corals from first source in first reef subpop ([[1]][[1]][[2]] would be second disturbance, etc.)

# disturbance parameters for each orchard subpop
dist_pars.o <- list()

# first orchard treatment
dist_pars.o[[1]] <- list() 
# first source in first orchard treatment
dist_pars.o[[1]][[1]] <- dist_pars_fun(dist_yrs = dist_yrs, dist_effects.o[[1]][[1]], dist_surv0 = surv_pars.o1, dist_Tmat0 = NULL, dist_Fmat0 = NULL, dist_fec0 = NULL)
  
  
  # holding list for model simulations with this parameter set
  mod_list <- list()
  
  for(j in 1:length(prop_set)){ # for each proportion outplanted to reef
    
    rest_pars_ij <- rest_pars
    
    rest_pars_ij$reef_prop <- prop_set[j] # proportion of tiles outplanted to reef
    
    # run the model
    sim_ij <- rse_mod1(years, n, A_mids, surv_pars.r, dens_pars.r, growth_pars.r, shrink_pars.r, frag_pars.r, fec_pars.r, surv_pars.o, dens_pars.o, growth_pars.o, shrink_pars.o, frag_pars.o, fec_pars.o, lambda, lambda_R, sigma_s, sigma_f, ext_rand, seeds, dist_yrs, dist_pars.r, dist_effects.r, dist_pars.o, dist_effects.o, orchard_treatments, reef_treatments, lab_treatments, lab_pars, rest_pars_ij, N0.r, N0.o, N0.l)
    
    
    # save the output
    mod_list[[j]] <- sim_ij
    
  } # end of iterations over outplanting proportions
  
  
  orch_exp_list_D1[[i]] <- mod_list
  
} # end of iterations over parameter sets

toc()

# record each performance metrics at each time point (can later look at which proportion resulted in the max value of each metric at each time point)




```


```{r}
# check that this worked

# reef1_tot <- model_summ(model_sim = orch_exp_list_D1[[4]][[L1]], location = "reef", metric = "area_m2", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments))
# 
# orch1_tot <- model_summ(model_sim = orch_exp_list_D1[[4]][[L1]], location = "orchard", metric = "area_m2", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments))
# 
# 
# plot(x = c(1:years), y = orch1_tot, type = "l", las = 1, ylim = c(0, max(orch1_tot)), xlab = "year", ylab = "Area covered", lwd = 2)
# 
# 
# plot(x = c(1:years), y = reef1_tot, type = "l", las = 1, ylim = c(0, max(reef1_tot)), xlab = "year", ylab = "Area covered", lwd = 2)
# 
# plot(x = c(1:years), y = reef1_tot, type = "l", las = 1, ylim = c(0, max(max(reef1_tot), max(orch1_tot))), xlab = "year", ylab = "Area covered", lwd = 2)
# lines(x = c(1:years), y = orch1_tot, type = "l", col = "dodgerblue", lwd = 2, lty = 2)
# legend("topleft", legend = c("reef", "orchard"), col = c("black", "dodgerblue"), lwd = 2, lty = c(1, 2))

orch1_tot <- model_summ(model_sim = orch_exp_list_D1[[10]][[13]], location = "orchard", metric = "ind", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments), size_classes = c(3, 4, 5))

orch1_tot2 <- model_summ(model_sim = orch_exp_list_D1[[10]][[12]], location = "orchard", metric = "ind", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments), size_classes = c(3, 4, 5))


plot(x = c(1:years), y = orch1_tot, type = "l", las = 1, ylim = c(0, max(orch1_tot)), xlab = "year", ylab = "Adults", lwd = 2, col = "dodgerblue")
abline(h = rest_pars$orchard_size)
lines(x = c(1:years), y = orch1_tot2, lty = 2, col = "dodgerblue")

# is the weirdness because of density dependence? Why should there be more if there are fewer tiles being put on the orchard?

```

basic orchard dynamics are it reaches full adults (time point depends on proportion outplanted), then declines a little from there (full of substrates but some adults die/shrink). But when you have disturbance, the point where capacity is reached can get interrupted, so you can get weird relationships between proportion outplanted and time to full orchard depending on interaction btw disturbance years and year when undisturbed orchard would reach capacity. So instead maybe just look at year when orchard is 50% or 75% full, justification is that orchard doesn't stay full anyway

process results

```{r}
orch_exp_5_D1 <- orch_exp_metric_fun(sim_list = orch_exp_list_D1, n_sample1, L1, max_yr = 6, weights = weights1, dt_D0 = orch_exp_5_D0)

# View(orch_exp_5_D0)
# make this a function of the list, n_sample1, L1, and the time point of interest

# data frame for all the performance metrics at year 50 (use data from time points 2 through 51)
orch_exp_50_D1 <- orch_exp_metric_fun(sim_list = orch_exp_list_D1, n_sample1, L1, max_yr = 51, weights = weights1, dt_D0 = orch_exp_50_D0)
```




```{r}


dt_plot <- orch_exp_5_D1

plot(x = prop_set, y = rep(0, length(prop_set)), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, 1), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
mtext(side = 1, "Proportion initially outplanted to reef", line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 2, "Strategy score", line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
#mtext(side = 3, "5 year simulation, no disturbance", outer = T, line = -1)
for(i in 1:n_sample1){
  dt_sub <- dt_plot[which(dt_plot$par_rep==i),]
  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$strategy_score, col = adjustcolor(col = "black", alpha.f = 0.2))
}
# add the mean in blue
mean_score <- dt_plot %>% group_by(prop_out) %>% summarize(strategy_score = mean(strategy_score, na.rm = T))
lines(x = mean_score$prop_out, y = mean_score$strategy_score, col = "blue", lwd = 2)
abline(v = prop_set[which(mean_score$strategy_score == max(mean_score$strategy_score))], col = "blue", lty = 2)


#View(mean_score)
orch_exp_5_D1_pmax <- mean_score$prop_out[which(mean_score$strategy_score == max(mean_score$strategy_score))]

dt_plot <- orch_exp_50_D1

plot(x = prop_set, y = rep(0, length(prop_set)), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, 1), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
mtext(side = 1, "Proportion initially outplanted to reef", line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 2, "Strategy score", line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
#mtext(side = 3, "5 year simulation, no disturbance", outer = T, line = -1)
for(i in 1:n_sample1){
  dt_sub <- dt_plot[which(dt_plot$par_rep==i),]
  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$strategy_score, col = adjustcolor(col = "black", alpha.f = 0.2))
}
# add the mean in blue
mean_score <- dt_plot %>% group_by(prop_out) %>% summarize(strategy_score = mean(strategy_score, na.rm = T))
lines(x = mean_score$prop_out, y = mean_score$strategy_score, col = "blue", lwd = 2)
abline(v = prop_set[which(mean_score$strategy_score == max(mean_score$strategy_score))], col = "blue", lty = 2)


orch_exp_50_D1_pmax <- mean_score$prop_out[which(mean_score$strategy_score == max(mean_score$strategy_score))]


```


check the costs

```{r}

dt_plot <- orch_exp_5_D1

# 
# par(mfrow = c(3, 2))
# layout(matrix(c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6), nrow = 3, ncol = 2, byrow = F), widths = rep(1, 2), heights = rep(1, 3))

# par(mar=c(0, 2, 3, 3), oma = c(4.5, 4.5, 2, 0))
# 


xlab1 <- NA
#ylab1 <- "$"
ylab1 <- NA
plotlab <- "Fixed costs"
c_choice <- "c_fixed"
plot(x = prop_set, y = rep(0, length(prop_set)), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(min(dt_plot[,which(colnames(dt_plot)==c_choice)], na.rm = T), max(dt_plot[,which(colnames(dt_plot)==c_choice)], na.rm = T)), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)

mtext(side = 2, ylab1, line = 3.25, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)

  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub[,which(colnames(dt_plot)==c_choice)], col = adjustcolor(col = "black", alpha.f = 0.2))
}
```

```{r}
axis(side = 1, at = c(0, 0.2, 0.4, 0.6, 0.8, 1), labels = NA)

lines(x = mean_score$prop_out, y = mean_score$strategy_score, col = "blue", lwd = 2)

dev.off()
```

try plotting reef cover as a proportion of max possible vs. orchard function as a proportion of max possible (just for cases where reef cover is > 0)

```{r}
# for each parameter set where reef cover is greater than zero, calculate the max value of reef cover, orchard function, reef ROI, and tot ROI. Then rescale everything relative to these maxes. Then get the average rescaled values across parameter sets. So should end up with a data set with proportion outplanted 


scaled_50_D0 <- orch_exp_50_D0 %>% filter(is.na(strategy_score) == F) %>% group_by(par_rep) %>% mutate(reef_cover_max = max(reef_cover_mean), orchard_fun_max = max(orch_function_mean), reef_ROI_max = max(reef_ROI_mean), tot_ROI_max = max(tot_ROI_mean)) %>% ungroup() %>% mutate(reef_cover_s = reef_cover_mean/reef_cover_max, orchard_fun_s = orch_function_mean/orchard_fun_max, reef_ROI_s = reef_ROI_mean/reef_ROI_max, tot_ROI_s = tot_ROI_mean/tot_ROI_max) %>% group_by(prop_out) %>% summarize(reef_cover_s = mean(reef_cover_s), orchard_fun_s = mean(orchard_fun_s), reef_ROI_s = mean(reef_ROI_s), tot_ROI_s = mean(tot_ROI_s)) %>% ungroup()

scaled_5_D0 <- orch_exp_5_D0 %>% filter(is.na(strategy_score) == F) %>% group_by(par_rep) %>% mutate(reef_cover_max = max(reef_cover_mean), orchard_fun_max = max(orch_function_mean), reef_ROI_max = max(reef_ROI_mean), tot_ROI_max = max(tot_ROI_mean)) %>% ungroup() %>% mutate(reef_cover_s = reef_cover_mean/reef_cover_max, orchard_fun_s = orch_function_mean/orchard_fun_max, reef_ROI_s = reef_ROI_mean/reef_ROI_max, tot_ROI_s = tot_ROI_mean/tot_ROI_max) %>% group_by(prop_out) %>% summarize(reef_cover_s = mean(reef_cover_s), orchard_fun_s = mean(orchard_fun_s), reef_ROI_s = mean(reef_ROI_s), tot_ROI_s = mean(tot_ROI_s)) %>% ungroup()

# for the with-disturbance cases, need to scale relative to the maxes from the no disturbance case
scaled_50_D1 <- orch_exp_50_D0 %>% filter(is.na(strategy_score) == F) %>% group_by(par_rep) %>% mutate(reef_cover_max = max(reef_cover_mean), orchard_fun_max = max(orch_function_mean), reef_ROI_max = max(reef_ROI_mean), tot_ROI_max = max(tot_ROI_mean)) %>% ungroup() %>% select(par_rep, prop_out, reef_cover_max, orchard_fun_max, reef_ROI_max, tot_ROI_max) %>% left_join(orch_exp_50_D1, by = c("par_rep","prop_out")) %>% mutate(reef_cover_s = reef_cover_mean/reef_cover_max, orchard_fun_s = orch_function_mean/orchard_fun_max, reef_ROI_s = reef_ROI_mean/reef_ROI_max, tot_ROI_s = tot_ROI_mean/tot_ROI_max) %>% group_by(prop_out) %>% summarize(reef_cover_s = mean(reef_cover_s), orchard_fun_s = mean(orchard_fun_s), reef_ROI_s = mean(reef_ROI_s), tot_ROI_s = mean(tot_ROI_s)) %>% ungroup()

scaled_5_D1 <- orch_exp_5_D0 %>% filter(is.na(strategy_score) == F) %>% group_by(par_rep) %>% mutate(reef_cover_max = max(reef_cover_mean), orchard_fun_max = max(orch_function_mean), reef_ROI_max = max(reef_ROI_mean), tot_ROI_max = max(tot_ROI_mean)) %>% ungroup() %>% select(par_rep, prop_out, reef_cover_max, orchard_fun_max, reef_ROI_max, tot_ROI_max) %>% left_join(orch_exp_5_D1, by = c("par_rep","prop_out")) %>% mutate(reef_cover_s = reef_cover_mean/reef_cover_max, orchard_fun_s = orch_function_mean/orchard_fun_max, reef_ROI_s = reef_ROI_mean/reef_ROI_max, tot_ROI_s = tot_ROI_mean/tot_ROI_max) %>% group_by(prop_out) %>% summarize(reef_cover_s = mean(reef_cover_s), orchard_fun_s = mean(orchard_fun_s), reef_ROI_s = mean(reef_ROI_s), tot_ROI_s = mean(tot_ROI_s)) %>% ungroup()


#colnames(orch_exp_5_D0)
# # reef cover
# reef_cover_mx <- dt %>% group_by(par_val) %>% mutate(max_val = max(reef_cover_mean), cv_val = sd(reef_cover_mean)/mean(reef_cover_mean)) %>% ungroup() %>% filter(reef_cover_mean == max_val)
 

# make color palettes for with and without disturbance cases
nHalf <- length(unique(scaled_50_D0$prop_out))
Max <- 1
Min <- 0
rc1 <- colorRampPalette(colors = c("gray90", "black"), space = "Lab")(nHalf)
rampcols1 <- c(rc1) # all the colors

rc2 <- colorRampPalette(colors = c("#FF4747", "#660202"), space = "Lab")(nHalf)
rampcols1 <- c(rc2) # all the colors
# get the color breaks
#rb1 <- seq(Min, Max, length.out = nHalf + 1)
#rampbreaks1 <- c(rb1)

prop_col <- "black"
prop_col2 <- rc2[10]


pdf("TempFigs/scaled_orch_fun_reef_cover.pdf", height = 4, width = 7)

par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
layout(matrix(c(1, 2), nrow = 1, ncol = 2, byrow = T), widths = rep(1, 2), heights = rep(1, 1))
#layout.show(2)
par(mar=c(0, 1, 2.5, 0), oma = c(4.5, 2.5, 0.1, 0.1))


dt_plot0 <- scaled_5_D0
dt_plot1 <- scaled_5_D1

plot(x = dt_plot0$reef_cover_s, y = dt_plot0$orchard_fun_s, col = prop_col, xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA, type = "l")
lines(x = dt_plot1$reef_cover_s, y = dt_plot1$orchard_fun_s, pch = 16, col = prop_col2)
mtext(side = 1, "Scaled reef cover", line = 2, outer = T)
mtext(side = 2, "Scaled orchard function", line = 2.5)
mtext(side = 3, "5 year simulation")
for(i in 1:nrow(dt_plot0)){
  points(x = dt_plot0$reef_cover_s[i], y = dt_plot0$orchard_fun_s[i], pch = 16, col = rc1[i]) # col = adjustcolor(prop_col, alpha.f = dt_plot0$prop_out[i])
  points(x = dt_plot1$reef_cover_s[i], y = dt_plot1$orchard_fun_s[i], pch = 16, col = rc2[i])
}
legend("topright", legend = c("none", "every 3 years"), col = c(prop_col, prop_col2), lwd =3, title = "Disturbance")

dt_plot0 <- scaled_50_D0
dt_plot1 <- scaled_50_D1

plot(x = dt_plot0$reef_cover_s, y = dt_plot0$orchard_fun_s, col = prop_col, xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA, type = "l", yaxt = "n")
axis(side = 2, at = seq(from = 0, to = 1, by = 0.2), labels = NA)
lines(x = dt_plot1$reef_cover_s, y = dt_plot1$orchard_fun_s, pch = 16, col = prop_col2)
mtext(side = 3, "50 year simulation")
#mtext(side = 1, "Scaled reef cover", line = 2)
#mtext(side = 2, "Scaled orchard function", line = 2)
for(i in 1:nrow(dt_plot0)){
  points(x = dt_plot0$reef_cover_s[i], y = dt_plot0$orchard_fun_s[i], pch = 16, col = rc1[i])
  points(x = dt_plot1$reef_cover_s[i], y = dt_plot1$orchard_fun_s[i], pch = 16, col = rc2[i])
}


dev.off()


pdf("TempFigs/scaled_reef_cover_reef_ROI.pdf", height = 4, width = 7)

par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
layout(matrix(c(1, 2), nrow = 1, ncol = 2, byrow = T), widths = rep(1, 2), heights = rep(1, 1))
#layout.show(2)
par(mar=c(0, 1, 2.5, 0), oma = c(4.5, 2.5, 0.1, 0.1))


dt_plot0 <- scaled_5_D0
dt_plot1 <- scaled_5_D1

plot(x = dt_plot0$reef_cover_s, y = dt_plot0$reef_ROI_s, col = prop_col, xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA, type = "l")
lines(x = dt_plot1$reef_cover_s, y = dt_plot1$reef_ROI_s, pch = 16, col = prop_col2)
mtext(side = 1, "Scaled reef cover", line = 2, outer = T)
mtext(side = 2, "Scaled reef ROI", line = 2)
mtext(side = 3, "5 year simulation")
for(i in 1:nrow(dt_plot0)){
  points(x = dt_plot0$reef_cover_s[i], y = dt_plot0$reef_ROI_s[i], pch = 16, col = rc1[i])
  points(x = dt_plot1$reef_cover_s[i], y = dt_plot1$reef_ROI_s[i], pch = 16, col = rc2[i])
}
legend("topleft", legend = c("none", "every 3 years"), col = c(prop_col, prop_col2), lwd =3, title = "Disturbance")

dt_plot0 <- scaled_50_D0
dt_plot1 <- scaled_50_D1

plot(x = dt_plot0$reef_cover_s, y = dt_plot0$reef_ROI_s, col = prop_col, xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA, type = "l", yaxt = "n")
axis(side = 2, at = seq(from = 0, to = 1, by = 0.2), labels = NA)
lines(x = dt_plot1$reef_cover_s, y = dt_plot1$reef_ROI_s, pch = 16, col = prop_col2)
mtext(side = 3, "50 year simulation")
#mtext(side = 1, "Scaled reef cover", line = 2)
#mtext(side = 2, "Scaled reef ROI", line = 2)
for(i in 1:nrow(dt_plot0)){
  points(x = dt_plot0$reef_cover_s[i], y = dt_plot0$reef_ROI_s[i], pch = 16, col = rc1[i])
  points(x = dt_plot1$reef_cover_s[i], y = dt_plot1$reef_ROI_s[i], pch = 16, col = rc2[i])
}

dev.off()




pdf("TempFigs/scaled_reef_cover_tot_ROI.pdf", height = 4, width = 7)

par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
layout(matrix(c(1, 2), nrow = 1, ncol = 2, byrow = T), widths = rep(1, 2), heights = rep(1, 1))
#layout.show(2)
par(mar=c(0, 1, 2.5, 0), oma = c(4.5, 2.5, 0.1, 0.1))


dt_plot0 <- scaled_5_D0
dt_plot1 <- scaled_5_D1

plot(x = dt_plot0$reef_cover_s, y = dt_plot0$tot_ROI_s, col = prop_col, xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA, type = "l")

mtext(side = 1, "Scaled reef cover", line = 2, outer = T)
mtext(side = 2, "Scaled total ROI", line = 2)
mtext(side = 3, "5 year simulation")
for(i in 1:nrow(dt_plot0)){
  points(x = dt_plot0$reef_cover_s[i], y = dt_plot0$tot_ROI_s[i], pch = 16, col = rc1[i])
  points(x = dt_plot1$reef_cover_s[i], y = dt_plot1$tot_ROI_s[i], pch = 16, col = rc2[i])
}
legend("topright", legend = c("none", "every 3 years"), col = c(prop_col, prop_col2), lwd =3, title = "Disturbance")

dt_plot0 <- scaled_50_D0
dt_plot1 <- scaled_50_D1

plot(x = dt_plot0$reef_cover_s, y = dt_plot0$tot_ROI_s, col = prop_col, xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA, type = "l", yaxt = "n")
axis(side = 2, at = seq(from = 0, to = 1, by = 0.2), labels = NA)
lines(x = dt_plot1$reef_cover_s, y = dt_plot1$tot_ROI_s, pch = 16, col = prop_col2)

```

show all the metrics

```{r}

# plot individual performance metrics

# metrics considered: 1) coral cover on reef, 2) orchard function, 3) reef ROI, 4) total ROI, 5) total costs, and 6) number of recruits outplanted to reef

dt_plot0 <- orch_exp_5_D0
dt_plot1 <- orch_exp_5_D1

lty.mn <- 2

Dcols <- c("black", "red") # no disturbance, with disturbance

alpha1 <- 0.1

lab_cx <- 0.85

pdf("TempFigs/metrics_5_D1.pdf", height = 7)

par(mfrow = c(3, 2))
layout(matrix(c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6), nrow = 3, ncol = 2, byrow = F), widths = rep(1, 2), heights = rep(1, 3))
#layout.show(2)
par(mar=c(0, 2, 3, 3), oma = c(4.5, 4.5, 2, 0))


# mean reef cover
xlab1 <- NA
ylab1 <- expression("Mean coral cover ("*m^2*")")
plotlab <- "a) Coral cover on reef"
plot(x = prop_set, y = rep(0, length(prop_set)), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, max(c(dt_plot0$reef_cover_mean, dt_plot1$reef_cover_mean), na.rm = T)), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 2, ylab1, line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)
mtext(side = 3, "5 year simulation", outer = T, line = -1)
for(i in 1:n_sample1){
  dt_sub <- dt_plot0[which(dt_plot0$par_rep==i),]
  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$reef_cover_mean, col = adjustcolor(col = Dcols[1], alpha.f = alpha1))
}
dt_mean <- dt_plot0 %>% group_by(prop_out) %>% summarize(mean_val = mean(reef_cover_mean, na.rm = T))
lines(x = dt_mean$prop_out, y = dt_mean$mean_val, col = Dcols[1], lwd = 2.5, lty = lty.mn)
for(i in 1:n_sample1){
  dt_sub <- dt_plot1[which(dt_plot1$par_rep==i),]
  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$reef_cover_mean, col = adjustcolor(col = Dcols[2], alpha.f = alpha1))
}
dt_mean <- dt_plot1 %>% group_by(prop_out) %>% summarize(mean_val = mean(reef_cover_mean, na.rm = T))
lines(x = dt_mean$prop_out, y = dt_mean$mean_val, col = Dcols[2], lwd = 2.5, lty = lty.mn)
legend("topleft", legend = c("none", "every 3 years"), col = Dcols, lwd = 2, title = "Disturbance")

# recruits outplanted to reef
xlab1 <- NA
ylab1 <- "Number of recruits"
plotlab <- "b) Recruits outplanted to reef"
plot(x = prop_set, y = rep(0, length(prop_set)), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, max(c(dt_plot0$reef_recruits_out_tot, dt_plot1$reef_recruits_out_tot), na.rm = T)), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 2, ylab1, line = 3.75, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)
for(i in 1:n_sample1){
  dt_sub <- dt_plot0[which(dt_plot0$par_rep==i),]
  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$reef_recruits_out_tot, col = adjustcolor(col = Dcols[1], alpha.f = alpha1))
}
dt_mean <- dt_plot0 %>% group_by(prop_out) %>% summarize(mean_val = mean(reef_recruits_out_tot, na.rm = T))
lines(x = dt_mean$prop_out, y = dt_mean$mean_val, col = Dcols[1], lwd = 2.5, lty = lty.mn)
for(i in 1:n_sample1){
  dt_sub <- dt_plot1[which(dt_plot1$par_rep==i),]
  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$reef_recruits_out_tot, col = adjustcolor(col = Dcols[2], alpha.f = alpha1))
}
dt_mean <- dt_plot1 %>% group_by(prop_out) %>% summarize(mean_val = mean(reef_recruits_out_tot, na.rm = T))
lines(x = dt_mean$prop_out, y = dt_mean$mean_val, col = Dcols[2], lwd = 2.5, lty = lty.mn)

# reef ROI
xlab1 <- "Proportion substrates initially outplanted to reef"
ylab1 <- expression("Reef ROI ("*m^2~"coral/$)")
plotlab <- "c) Reef ROI"
plot(x = prop_set, y = rep(0, length(prop_set)), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, max(c(dt_plot0$reef_ROI_mean, dt_plot1$reef_ROI_mean), na.rm = T)), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, outer = T, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 2, ylab1, line = 3.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)
for(i in 1:n_sample1){
  dt_sub <- dt_plot0[which(dt_plot0$par_rep==i),]
  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$reef_ROI_mean, col = adjustcolor(col = Dcols[1], alpha.f = alpha1))
}
dt_mean <- dt_plot0 %>% group_by(prop_out) %>% summarize(mean_val = mean(reef_ROI_mean, na.rm = T))
lines(x = dt_mean$prop_out, y = dt_mean$mean_val, col = Dcols[1], lwd = 2.5, lty = lty.mn)
for(i in 1:n_sample1){
  dt_sub <- dt_plot1[which(dt_plot1$par_rep==i),]
  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$reef_ROI_mean, col = adjustcolor(col = Dcols[2], alpha.f = alpha1))
}
dt_mean <- dt_plot1 %>% group_by(prop_out) %>% summarize(mean_val = mean(reef_ROI_mean, na.rm = T))
lines(x = dt_mean$prop_out, y = dt_mean$mean_val, col = Dcols[2], lwd = 2.5, lty = lty.mn)


# orchard function
xlab1 <- NA
ylab1 <- "Mean cover of \nlarge orchard corals"
plotlab <- "d) Orchard ecological function"
plot(x = prop_set, y = rep(0, length(prop_set)), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, max(c(dt_plot0$orch_function_mean, dt_plot1$orch_function_mean), na.rm = T)), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 2, ylab1, line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)
for(i in 1:n_sample1){
  dt_sub <- dt_plot0[which(dt_plot0$par_rep==i),]
  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$orch_function_mean, col = adjustcolor(col = Dcols[1], alpha.f = alpha1))
}
dt_mean <- dt_plot0 %>% group_by(prop_out) %>% summarize(mean_val = mean(orch_function_mean, na.rm = T))
lines(x = dt_mean$prop_out, y = dt_mean$mean_val, col = Dcols[1], lwd = 2.5, lty = lty.mn)
for(i in 1:n_sample1){
  dt_sub <- dt_plot1[which(dt_plot1$par_rep==i),]
  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$orch_function_mean, col = adjustcolor(col = Dcols[2], alpha.f = alpha1))
}
dt_mean <- dt_plot1 %>% group_by(prop_out) %>% summarize(mean_val = mean(orch_function_mean, na.rm = T))
lines(x = dt_mean$prop_out, y = dt_mean$mean_val, col = Dcols[2], lwd = 2.5, lty = lty.mn)


# costs saved
xlab1 <- NA
ylab1 <- "$ saved"
plotlab <- "e) Costs saved"
plot(x = prop_set, y = rep(0, length(prop_set)), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, max(c(dt_plot0$costs_saved, dt_plot1$costs_saved), na.rm = T)), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 2, ylab1, line = 3.25, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)
for(i in 1:n_sample1){
  dt_sub <- dt_plot0[which(dt_plot0$par_rep==i),]
  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$costs_saved, col = adjustcolor(col = Dcols[1], alpha.f = alpha1))
}
dt_mean <- dt_plot0 %>% group_by(prop_out) %>% summarize(mean_val = mean(costs_saved, na.rm = T))
lines(x = dt_mean$prop_out, y = dt_mean$mean_val, col = Dcols[1], lwd = 2.5, lty = lty.mn)
for(i in 1:n_sample1){
  dt_sub <- dt_plot1[which(dt_plot1$par_rep==i),]
  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$costs_saved, col = adjustcolor(col = Dcols[2], alpha.f = alpha1))
}
dt_mean <- dt_plot1 %>% group_by(prop_out) %>% summarize(mean_val = mean(costs_saved, na.rm = T))
lines(x = dt_mean$prop_out, y = dt_mean$mean_val, col = Dcols[2], lwd = 2.5, lty = lty.mn)

# total ROI
xlab1 <- NA
ylab1 <- expression("Total ROI ("*m^2~"coral/$)")
plotlab <- "f) Total ROI (reef + orchard)"
plot(x = prop_set, y = rep(0, length(prop_set)), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, max(c(dt_plot0$tot_ROI_mean, dt_plot1$tot_ROI_mean), na.rm = T)), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 2, ylab1, line = 2.75, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)
for(i in 1:n_sample1){
  dt_sub <- dt_plot0[which(dt_plot0$par_rep==i),]
  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$tot_ROI_mean, col = adjustcolor(col = Dcols[1], alpha.f = alpha1))
}
dt_mean <- dt_plot0 %>% group_by(prop_out) %>% summarize(mean_val = mean(tot_ROI_mean, na.rm = T))
lines(x = dt_mean$prop_out, y = dt_mean$mean_val, col = Dcols[1], lwd = 2.5, lty = lty.mn)
for(i in 1:n_sample1){
  dt_sub <- dt_plot1[which(dt_plot1$par_rep==i),]
  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$tot_ROI_mean, col = adjustcolor(col = Dcols[2], alpha.f = alpha1))
}
dt_mean <- dt_plot1 %>% group_by(prop_out) %>% summarize(mean_val = mean(tot_ROI_mean, na.rm = T))
lines(x = dt_mean$prop_out, y = dt_mean$mean_val, col = Dcols[2], lwd = 2.5, lty = lty.mn)

dev.off()

```


```{r}


# 50 year timescale

dt_plot0 <- orch_exp_50_D0
dt_plot1 <- orch_exp_50_D1


lab_cx <- 0.85

pdf("TempFigs/metrics_50_D1.pdf", height = 7)

par(mfrow = c(3, 2))
layout(matrix(c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6), nrow = 3, ncol = 2, byrow = F), widths = rep(1, 2), heights = rep(1, 3))
#layout.show(2)
par(mar=c(0, 2, 3, 3), oma = c(4.5, 4.5, 2, 0))


# mean reef cover
xlab1 <- NA
ylab1 <- expression("Mean coral cover ("*m^2*")")
plotlab <- "a) Coral cover on reef"
plot(x = prop_set, y = rep(0, length(prop_set)), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, max(c(dt_plot0$reef_cover_mean, dt_plot1$reef_cover_mean), na.rm = T)), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 2, ylab1, line = 2.5, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)
mtext(side = 3, "50 year simulation", outer = T, line = -1)
for(i in 1:n_sample1){
  dt_sub <- dt_plot0[which(dt_plot0$par_rep==i),]
  lines(x = dt_sub$prop_out, y = dt_sub$reef_cover_mean, col = adjustcolor(col = Dcols[1], alpha.f = alpha1))
}

lines(x = dt_mean$prop_out, y = dt_mean$mean_val, col = Dcols[1], lwd = 2.5, lty = lty.mn)
```

## time series

start by just using the mean parameter values and 0, 1, and maybe 0.5 as the proportions. 

```{r}

dist_yrs <- NA

# demographic parameters for each orchard and reef
field_surv1 <- field_surv
field_growth1 <- field_growth
nurs_surv1 <- nurs_surv
nurs_growth1 <- nurs_growth

# nursery data only available for size classes 1-2, so use the field data for the larger size classes
nurs_surv1$SC_surv_summ_df <- nurs_surv1$SC_surv_summ_df %>% filter(size_class < 3) %>% rbind(field_surv1$SC_surv_summ_df[field_surv1$SC_surv_summ_df$size_class > 2,])

nurs_growth1$summ_list[[3]] <- field_growth1$summ_list[[3]]
nurs_growth1$summ_list[[4]] <- field_growth1$summ_list[[4]]
nurs_growth1$summ_list[[5]] <- field_growth1$summ_list[[5]]

# calculate mean parameter values (survival, growth, shrinkage, fragmentation) for each 
all_pars <- default_pars_fun(n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments), summ_metric_list = list(field_surv = "mean", field_growth = "mean", field_shrink = "mean", field_frag = "mean", nurs_surv = "mean", nurs_growth = "mean", nurs_shrink = "mean"), field_surv1, field_growth1, nurs_surv1, nurs_growth1, apal_frag_summ)

# run for 100 years because interested in both short-term (5 years) and long-term (100 years) but it's more efficient to just run everything once for 100 years

prop_set_short <- c(0.01, 0.5, 0.99) # proportion tiles outplanted to reef (can be higher than this if orchard gets full though)

orch_exp_mean <- list()


# outer loop = demographic parameter values
# inner loop = proportion to outplant to the reef


for(i in 1:1){ # for each parameter set
  
  # set up the parameters
  
  surv_pars.r <- all_pars$surv_pars.r
  growth_pars.r <- all_pars$growth_pars.r
  shrink_pars.r <- all_pars$shrink_pars.r
  frag_pars.r <- all_pars$frag_pars.r
  surv_pars.o <- all_pars$surv_pars.o
# surv_pars.o <- list(list(c(1, 1, 1, 1, 1)))
  growth_pars.o <- all_pars$growth_pars.o
  shrink_pars.o <- all_pars$shrink_pars.o
  frag_pars.o <- all_pars$frag_pars.o
  
  # holding list for model simulations with this parameter set
  mod_list <- list()
  
  for(j in 1:length(prop_set_short)){ # for each proportion outplanted to reef
    
    rest_pars_ij <- rest_pars
    
    rest_pars_ij$reef_prop <- prop_set_short[j] # proportion of tiles outplanted to reef
    
   # rest_pars_ij$orchard_size <- 100000*30 # see what happens if the orchard has no limits
    
    # run the model
    sim_ij <- rse_mod1(years, n, A_mids, surv_pars.r, dens_pars.r, growth_pars.r, shrink_pars.r, frag_pars.r, fec_pars.r, surv_pars.o, dens_pars.o, growth_pars.o, shrink_pars.o, frag_pars.o, fec_pars.o, lambda, lambda_R, sigma_s, sigma_f, ext_rand, seeds, dist_yrs, dist_pars.r, dist_effects.r, dist_pars.o, dist_effects.o, orchard_treatments, reef_treatments, lab_treatments, lab_pars, rest_pars_ij, N0.r, N0.o, N0.l)
    
    
    # save the output
    mod_list[[j]] <- sim_ij
    
  } # end of iterations over outplanting proportions
  
  
  orch_exp_mean[[i]] <- mod_list
  
} # end of iterations over parameter sets



# record each performance metrics at each time point (can later look at which proportion resulted in the max value of each metric at each time point)




```


```{r}
# plot time series of orchard functional cover, reef cover, how full the orchard is, how many tiles are being outplanted total (with horizontal line for full lab)

prop_cols <- c("#FEC44F", "#CC4C02", "#662506")

xlab1 <- "Proportion substrates initially outplanted to reef"
ylab1 <- expression("Reef cover ("*m^2*")")
#plotlab <- "c) Reef ROI"
plot(x = c(1:years), y = rep(0, years), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, 60), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, outer = T, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 2, ylab1, line = 3.5, cex = lab_cx)
#mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)
for(j in 1:length(prop_set_short)){
  sim_ij <- orch_exp_mean[[1]][[j]] 
  reef_cover_ij <- model_summ(model_sim = sim_ij, location = "reef", metric = "area_m2", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments))
  
  lines(x = c(1:years), y = reef_cover_ij, col = prop_cols[j], lwd = 2)
}
legend("topleft", legend = c("1", "50", "99"), col = prop_cols, lwd = 3, title = "% Initially \noutplanted to reef", bty = "n", cex = 0.75, inset = c(0, 0.1))

mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, outer = T, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 2, ylab1, line = 3.5, cex = lab_cx)
#mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)

  sim_ij <- orch_exp_mean[[1]][[j]] 
 orch_fun_ij <- model_summ(model_sim = sim_ij, location = "orchard", metric = "area_m2", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments), size_classes = c(3, 4, 5))
  
  lines(x = c(1:years), y = orch_fun_ij, col = prop_cols[j], lwd = 2)
 # lines(x = c(1:years), y = sim_ij$orchard_tiles_out, col = prop_cols[j], lwd = 2, lty = 2)
}


xlab1 <- "Proportion substrates initially outplanted to reef"
ylab1 <- "Substrates in orchard"
#plotlab <- "c) Reef ROI"
plot(x = c(1:years), y = rep(0, years), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, rest_pars$orchard_size), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, outer = T, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 2, ylab1, line = 3.5, cex = lab_cx)
#mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)
for(j in 1:length(prop_set_short)){
  sim_ij <- orch_exp_mean[[1]][[j]] 
  lines(x = c(1:years), y = sim_ij$orchard_tiles[[1]], col = prop_cols[j], lwd = 2)
}
abline(h = rest_pars$orchard_size, lty = 2)


xlab1 <- "Proportion substrates initially outplanted to reef"
ylab1 <- "Substrates used"
#plotlab <- "c) Reef ROI"
plot(x = c(1:years), y = rep(0, years), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, rest_pars$lab_max), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA)
mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, outer = T, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 2, ylab1, line = 3.5, cex = lab_cx)
#mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)
for(j in 1:length(prop_set_short)){
  sim_ij <- orch_exp_mean[[1]][[j]] 
  lines(x = c(1:years), y = sim_ij$tiles_out_tot, col = prop_cols[j], lwd = 2)
}
abline(h = rest_pars$lab_max, lty = 2)


# tiles outplanted to orchard

# check number of individuals in smallest size class in orchard
```
