```{r}
#   
#   lines(x = c(1:years), y = orch_fun_ij, col = prop_cols[j], lwd = 2)
#   lines(x = c(1:years), y = sim_ij$orchard_tiles_out, col = prop_cols[j], lwd = 2, lty = 2)
# }


```

Orchard decline doesn't happen if 1) the orchard is huge so it never fills, or 2) the corals in the orchard never die, BUT it does still happen if just density dependent mortality is turned off. So I think it just happens because initially you put out a bunch of full substrates, and those corals start to die (remember there's no fragmentation in the orchard right now, so the population can't grow on its own), so there's fewer corals per substrate. And eventually you start adding more substrates to keep it full, but it's just little bursts that don't cause the same big increase because at that point most of the substrates in the orchard just have a few corals
-- update: further supported by varying fragmentation rates and checking lambda values (orchard doesn't decline if fragmentation is great enough that lambda > 1)

## sensitivity


-- reference reef supply
-- lab capacity
-- orchard capacity
-- orchard fecundity, orchard fecundity x reference reef supply (i.e., with and without reference reef supply?)
-- survival of the smallest size class on the reef (relevant because it has implications for effects of interventions that increase )
-- orchard survival rates relative to reef (which should also affect how many die from disturbance? Or should that be explored separately?)

-- maybe fragmentation rates in the orchard? (lower priority since there's now a cap on adults)

```{r}


# turn this into a function for making time series with different restoration parameter values
# par_set = parameter set to iterate over
# par_name = name of the parameter to iterate over (NOTE: function currently only allows for parameters that are in rest_pars list or "lambda_R", "frag_pars.o", fec_pars.o, "surv_pars.o_1", and "surv_pars.r_1")
# dem_pars = demographic parameters to use
# prop_set1 = values proportion of substrates to outplant to orchard to iterate over
# dist = whether or not there is a disturbance regime (T or F)
par_sens_fun1 <- function(par_set, par_name, prop_set1, dem_pars, dist = F){
  
  out_list <- list()


# outer loop = demographic parameter values
# inner loop = proportion to outplant to the reef


for(i in 1:length(par_set)){ # for each parameter set
  
  # set up the parameters
  
  surv_pars.r <- dem_pars$surv_pars.r
  growth_pars.r <- dem_pars$growth_pars.r
  shrink_pars.r <- dem_pars$shrink_pars.r
  frag_pars.r <- dem_pars$frag_pars.r
  surv_pars.o <- dem_pars$surv_pars.o
  growth_pars.o <- dem_pars$growth_pars.o
  shrink_pars.o <- dem_pars$shrink_pars.o
  frag_pars.o <- dem_pars$frag_pars.o
  
 if(par_name == "frag_pars.o"){
frag_pars.o[[1]][[1]][[4]] <- frag_pars.r[[1]][[1]][[4]]*par_set[i]

frag_pars.o[[1]][[1]][[5]] <- frag_pars.r[[1]][[1]][[5]]*par_set[i]

 }
  
  if(par_name == "surv_pars.o_1"){
surv_pars.o[[1]][[1]][1] <- surv_pars.r[[1]][[1]][1]*par_set[i]

  }
  
  if(par_name == "surv_pars.r_1"){
surv_pars.r[[1]][[1]][1] <- surv_pars.r[[1]][[1]][1]*par_set[i]
surv_pars.r[[1]][[2]][1] <- surv_pars.r[[1]][[1]][1]*par_set[i]

  }
  
  if(par_name == "fec_pars.o"){
    fec_pars.o <- list()
    fec_pars.o[[1]] <- list() # first treatment
    fec_pars.o[[1]][[1]] <- c(0, 0, rep(1255111/26, 3))*par_set[i]
  }
  
  # set up disturbance
  if(dist == F){
    
    dist_yrs <- NA
    
  } else{
    # update with disturbance effects
  # disturbance parameters
dist_yrs <- c(1:max(years))[c(F, F,T)] # years when disturbance occurs: once every 3 years

# effects of disturbance on each reef subpop
dist_effects.r <- list()
dist_effects.r[[1]] <- list() 
dist_effects.r[[1]][[1]] <- list() # effects of disturbances on corals from first source in first reef subpop
dist_effects.r[[1]][[1]] <- as.list(rep("survival", length(dist_yrs))) # effects of each disturbance on corals from first source in first reef subpop 
dist_effects.r[[1]][[2]] <- list() # second source
dist_effects.r[[1]][[2]] <- as.list(rep("survival", length(dist_yrs)))


surv_pars.r1 <- list() # first source (external recruits)
surv_pars.o1 <- list()

for(jj in 1:length(dist_yrs)){ # for each year with a disturbance
  # update the survival parameters
  surv_pars.r1[[jj]] <- surv_pars.r[[1]][[1]]*0.25 # note this is the same as the proportional reduction in reference reef production
  surv_pars.o1[[jj]] <- surv_pars.o[[1]][[1]]*0.4

}


# disturbance parameters for each reef subpop (what happens to the population parameters at each disturbance eve)
dist_pars.r <- list()

# first reef population
dist_pars.r[[1]] <- list() 
# first source to second reef subpop
dist_pars.r[[1]][[1]] <- dist_pars_fun(dist_yrs = dist_yrs, dist_effects.r[[1]][[1]], dist_surv0 = surv_pars.r1, dist_Tmat0 = NULL, dist_Fmat0 = NULL, dist_fec0 = NULL) 
dist_pars.r[[1]][[2]] <- dist_pars_fun(dist_yrs = dist_yrs, dist_effects.r[[1]][[2]], dist_surv0 = surv_pars.r1, dist_Tmat0 = NULL, dist_Fmat0 = NULL, dist_fec0 = NULL)

# disturbance effects for each orchard subpop
dist_effects.o <- list()

dist_effects.o[[1]] <- list() 
dist_effects.o[[1]][[1]] <- list() # effects of disturbances on corals from first source in first orchard treatment
dist_effects.o[[1]][[1]] <- as.list(rep("survival", length(dist_yrs))) # effects of 1st disturbance on corals from first source in first reef subpop ([[1]][[1]][[2]] would be second disturbance, etc.)

# disturbance parameters for each orchard subpop
dist_pars.o <- list()

# first orchard treatment
dist_pars.o[[1]] <- list() 
# first source in first orchard treatment
dist_pars.o[[1]][[1]] <- dist_pars_fun(dist_yrs = dist_yrs, dist_effects.o[[1]][[1]], dist_surv0 = surv_pars.o1, dist_Tmat0 = NULL, dist_Fmat0 = NULL, dist_fec0 = NULL)
  
  
  }
  

  
  # holding list for model simulations with this parameter set
  mod_list <- list()
  
  for(j in 1:length(prop_set1)){ # for each proportion outplanted to reef
    
    rest_pars_ij <- rest_pars
    
    rest_pars_ij$reef_prop <- prop_set1[j] # proportion of tiles outplanted to reef
    
    if(par_name %in% names(rest_pars_ij)){
      rest_pars_ij[[which(names(rest_pars_ij) == par_name)]] <- par_set[i]
    } else if(par_name == "lambda_R"){
      lambda_R <- par_set[i]
    } 
    
    # run the model
    sim_ij <- rse_mod1(years, n, A_mids, surv_pars.r, dens_pars.r, growth_pars.r, shrink_pars.r, frag_pars.r, fec_pars.r, surv_pars.o, dens_pars.o, growth_pars.o, shrink_pars.o, frag_pars.o, fec_pars.o, lambda, lambda_R, sigma_s, sigma_f, ext_rand, seeds, dist_yrs, dist_pars.r, dist_effects.r, dist_pars.o, dist_effects.o, orchard_treatments, reef_treatments, lab_treatments, lab_pars, rest_pars_ij, N0.r, N0.o, N0.l)
    
    
    # save the output
    mod_list[[j]] <- sim_ij
    
  } # end of iterations over outplanting proportions
  
  
  out_list[[i]] <- mod_list
  
} # end of iterations over parameter sets

return(out_list)
  
}



```


function for processing the output

```{r}
# 1) coral cover on reef, 2) orchard function (loosely defined to include ecological function and reproduction since these are highly correlated in the model, calculate as sum or area covered of all reproductively mature size classes in the orchard), 3) reef ROI (m2 coral on reef per dollar spent), 4) total ROI (m2 coral on reef and orchard per dollar spent), 5) total costs, and 6) number of recruits outplanted to reef?

# function for extracting performance metrics from the orchard expansion simulations
orch_exp_sens_fun <- function(sim_list, par_set2, prop_set, L2, L1, max_yr, weights = list(reef_cover = 1, orch_fun = 1, reef_ROI = 1, tot_ROI = 1, tot_costs = 0, recruits_out = 0), dt_D0 = data.frame(NA)){
  
      r_inf <- 0.056 # inflation rate
      # fixed costs
      c_RS <- 84.6*rest_pars$orchard_size/30 + 1200 # reef stars (cost of reef stars plus cost of boat rental for installation); no inflation because assume this is only an initial cost
      
      # fixed costs that are per year (need to account for inflation)
      # c_perm <- 400*length(2:max_yr)
      c_perm <- sum(400*(1 + r_inf)^(2:max_yr)) # permits for collecting babies (400 per year)
      c_boat <- sum(1200*4*(1 + r_inf)^(2:max_yr)) # boat maintenance (1200 every 3 months/4x per year)
      c_log <- sum(500*12*(1 + r_inf)^(2:max_yr)) # logistics/personnel (500 per month/12x per year)
      
      c_fixed <- c_RS + c_perm + c_boat + c_log
  
  
  # calculate the performance metrics for each parameter combination
  for(i in 1:L2){ # for each parameter combination
    
    # make the holding data frame
    dt_i <- data.frame(
  par_val = rep(par_set2[i], L1), # random parameter replicate
  prop_out = rep(NA, L1), # proportion outplanted to reef
  reef_cover_mean = rep(NA, L1), # m2 of coral cover on reef (mean over years 1 to max_yr)
  reef_function_mean = rep(NA, L1), # avg area covered by large/reproductive (size classes 3-5) corals on reef
  reef_tiles_out_tot = rep(NA, L1), # total number of tiles outplanted to reef
  reef_area_out_tot = rep(NA, L1), # total area of reef over which tiles were outplanted 
  reef_recruits_out_tot = rep(NA, L1), # total recruits outplanted to reef
  reef_ROI_mean = rep(NA, L1), # average coral cover on reef per dollar spent, averaged over max_yr years
  tot_ROI_mean = rep(NA, L1), # average total ROI (total area covered by corals on reef and orchard per dollar spent)
  orch_function_mean = rep(NA, L1), # avg area covered by large/reproductive (size classes 3-5) corals in orchard
 tot_costs = rep(NA, L1), # total amount spent over length of simulation
 costs_saved = rep(NA, L1), # amount saved relative to most expensive strategy
 c_fixed = rep(NA, L1), # fixed costs
 c_subs = rep(NA, L1), # costs of substrates
 c_out = rep(NA, L1), # outplanting costs
 c_maint = rep(NA, L1), # orchard maintenance costs
 c_lab = rep(NA, L1), # lab costs
 c_spawn = rep(NA, L1), # costs of collecting spawn
strategy_score = rep(NA, L1), # weighted sum of top metrics relative to their max possible value
  reef_cover_cost = rep(NA, L1)#, # avg coral cover on reef over max_yr years compared to if all corals were put on the reef
  #orch_rep_cost = rep(NA, L1) # avg orchard reproduction over max_yr years compared to if all corals were put in the orchard
  
)
    
    
    # NOTE: could calculate coral cover as coral cover per m2, where the m2 is the total area outplanted up to that time point, but then you might get numbers that look high if very few tiles were outplanted so that might be confusing...
    
   # orch_rep_0 <- model_summ(model_sim = sim_list[[i]][[1]], location = "orchard", metric = "production", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments))
    
   # orch_rep_max <- mean(orch_rep_0[2:max_yr], na.rm = T)
    
    
    # get reef cover if nothing was outplanted to orchard to estimate "cost" of investing in orchard in terms of reef coral cover lost
    reef_cover_1 <- model_summ(model_sim = sim_list[[i]][[L1]], location = "reef", metric = "area_m2", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments))
    
    reef_cover_max <- mean(reef_cover_1[2:max_yr], na.rm = T)
    
    
    for(j in 1:L1){ # for each proportion outplanted to reef
      
      sim_ij <- sim_list[[i]][[j]]
      
      # reef cover
      reef_cover_ij <- model_summ(model_sim = sim_ij, location = "reef", metric = "area_m2", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments))
      
      # reef function
      reef_fun_ij <- model_summ(model_sim = sim_ij, location = "reef", metric = "area_m2", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments), size_classes = c(3, 4, 5))

      # orchard rep
#orch_rep_ij <- model_summ(model_sim = sim_ij, location = "orchard", metric = "production", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments))
      
      # orchard cover
      orch_cover_ij <- model_summ(model_sim = sim_ij, location = "orchard", metric = "area_m2", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments))

      # orchard function
orch_fun_ij <- model_summ(model_sim = sim_ij, location = "orchard", metric = "area_m2", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments), size_classes = c(3, 4, 5))

      dt_i$prop_out[j] <- prop_set[j]
      dt_i$reef_cover_mean[j] <- mean(reef_cover_ij[2:max_yr], na.rm = T)
      dt_i$reef_function_mean[j] <- mean(reef_fun_ij[2:max_yr], na.rm = T)
      dt_i$reef_tiles_out_tot[j] <- sum(sim_ij$reef_tiles_out[2:max_yr], na.rm = T)
      dt_i$reef_area_out_tot[j] <- dt_i$reef_tiles_out_tot[j]*5
      dt_i$reef_recruits_out_tot[j] <- sum(sim_ij$reef_out[[1]][[2]][2:max_yr], na.rm = T)
      dt_i$reef_cover_cost[j] <- dt_i$reef_cover_mean[j]/reef_cover_max
      #dt_i$orch_rep_cost[j] <- mean(orch_rep_ij[2:max_yr], na.rm = T)/orch_rep_max
      dt_i$orch_function_mean[j] <- mean(orch_fun_ij[2:max_yr], na.rm = T)
      
    
      
       # variable costs
      # substrate costs
      c_subs <- sum((sim_ij$reef_tiles_out[2:max_yr] + sim_ij$orchard_tiles_out[2:max_yr]) *(0.5*1 + 0.5*7)*(1 + r_inf)^(2:max_yr))
      
      
    # outplanting and orchard maintenance costs
      c_reef <- rep(NA, length(2:max_yr)) # reef
      c_orch <- rep(NA, length(2:max_yr)) # orchard
      c_maint <- rep(NA, length(2:max_yr)) # orchard maintenance
      
      for(ii in 2:max_yr){
        #print(ii)
        
 # outplanting costs (assuming you can outplant ~1,250 substrates per day to the reef and 800 per day to the orchard)
        c_reef[ii-1] <- 300*ceiling(sim_ij$reef_tiles_out[ii]/1250) + 200*sim_ij$reef_tiles_out[ii]/1250 + 380/2000*sim_ij$reef_tiles_out[ii]
        
        c_reef[ii-1] <- c_reef[ii-1]*(1 + r_inf)^(ii)
        
       c_orch[ii-1] <- 300*ceiling(sim_ij$orchard_tiles_out[ii]/800) + 200*sim_ij$orchard_tiles_out[ii]/800 + 250/2000 * sim_ij$orchard_tiles_out[ii]
       
       c_orch[ii-1] <- c_orch[ii-1]*(1 + r_inf)^(ii)
        
        # currently occupied reef stars in the orchard:
        RS_ii <- rep(NA, length(orchard_treatments))
        for(kk in 1:length(orchard_treatments)){ # in case there's more than one orchard
          RS_ii[kk] <- sim_ij$orchard_tiles[[kk]][ii]/30 # 30 tiles per reef star
        }
        
        RS_ii <- sum(RS_ii) # filled reef stars in orchard this year
        
        c_maint[ii-1] <- ifelse(RS_ii == 0, 0, (1.5*530-530)/(2*123-123)*RS_ii + 265) 
        c_maint[ii-1] <- c_maint[ii-1]*2*(1 + r_inf)^(ii) # assume maintenance is performed 2x per year, also add inflation
        
      } # end of loop over 2:max_yr
      
      c_out <- sum(c_reef) + sum(c_orch)
      c_maint <- sum(c_maint)
 
      # lab costs
     # c_lab <- (432*7 + 200*7)*length(2:max_yr) # assume all tiles are only kept in the lab for two weeks
      c_lab <- sum((432*7 + 200*7)*(1 + r_inf)^(2:max_yr))
    
      
  
      # spawning costs    
      c_spawn <- rep(NA, length(2:max_yr))
      for(ii in 2:max_yr){
        c_spawn[ii-1] <- ifelse(sim_ij$reef_babies_used[ii] > 0, 6500, 0) + ifelse(sim_ij$orchard_babies_used[ii] > 0, 3250, 0)
        c_spawn[ii-1] <- c_spawn[ii-1]*(1 + r_inf)^(ii)
        
      }
    
      c_spawn <- sum(c_spawn)
      
      
     tot_costs <- c_fixed + c_subs + c_out + c_maint + c_lab + c_spawn
     
     dt_i$c_fixed[j] <- c_fixed
     dt_i$c_subs[j] <- c_subs
     dt_i$c_out[j] <- c_out
     dt_i$c_maint[j] <- c_maint
     dt_i$c_lab[j] <- c_lab
     dt_i$c_spawn[j] <- c_spawn
     dt_i$tot_costs[j] <- tot_costs
      
      #dt_i$tot_dollar_costs[j]
      dt_i$reef_ROI_mean[j] <- mean(reef_cover_ij[2:max_yr]/tot_costs)
      
      dt_i$tot_ROI_mean[j] <- mean((reef_cover_ij[2:max_yr] + orch_cover_ij[2:max_yr])/tot_costs)
      
    } # end of iteration over strategy parameter values
    
    # get max values of top metrics for ith parameter combination for calculating weighted scores
    # metrics considered: 1) coral cover on reef, 2) orchard function, 3) reef ROI, 4) total ROI, 5) total costs, and 6) number of recruits outplanted to reef
    
    # update: replace zeros with 1 (if max was zero, e.g., if outplant survival on the reef was zero, that means all values were zero so this will result in dividing 0 by 1 = 0 instead of 0/0 = NA)
    
    # if there is disturbance, use the no disturbance case as the max
    if(is.na(as.vector(dt_D0)[1]) == T){
      dt_iM <- dt_i
    } else{
      if("par_rep" %in% colnames(dt_D0)){ # bad messy way of dealing with inconsistent naming...
        dt_iM <- dt_D0[which(dt_D0$par_rep == i),]
      } else{
        dt_iM <- dt_D0[which(dt_D0$par_val == par_set2[i]),]
      }
      
    }
  
    reef_cover_max_i <- max(dt_iM$reef_cover_mean, na.rm = T)
   # reef_cover_max_i <- ifelse(reef_cover_max_i == 0, 1, reef_cover_max_i)
    orch_fun_max_i <- max(dt_iM$orch_function_mean, na.rm = T)
   # orch_fun_max_i <- ifelse(orch_fun_max_i == 0, 1, orch_fun_max_i)
    reef_ROI_max_i <- max(dt_iM$reef_ROI_mean, na.rm = T)
   # reef_ROI_max_i <- ifelse(reef_ROI_max_i == 0, 1, reef_ROI_max_i)
    tot_ROI_max_i <- max(dt_iM$tot_ROI_mean, na.rm = T)
   # tot_ROI_max_i <- ifelse(tot_ROI_max_i == 0, 1, tot_ROI_max_i)
   # tot_costs_min_i <- min(dt_iM$tot_costs) # want to minimize total costs
    tot_costs_max_i <- max(dt_iM$tot_costs, na.rm = T)
    tot_saved_max_i <- tot_costs_max_i - min(dt_iM$tot_costs)
    reef_recruits_out_tot_max_i <- max(dt_iM$reef_recruits_out_tot, na.rm = T)
  #  reef_recruits_out_tot_max_i <- ifelse(reef_recruits_out_tot_max_i == 0, 1, reef_recruits_out_tot_max_i)
    
  
    
    # now add the scores for each 
    for(j in 1:L1){
    
      
      w_sum <- sum(unlist(weights))
      
      dt_i$strategy_score[j] <- weights$reef_cover/w_sum*dt_i$reef_cover_mean[j]/reef_cover_max_i + weights$orch_fun/w_sum*dt_i$orch_function_mean[j]/orch_fun_max_i + weights$reef_ROI/w_sum*dt_i$reef_ROI_mean[j]/reef_ROI_max_i + weights$tot_ROI/w_sum*dt_i$tot_ROI_mean[j]/tot_ROI_max_i + #weights$tot_costs/w_sum*(dt_i$tot_costs[j]/tot_costs_min_i)^(-1) +
weights$tot_costs/w_sum*(tot_costs_max_i- dt_i$tot_costs[j])/tot_saved_max_i + weights$recruits_out/w_sum*dt_i$reef_recruits_out_tot[j]/reef_recruits_out_tot_max_i
    
      # calculate costs saved
    dt_i$costs_saved[j] <- tot_costs_max_i- dt_i$tot_costs[j]
  
      
    }
    
    
  if(i == 1){
    dt <- dt_i
  } else{
    dt <- rbind(dt, dt_i)
  }
    
  }
  
  return(dt) # return the data frame
  
}


```

### time series

```{r}
# reference reef supply
lambdaR_set <- lambda_R*c(0, 1)

N0.o[[1]][[1]] <- c(0.1, 0, 0, 0, 0)

sims_lambdaR1 <- par_sens_fun1(par_set = lambdaR_set, par_name = "lambda_R", prop_set1 = prop_set_short, dem_pars = all_pars)

N0.o[[1]][[1]] <- rep(0, n) # reset initial conditions in the orchard

```



```{r}
# function for showing the timeseries
# plot_sims = simulations to plot
# yrs_p = number of years to plot
# legend2_title = title for the second legend
# legend2_labs = labels for second legend
# ymaxs = max y limit values for 1) reef cover, 2) orchard function, 3) number of substrates in lab, and 4) number of substrates in orchard
# par_ltys = lty values for first and second parameter sets
# add_h3 = if T, add another horizontal line on plot 3 at double the lab capacity
# add_h4 = if T, add another horizontal line on plot 4 at double the orchard capacity

prop_cols <- c("#FEC44F", "#CC4C02", "#662506")

#' Time series comparison plot
#' Plots 4-panel comparison of two simulation scenarios showing: reef population,
#' orchard population, tiles outplanted, and orchard tile inventory over time.
#' Used to visualize sensitivity to individual parameter changes.
ts_plot1 <- function(plot_sims, yrs_p, legend2_title, legend2_labs, par_ltys, ymaxs, add_h3 = F, add_h4 = F){
  
  par(mfrow = c(3, 2))
layout(matrix(c(1, 2, 3, 4), nrow = 2, ncol = 2, byrow = T), widths = rep(1, 2), heights = rep(1, 2))
#layout.show(2)
par(mar=c(0, 2.5, 2.5, 1), oma = c(4.5, 1.5, 0.1, 0))


xlab1 <- NA
ylab1 <- expression("Reef cover ("*m^2*")")
#plotlab <- "c) Reef ROI"
plot(x = c(1:yrs_p), y = rep(0, yrs_p), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, ymaxs[1]), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA, xaxt = "n")
axis(side = 1, at = c(0, 10, 20, 30, 40, 50), labels = NA)
mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, outer = T, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 3, ylab1, line = 0, cex = lab_cx)
#mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)
for(j in 1:length(prop_set_short)){
  sim_ij <- plot_sims[[1]][[j]] 
  reef_cover_ij <- model_summ(model_sim = sim_ij, location = "reef", metric = "area_m2", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments))
  
  lines(x = c(1:yrs_p), y = reef_cover_ij[1:yrs_p], col = prop_cols[j], lwd = 2, lty = par_ltys[1])
  
  sim_ij <- plot_sims[[2]][[j]] 
  reef_cover_ij <- model_summ(model_sim = sim_ij, location = "reef", metric = "area_m2", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments))
  
  lines(x = c(1:yrs_p), y = reef_cover_ij[1:yrs_p], col = prop_cols[j], lwd = 2, lty = par_ltys[2])
}
legend("topleft", legend = c("1", "50", "99"), col = prop_cols, lwd = 3, title = "% Initially \noutplanted to reef", bty = "n", cex = 0.75, inset = c(0, 0.1))
legend("bottomright", legend = c(legend2_labs[1], legend2_labs[2]), lty = par_ltys, title = legend2_title, bty = "n", cex = 0.75, lwd = 2)



xlab1 <- "Year in simulation"
ylab1 <- expression("Orchard function ("*m^2~"adults)")
#plotlab <- "c) Reef ROI"
plot(x = c(1:yrs_p), y = rep(0, yrs_p), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, ymaxs[2]), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA, xaxt = "n")
axis(side = 1, at = c(0, 10, 20, 30, 40, 50), labels = NA)
mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, outer = T, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 3, ylab1, line = 0, cex = lab_cx)
#mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)
for(j in 1:length(prop_set_short)){
  sim_ij <- plot_sims[[1]][[j]] 
 orch_fun_ij <- model_summ(model_sim = sim_ij, location = "orchard", metric = "area_m2", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments), size_classes = c(3, 4, 5))
  
  lines(x = c(1:yrs_p), y = orch_fun_ij[1:yrs_p], col = prop_cols[j], lwd = 2, lty = par_ltys[1])
  
   sim_ij <- plot_sims[[2]][[j]] 
 orch_fun_ij <- model_summ(model_sim = sim_ij, location = "orchard", metric = "area_m2", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments), size_classes = c(3, 4, 5))
 
 lines(x = c(1:yrs_p), y = orch_fun_ij[1:yrs_p], col = prop_cols[j], lty = par_ltys[2], lwd = 2)
 
}


xlab1 <- NA
ylab1 <- "Substrates used in lab"
#plotlab <- "c) Reef ROI"
plot(x = c(1:yrs_p), y = rep(0, yrs_p), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, ymaxs[3]), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA, xaxt = "n")
axis(side = 1, at = c(0, 10, 20, 30, 40, 50), labels = c(0, 10, 20, 30, 40, 50) + 2025)
mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, outer = T, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 3, ylab1, line = 0, cex = lab_cx)
#mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)
for(j in 1:length(prop_set_short)){
  sim_ij <- plot_sims[[1]][[j]] 
  lines(x = c(1:yrs_p), y = sim_ij$tiles_out_tot[1:yrs_p], col = prop_cols[j], lwd = 2, lty = par_ltys[1])
  
  sim_ij <- plot_sims[[2]][[j]] 
  lines(x = c(1:yrs_p), y = sim_ij$tiles_out_tot[1:yrs_p], col = prop_cols[j], lwd = 2, lty = par_ltys[2])
}
abline(h = rest_pars$lab_max, lty = 2)
if(add_h3 == T){
  abline(h = rest_pars$lab_max*2, lty = 2)
}


xlab1 <- NA
ylab1 <- "Substrates in orchard"
#plotlab <- "c) Reef ROI"
plot(x = c(1:yrs_p), y = rep(0, yrs_p), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, ymaxs[4]), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA, xaxt = "n")
axis(side = 1, at = c(0, 10, 20, 30, 40, 50), labels = c(0, 10, 20, 30, 40, 50) + 2025)
mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2.5, outer = T, cex = lab_cx)
mtext(side = 3, ylab1, line = 0, cex = lab_cx)
#mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)
for(j in 1:length(prop_set_short)){
  sim_ij <- plot_sims[[1]][[j]] 
  lines(x = c(1:yrs_p), y = sim_ij$orchard_tiles[[1]][1:yrs_p], col = prop_cols[j], lwd = 2, lty = par_ltys[1])
  
  sim_ij <- plot_sims[[2]][[j]] 
  lines(x = c(1:yrs_p), y = sim_ij$orchard_tiles[[1]][1:yrs_p], col = prop_cols[j], lwd = 2, lty = par_ltys[2])
}
abline(h = rest_pars$orchard_size, lty = 2)
if(add_h4 == T){
  abline(h = rest_pars$orchard_size*2, lty = 2)
}
  
}

```



```{r}

pdf("TempFigs/ts_lambdaR1.pdf", height = 5, width = 6)

ts_plot1(plot_sims = sims_lambdaR1, yrs_p = years, legend2_title = "Reference reef supply", legend2_labs = c("none","default"), par_ltys = c(2, 1), ymaxs = c(60, 2500, rest_pars$lab_max, rest_pars$orchard_size))

dev.off()


```


I think you end up with the same number of corals on the reef with and without external supply because the lab becomes limiting

```{r}
#  show the reef values zoomed in

plot_sims <- sims_lambdaR1

yrs_p <- 10

xlab1 <- "Year in simulation"
ylab1 <- expression("Reef cover ("*m^2*")")
#plotlab <- "c) Reef ROI"
plot(x = c(1:yrs_p), y = rep(0, yrs_p), type = "l", col = NA, ylim = c(0, 20), las = 1, xlab = NA, ylab = NA, xaxt = "n")
axis(side = 1, at = c(2, 4, 6, 8, 10), labels = c(2, 4, 6, 8, 10) + 2025)
mtext(side = 1, xlab1, line = 2)
mtext(side = 2, ylab1, line = 1.75, cex = 1)
#mtext(side = 3, plotlab, adj = 0)
for(j in 1:3){
  sim_ij <- plot_sims[[1]][[j]] 
  reef_cover_ij <- model_summ(model_sim = sim_ij, location = "reef", metric = "area_m2", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments))
  
  lines(x = c(1:yrs_p), y = reef_cover_ij[1:yrs_p], col = prop_cols[j], lwd = 2, lty = 2)
  
  sim_ij <- plot_sims[[2]][[j]] 
  reef_cover_ij <- model_summ(model_sim = sim_ij, location = "reef", metric = "area_m2", n_reef = length(reef_treatments), n_orchard = length(orchard_treatments), n_lab = length(lab_treatments))
  
  lines(x = c(1:yrs_p), y = reef_cover_ij[1:yrs_p], col = prop_cols[j], lwd = 2, lty = 1)
}
legend("topleft", legend = c("1", "50", "99"), col = prop_cols, lwd = 3, title = "% Initially \noutplanted to reef", bty = "n", cex = 0.75, inset = c(0, 0.1))
legend("top", legend = c("default", "none"), lty = c(1, 2), title = "Reference reef supply", bty = "n", cex = 0.75, lwd = 2)


```



```{r}
# lab capacity
lab_max_set <- lab_max*c(1, 2)

sims_lab_max1 <- par_sens_fun1(par_set = lab_max_set, par_name = "lab_max", prop_set1 = prop_set_short, dem_pars = all_pars)

```


```{r}

pdf("TempFigs/ts_lab_max1.pdf", height = 5, width = 6)

ts_plot1(plot_sims = sims_lab_max1, yrs_p = years, legend2_title = "Lab capacity", legend2_labs = c("default", "2x default"), par_ltys = c(1, 2), ymaxs = c(110, 2500, rest_pars$lab_max*2, rest_pars$orchard_size), add_h3 = T)

dev.off()


```



```{r}
# orchard capacity
orchard_size_set <- orchard_size*c(1, 2)

sims_orchard_size1 <- par_sens_fun1(par_set = orchard_size_set, par_name = "orchard_size", prop_set1 = prop_set_short, dem_pars = all_pars)

```


```{r}

pdf("TempFigs/ts_orchard_size1.pdf", height = 5, width = 6)

ts_plot1(plot_sims = sims_orchard_size1, yrs_p = years, legend2_title = "Orchard capacity", legend2_labs = c("default", "2x default"), par_ltys = c(1, 2), ymaxs = c(60, 5000, rest_pars$lab_max, rest_pars$orchard_size*2), add_h4 = T)

dev.off()

```


doubling orchard size doesn't have a huge effect on the reef bc the lab is already full (basically no effect for 99% case bc lab is the pinch point), so really the main effect you see is the greater lag in filling up the orchard because bigger orchard = less surplus substrates being outplanted to the reef

```{r}
# orchard fragmentation
sims_orchard_frag1 <- par_sens_fun1(par_set = c(0, 1), par_name = "frag_pars.o", prop_set1 = prop_set_short, dem_pars = all_pars)

```

```{r}

pdf("TempFigs/ts_orchard_frag1.pdf", height = 5, width = 6)

ts_plot1(plot_sims = sims_orchard_frag1, yrs_p = years, legend2_title = "Orchard fragmentation", legend2_labs = c("none", "equal to reef"), par_ltys = c(1, 2), ymaxs = c(60, 3000, rest_pars$lab_max, rest_pars$orchard_size))

dev.off()
```

```{r}
# check lambda values
pop_lambda_fun(all_pars$surv_pars.o[[1]][[1]], all_pars$growth_pars.o[[1]][[1]], all_pars$shrink_pars.o[[1]][[1]], all_pars$frag_pars.o[[1]][[1]]) # 0.89

# update fragmentation
frag_pars.o_test1 <- all_pars$frag_pars.o[[1]][[1]]
frag_pars.o_test1[[4]] <- frag_pars.r[[1]][[1]][[4]]*2
frag_pars.o_test1[[5]] <- frag_pars.r[[1]][[1]][[5]]*2

pop_lambda_fun(all_pars$surv_pars.o[[1]][[1]], all_pars$growth_pars.o[[1]][[1]], all_pars$shrink_pars.o[[1]][[1]], frag_pars.o_test1)


```


so if lambda is greater than one in the orchard, you don't see that decline 

### full

should look at the sensitivity of max strategy score to different parameters
-- reference reef supply
-- lab capacity
-- orchard capacity
-- orchard fecundity, orchard fecundity x reference reef supply (i.e., with and without reference reef supply?)
-- survival of smallest size class on reef (has implications for effectiveness of intervention strategies)
-- orchard survival rates relative to reef (which should also affect how many die from disturbance? Or should that be explored separately?)

-- maybe fragmentation rates in the orchard? (lower priority bc of cap on adults)

For each of these, start by just using mean parameter combination (or mean and 95% and 5% quantiles?). Can use the same function above and run it three times for each case. 



Then calculate the strategy scores

Plots to make: x-axis = parameter being varied, y-axis = 1) proportion outplanted that maximizes strategy score, 2) strategy score at the max outplanting proportion, 3) difference between max and min scores or cv of strategy scores across outplanting proportions? (to try to capture how much the outplanting proportion matters at each of these parameter values)



Should also make plots showing each of the performance metrics at the max outplanting proportions and their cvs across outplanting proportions, or maybe just do that for the cases with the greatest variation in strategy scores? Could scale them all relative to max and just put that on a single plot with line colors that match the OHI plots

And maybe do all of this with and without disturbance?


reference reef supply

```{r}

#prop_setS <- c(0.01, 0.5, 0.99)
prop_setS <- prop_set

#L1 <- 50
#prop_set <- seq(from = 0, to = 1, length.out = L1) # proportion tiles outplanted to reef (can be higher than this if orchard gets full though)

#L2 <- 25
L2 <- 3

lambda_R0 <- 1255111 # default value

#lambda_R_setL <- seq(from = 0, to = 1, length.out = L2)*lambda_R0
lambda_R_setL <- c(0, 0.5, 1)*lambda_R0

# remember you need to start with a few corals in the orchard for the lambda_R = 0 case
N0.o[[1]][[1]] <- c(0.1, 0, 0, 0, 0)

# par_name can be either parameters that are in rest_pars list or "lambda_R", "frag_pars.o", and "surv_pars.o_1"
# dem_pars = demographic parameters to use
# prop_set1 = values proportion of substrates to outplant to orchard to iterate over
tic()
sens_lambda_R2 <- par_sens_fun1(par_set = lambda_R_setL, par_name = "lambda_R", prop_setS, dem_pars = all_pars)

sens_lambda_R2D <- par_sens_fun1(par_set = lambda_R_setL, par_name = "lambda_R", prop_setS, dem_pars = all_pars, dist = T)

N0.o[[1]][[1]] <- rep(0, n) # reset initial conditions in the orchard

toc()

# process the results
lambda_R2_dt5 <- orch_exp_sens_fun(sim_list = sens_lambda_R2, par_set2 = lambda_R_setL, prop_setS, L2, length(prop_setS), max_yr = 5, weights = list(reef_cover = 1, orch_fun = 1, reef_ROI = 1, tot_ROI = 1, tot_costs = 0, recruits_out = 0), dt_D0 = data.frame(NA))
 
lambda_R2_dt50 <- orch_exp_sens_fun(sim_list = sens_lambda_R2, par_set2 = lambda_R_setL, prop_setS, L2, length(prop_setS), max_yr = 50, weights = list(reef_cover = 1, orch_fun = 1, reef_ROI = 1, tot_ROI = 1, tot_costs = 0, recruits_out = 0), dt_D0 = data.frame(NA))


lambda_R2_dt5D <- orch_exp_sens_fun(sim_list = sens_lambda_R2D, par_set2 = lambda_R_setL, prop_setS, L2, length(prop_setS), max_yr = 5, weights = list(reef_cover = 1, orch_fun = 1, reef_ROI = 1, tot_ROI = 1, tot_costs = 0, recruits_out = 0), dt_D0 = lambda_R2_dt5)
 
lambda_R2_dt50D <- orch_exp_sens_fun(sim_list = sens_lambda_R2D, par_set2 = lambda_R_setL, prop_setS, L2, length(prop_setS), max_yr = 50, weights = list(reef_cover = 1, orch_fun = 1, reef_ROI = 1, tot_ROI = 1, tot_costs = 0, recruits_out = 0), dt_D0 = lambda_R2_dt50)


#View(lambda_R2_dt)
#sens_lambda_R2[[25]][[50]]


```



```{r}
# check legend placements
plot(x = c(1:10), y = c(1:10), type = "l")
legend("topleft", legend = c("line"), lwd = 1, title = "Legend", bty = "n", x.intersp = 0, y.intersp = 0.5, title.adj = 1)


```


```{r}


# now make metric plots; 8 panels (column 1 = 5 years, column 2 = 50 years, red = with disturbance, black = without, shading = par value). Or color = par value, solid = no dist, dashed = with disturbance? Or line type = par value, color = disturbance or not?

#View(lambda_R2_dt5)


#col_set0 <- c("gray90", "gray50", "gray10")

cols0 <- c("black", "red")

ax_cex <- 0.9
leg_cex <- 0.85


full_sens_plot <- function(par_set_p, dt5, dt5D, dt50, dt50D){
  

par(mfrow = c(3, 2))
layout(matrix(c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8), nrow = 4, ncol = 2, byrow = T), widths = rep(1, 2), heights = rep(1, 4))
#layout.show(2)
par(mar=c(0, 2, 1, 3), oma = c(4.5, 6, 2, 0))


# reef cover
met <- "reef_cover_mean"
cc <- which(colnames(dt_plot)==met)

par_set1 <- par_set_p
dt_plot <- dt5
dt_plot2 <- dt5D

plot(x = dt_plot$prop_out[1], y = dt_plot[1,cc], type = "l", ylim = c(0,max(dt_plot[,cc])),xlim = c(0,1), col = NA, xlab = NA, ylab = NA, las = 1, xaxt = "n")
mtext(side = 1, "Proportion initially outplanted to reef", outer = T, cex = ax_cex, line = 2.5)
mtext(side = 3, "5 year simulation")
mtext(side = 2, "Reef coral", line = 4, cex = ax_cex)
mtext(side = 2, expression("cover ("*m^2*")"), line = 2.5, cex = ax_cex)
axis(side = 1, at = seq(from = 0, to = 1, by = 0.2), labels = NA)
for(j in 1:length(par_set1)){
  dt_plot1 <- dt_plot %>% filter(par_val == par_set1[j])
  lines(x = dt_plot1$prop_out, y = dt_plot1[,cc], type = "l", lty = lty_set[j], col = cols0[1], lwd = lwd_set[j])
  dt_plot1 <- dt_plot2 %>% filter(par_val == par_set1[j])
  lines(x = dt_plot1$prop_out, y = dt_plot1[,cc], type = "l", lty = lty_set[j], lwd = lwd_set[j], col = cols0[2])
}
legend("topleft", legend = leg_vals, title = leg_title, lty = lty_set, lwd = lwd_setL, bty = "n", cex = leg_cex, inset = c(0, -0.01), ncol = 2)

#legend("topleft", legend = leg_vals, title = leg_title, lty = lty_set, lwd = lwd_setL, bty = "n", cex = leg_cex, inset = c(-0.1, -0.01), ncol = 2) # , title.adj = 1

legend("left", legend = c("N", "Y"), title = "Disturbance", lwd = 2, col = cols0, bty = "n", cex = leg_cex)


dt_plot <- dt50
dt_plot2 <- dt50D

plot(x = dt_plot$prop_out[1], y = dt_plot[1,cc], type = "l", ylim = c(0,max(dt_plot[,cc])),xlim = c(0,1), col = NA, xlab = NA, ylab = NA, las = 1, xaxt = "n")
mtext(side = 3, "50 year simulation")
axis(side = 1, at = seq(from = 0, to = 1, by = 0.2), labels = NA)
for(j in 1:length(par_set1)){
  dt_plot1 <- dt_plot %>% filter(par_val == par_set1[j])
  lines(x = dt_plot1$prop_out, y = dt_plot1[,cc], type = "l", lty = lty_set[j], col = cols0[1], lwd = lwd_set[j])
  dt_plot1 <- dt_plot2 %>% filter(par_val == par_set1[j])
  lines(x = dt_plot1$prop_out, y = dt_plot1[,cc], type = "l", lty = lty_set[j], lwd = lwd_set[j], col = cols0[2])
}


# reef ROI
met <- "reef_ROI_mean"
cc <- which(colnames(dt_plot)==met)

dt_plot <- dt5
dt_plot2 <- dt5D

plot(x = dt_plot$prop_out[1], y = dt_plot[1,cc], type = "l", ylim = c(0,max(dt_plot[,cc])),xlim = c(0,1), col = NA, xlab = NA, ylab = NA, las = 1, xaxt = "n")
mtext(side = 2, "Reef ROI", line = 5.75, cex = ax_cex)
mtext(side = 2, expression("("*m^2~"coral/$)"), line = 4.25, cex = ax_cex)
axis(side = 1, at = seq(from = 0, to = 1, by = 0.2), labels = NA)
for(j in 1:length(par_set1)){
  dt_plot1 <- dt_plot %>% filter(par_val == par_set1[j])
  lines(x = dt_plot1$prop_out, y = dt_plot1[,cc], type = "l", lty = lty_set[j], col = cols0[1], lwd = lwd_set[j])
  dt_plot1 <- dt_plot2 %>% filter(par_val == par_set1[j])
  lines(x = dt_plot1$prop_out, y = dt_plot1[,cc], type = "l", lty = lty_set[j], lwd = lwd_set[j], col = cols0[2])
}


dt_plot <- dt50
dt_plot2 <- dt50D

plot(x = dt_plot$prop_out[1], y = dt_plot[1,cc], type = "l", ylim = c(0,max(dt_plot[,cc])),xlim = c(0,1), col = NA, xlab = NA, ylab = NA, las = 1, xaxt = "n")
axis(side = 1, at = seq(from = 0, to = 1, by = 0.2), labels = NA)
for(j in 1:length(par_set1)){
  dt_plot1 <- dt_plot %>% filter(par_val == par_set1[j])
  lines(x = dt_plot1$prop_out, y = dt_plot1[,cc], type = "l", lty = lty_set[j], col = cols0[1], lwd = lwd_set[j])
  dt_plot1 <- dt_plot2 %>% filter(par_val == par_set1[j])
  lines(x = dt_plot1$prop_out, y = dt_plot1[,cc], type = "l", lty = lty_set[j], lwd = lwd_set[j], col = cols0[2])
}

# orchard function
met <- "orch_function_mean"
cc <- which(colnames(dt_plot)==met)

dt_plot <- dt5
dt_plot2 <- dt5D

plot(x = dt_plot$prop_out[1], y = dt_plot[1,cc], type = "l", ylim = c(0,max(dt_plot[,cc])),xlim = c(0,1), col = NA, xlab = NA, ylab = NA, las = 1, xaxt = "n")
mtext(side = 2, "Orchard function", line = 3.75, cex = ax_cex)
mtext(side = 2, expression("("*m^2~"adult corals)"), line = 2.25, cex = ax_cex)
axis(side = 1, at = seq(from = 0, to = 1, by = 0.2), labels = NA)
for(j in 1:length(par_set1)){
  dt_plot1 <- dt_plot %>% filter(par_val == par_set1[j])
  lines(x = dt_plot1$prop_out, y = dt_plot1[,cc], type = "l", lty = lty_set[j], col = cols0[1], lwd = lwd_set[j])
  dt_plot1 <- dt_plot2 %>% filter(par_val == par_set1[j])
  lines(x = dt_plot1$prop_out, y = dt_plot1[,cc], type = "l", lty = lty_set[j], lwd = lwd_set[j], col = cols0[2])
}


dt_plot <- dt50
dt_plot2 <- dt50D

plot(x = dt_plot$prop_out[1], y = dt_plot[1,cc], type = "l", ylim = c(0,max(dt_plot[,cc])),xlim = c(0,1), col = NA, xlab = NA, ylab = NA, las = 1, xaxt = "n")
axis(side = 1, at = seq(from = 0, to = 1, by = 0.2), labels = NA)
for(j in 1:length(par_set1)){
  dt_plot1 <- dt_plot %>% filter(par_val == par_set1[j])
  lines(x = dt_plot1$prop_out, y = dt_plot1[,cc], type = "l", lty = lty_set[j], col = cols0[1], lwd = lwd_set[j])
  dt_plot1 <- dt_plot2 %>% filter(par_val == par_set1[j])
  lines(x = dt_plot1$prop_out, y = dt_plot1[,cc], type = "l", lty = lty_set[j], lwd = lwd_set[j], col = cols0[2])
}



# total ROI
met <- "tot_ROI_mean"
cc <- which(colnames(dt_plot)==met)

dt_plot <- dt5
dt_plot2 <- dt5D

plot(x = dt_plot$prop_out[1], y = dt_plot[1,cc], type = "l", ylim = c(0,max(dt_plot[,cc])),xlim = c(0,1), col = NA, xlab = NA, ylab = NA, las = 1, xaxt = "n")
mtext(side = 2, "Total ROI", line = 5.5, cex = ax_cex)
mtext(side = 2, expression("("*m^2~"coral/$)"), line = 4, cex = ax_cex)
axis(side = 1, at = seq(from = 0, to = 1, by = 0.2))
for(j in 1:length(par_set1)){
  dt_plot1 <- dt_plot %>% filter(par_val == par_set1[j])
  lines(x = dt_plot1$prop_out, y = dt_plot1[,cc], type = "l", lty = lty_set[j], col = cols0[1], lwd = lwd_set[j])
  dt_plot1 <- dt_plot2 %>% filter(par_val == par_set1[j])
  lines(x = dt_plot1$prop_out, y = dt_plot1[,cc], type = "l", lty = lty_set[j], lwd = lwd_set[j], col = cols0[2])
}


dt_plot <- dt50
dt_plot2 <- dt50D

plot(x = dt_plot$prop_out[1], y = dt_plot[1,cc], type = "l", ylim = c(0,max(dt_plot[,cc])),xlim = c(0,1), col = NA, xlab = NA, ylab = NA, las = 1, xaxt = "n")
axis(side = 1, at = seq(from = 0, to = 1, by = 0.2))
for(j in 1:length(par_set1)){
  dt_plot1 <- dt_plot %>% filter(par_val == par_set1[j])
  lines(x = dt_plot1$prop_out, y = dt_plot1[,cc], type = "l", lty = lty_set[j], col = cols0[1], lwd = lwd_set[j])
  dt_plot1 <- dt_plot2 %>% filter(par_val == par_set1[j])
  lines(x = dt_plot1$prop_out, y = dt_plot1[,cc], type = "l", lty = lty_set[j], lwd = lwd_set[j], col = cols0[2])
}


}

```


```{r}



leg_title <- "Ref. reef recruits (x default)"
leg_vals <- as.character(c(0, 0.5, 1))
lty_set <- rev(c(1, 2, 3))
lwd_set <- rev(c(1.5, 2, 2.5))

lwd_setL <- c(2, 1.5, 2) # for legend

pdf("TempFigs/full_lambdaR1.pdf", height = 6, width = 5)

full_sens_plot(par_set_p = lambda_R_setL, dt5 = lambda_R2_dt5, dt5D = lambda_R2_dt5D, dt50 = lambda_R2_dt50, dt50D = lambda_R2_dt50D)

dev.off()

```

what you're looking for on these plots is whether the lines cross (which proportion is best changes) 


-- lab capacity


```{r}
lab_max0 <- 3100 # default value

lab_max_setL <- c(1, 1.5, 2)*lab_max0

# par_name can be either parameters that are in rest_pars list or "lambda_R", "frag_pars.o", and "surv_pars.o_1"
# dem_pars = demographic parameters to use
# prop_set1 = values proportion of substrates to outplant to orchard to iterate over
tic()
sens_lab_max2 <- par_sens_fun1(par_set = lab_max_setL, par_name = "lab_max", prop_setS, dem_pars = all_pars)

sens_lab_max2D <- par_sens_fun1(par_set = lab_max_setL, par_name = "lab_max", prop_setS, dem_pars = all_pars, dist = T)

toc()

# process the results
lab_max2_dt5 <- orch_exp_sens_fun(sim_list = sens_lab_max2, par_set2 = lab_max_setL, prop_setS, L2, length(prop_setS), max_yr = 5, weights = list(reef_cover = 1, orch_fun = 1, reef_ROI = 1, tot_ROI = 1, tot_costs = 0, recruits_out = 0), dt_D0 = data.frame(NA))
 
lab_max2_dt50 <- orch_exp_sens_fun(sim_list = sens_lab_max2, par_set2 = lab_max_setL, prop_setS, L2, length(prop_setS), max_yr = 50, weights = list(reef_cover = 1, orch_fun = 1, reef_ROI = 1, tot_ROI = 1, tot_costs = 0, recruits_out = 0), dt_D0 = data.frame(NA))


lab_max2_dt5D <- orch_exp_sens_fun(sim_list = sens_lab_max2D, par_set2 = lab_max_setL, prop_setS, L2, length(prop_setS), max_yr = 5, weights = list(reef_cover = 1, orch_fun = 1, reef_ROI = 1, tot_ROI = 1, tot_costs = 0, recruits_out = 0), dt_D0 = lab_max2_dt5)
 
lab_max2_dt50D <- orch_exp_sens_fun(sim_list = sens_lab_max2D, par_set2 = lab_max_setL, prop_setS, L2, length(prop_setS), max_yr = 50, weights = list(reef_cover = 1, orch_fun = 1, reef_ROI = 1, tot_ROI = 1, tot_costs = 0, recruits_out = 0), dt_D0 = lab_max2_dt50)


leg_title <- "Lab capacity (x default)"
leg_vals <- as.character(c(1, 1.5, 2))
lty_set <- c(1, 2, 3)
lwd_set <- c(1.5, 2, 2.5)

pdf("TempFigs/full_lab_max.pdf", height = 6, width = 5)

full_sens_plot(par_set_p = lab_max_setL, dt5 = lab_max2_dt5, dt5D = lab_max2_dt5D, dt50 = lab_max2_dt50, dt50D = lab_max2_dt50D)

dev.off()


```


-- orchard capacity

```{r}
orchard_size0 <- 15000 # default value

orchard_size_setL <- c(1, 1.5, 2)*orchard_size0

# par_name can be either parameters that are in rest_pars list or "lambda_R", "frag_pars.o", and "surv_pars.o_1"
# dem_pars = demographic parameters to use
# prop_set1 = values proportion of substrates to outplant to orchard to iterate over
tic()
sens_orchard_size2 <- par_sens_fun1(par_set = orchard_size_setL, par_name = "orchard_size", prop_setS, dem_pars = all_pars)

sens_orchard_size2D <- par_sens_fun1(par_set = orchard_size_setL, par_name = "orchard_size", prop_setS, dem_pars = all_pars, dist = T)

toc()

# process the results
orchard_size2_dt5 <- orch_exp_sens_fun(sim_list = sens_orchard_size2, par_set2 = orchard_size_setL, prop_setS, L2, length(prop_setS), max_yr = 5, weights = list(reef_cover = 1, orch_fun = 1, reef_ROI = 1, tot_ROI = 1, tot_costs = 0, recruits_out = 0), dt_D0 = data.frame(NA))
 
orchard_size2_dt50 <- orch_exp_sens_fun(sim_list = sens_orchard_size2, par_set2 = orchard_size_setL, prop_setS, L2, length(prop_setS), max_yr = 50, weights = list(reef_cover = 1, orch_fun = 1, reef_ROI = 1, tot_ROI = 1, tot_costs = 0, recruits_out = 0), dt_D0 = data.frame(NA))


orchard_size2_dt5D <- orch_exp_sens_fun(sim_list = sens_orchard_size2D, par_set2 = orchard_size_setL, prop_setS, L2, length(prop_setS), max_yr = 5, weights = list(reef_cover = 1, orch_fun = 1, reef_ROI = 1, tot_ROI = 1, tot_costs = 0, recruits_out = 0), dt_D0 = orchard_size2_dt5)
 
orchard_size2_dt50D <- orch_exp_sens_fun(sim_list = sens_orchard_size2D, par_set2 = orchard_size_setL, prop_setS, L2, length(prop_setS), max_yr = 50, weights = list(reef_cover = 1, orch_fun = 1, reef_ROI = 1, tot_ROI = 1, tot_costs = 0, recruits_out = 0), dt_D0 = orchard_size2_dt50)


leg_title <- "Orchard capacity (x default)"
leg_vals <- as.character(c(1, 1.5, 2))

lwd_set <- c(1.5, 2, 2.5)

pdf("TempFigs/full_orchard_size.pdf", height = 6, width = 5)

full_sens_plot(par_set_p = orchard_size_setL, dt5 = orchard_size2_dt5, dt5D = orchard_size2_dt5D, dt50 = orchard_size2_dt50, dt50D = orchard_size2_dt50D)

dev.off()


```

```{r}
dev.off()
```

```{r}
# repeat orchard fecundity without reference reef supply

N0.o[[1]][[1]] <- c(0.1, 0, 0, 0, 0)

sens_orchard_fec3D <- par_sens_fun1(par_set = orchard_fec_setL, par_name = "fec_pars.o", prop_setS, dem_pars = all_pars, dist = T)

# reset to default
lambda_R <- 1255111
N0.o[[1]][[1]] <- rep(0, n) # reset initial conditions in the orchard

# process the results
orchard_fec3_dt5 <- orch_exp_sens_fun(sim_list = sens_orchard_fec3, par_set2 = orchard_fec_setL, prop_setS, L2, length(prop_setS), max_yr = 5, weights = list(reef_cover = 1, orch_fun = 1, reef_ROI = 1, tot_ROI = 1, tot_costs = 0, recruits_out = 0), dt_D0 = data.frame(NA))
```

-- survival of smallest size class on reef (has implications for effectiveness of intervention strategies)

```{r}
#surv_pars.r[[1]][[1]][1]

reef_surv_setL <- c(1, 5, 10)

# par_name can be either parameters that are in rest_pars list or "lambda_R", "frag_pars.o", and "surv_pars.o_1"
# dem_pars = demographic parameters to use
# prop_set1 = values proportion of substrates to outplant to orchard to iterate over
tic()
sens_reef_surv2 <- par_sens_fun1(par_set = reef_surv_setL, par_name = "surv_pars.r_1", prop_setS, dem_pars = all_pars)

sens_reef_surv2D <- par_sens_fun1(par_set = reef_surv_setL, par_name = "surv_pars.r_1", prop_setS, dem_pars = all_pars, dist = T)

toc()

# process the results
reef_surv2_dt5 <- orch_exp_sens_fun(sim_list = sens_reef_surv2, par_set2 = reef_surv_setL, prop_setS, L2, length(prop_setS), max_yr = 5, weights = list(reef_cover = 1, orch_fun = 1, reef_ROI = 1, tot_ROI = 1, tot_costs = 0, recruits_out = 0), dt_D0 = data.frame(NA))
 
reef_surv2_dt50 <- orch_exp_sens_fun(sim_list = sens_reef_surv2, par_set2 = reef_surv_setL, prop_setS, L2, length(prop_setS), max_yr = 50, weights = list(reef_cover = 1, orch_fun = 1, reef_ROI = 1, tot_ROI = 1, tot_costs = 0, recruits_out = 0), dt_D0 = data.frame(NA))


reef_surv2_dt5D <- orch_exp_sens_fun(sim_list = sens_reef_surv2D, par_set2 = reef_surv_setL, prop_setS, L2, length(prop_setS), max_yr = 5, weights = list(reef_cover = 1, orch_fun = 1, reef_ROI = 1, tot_ROI = 1, tot_costs = 0, recruits_out = 0), dt_D0 = reef_surv2_dt5)
 
reef_surv2_dt50D <- orch_exp_sens_fun(sim_list = sens_reef_surv2D, par_set2 = reef_surv_setL, prop_setS, L2, length(prop_setS), max_yr = 50, weights = list(reef_cover = 1, orch_fun = 1, reef_ROI = 1, tot_ROI = 1, tot_costs = 0, recruits_out = 0), dt_D0 = reef_surv2_dt50)

leg_vals <- as.character(c(1, 5, 10))

lwd_set <- c(2, 1.5, 2.5)
# lwd_setL <- c(2, 1.5, 2)

pdf("TempFigs/full_reef_surv.pdf", height = 6, width = 5)

dev.off()


```




-- orchard survival rates relative to reef (which should also affect how many die from disturbance? Or should that be explored separately?). Repeat with and without reference reef supply?

```{r}


#surv_pars.o[[1]][[1]][1]/surv_pars.r[[1]][[1]][1]

orch_surv_setL <- c(1, 30, 60) # orchard survival is this value multiplied by REEF survival; default is about 60

sens_orch_surv2D <- par_sens_fun1(par_set = orch_surv_setL, par_name = "surv_pars.o_1", prop_setS, dem_pars = all_pars, dist = T)

toc()

# process the results

orch_surv2_dt50D <- orch_exp_sens_fun(sim_list = sens_orch_surv2D, par_set2 = orch_surv_setL, prop_setS, L2, length(prop_setS), max_yr = 50, weights = list(reef_cover = 1, orch_fun = 1, reef_ROI = 1, tot_ROI = 1, tot_costs = 0, recruits_out = 0), dt_D0 = orch_surv2_dt50)

dev.off()


```

```{r}

# metric_cols <- c("#4477AA", "#AA3377", "#66CCEE", "#CCBB44","#EE6677", "#228833") # coral cover on reef, orchard function, reef ROI, total ROI, total costs, recruits outplanted to reef

# lines(x = dt_plot$par_val/def_par, y = dt_plot$prop_out, type = "l", col = metric_cols[2], lwd = 2, lty = 2)
# 
# dt_plot <- dt_list2$reef_ROI

# 
# dt_plot <- dt_list2$tot_ROI
# lines(x = dt_plot$par_val/def_par, y = dt_plot$prop_out, type = "l", col = metric_cols[4], lwd = 2, lty = 2)

```



was going to show proportion to outplant that maximizes each metric (sensitivity parameter on x-axis, proportion on y-axis, lines for the four metrics), but this actually isn't that interesting since orchard will always be maximized when everything goes to the orchard. 


initial lab capacity
